title.zh: 联合国条约集与条约状态数据库
title.en: United Nations Treaty Collection and Treaty Status Database

summary.zh: 联合国条约集提供联合国秘书长保存的多边条约状态、缔约方信息、声明保留和条约文本，是核验中国参加国际条约状态的基础工具。
summary.en: The UN Treaty Collection provides status information, parties, declarations, reservations, and treaty texts for multilateral treaties deposited with the UN Secretary-General.

title.zh: UNCITRAL亚太区域中心
title.en: UNCITRAL Regional Centre for Asia and the Pacific

summary.zh: UNCITRAL亚太区域中心开展商法统一、争端解决、电子商务、贸易法能力建设和区域活动，是跟踪中国及亚太参与国际商法规则形成的重要入口。
summary.en: UNCITRAL-RCAP supports commercial-law harmonization, dispute resolution, e-commerce, trade-law capacity building, and Asia-Pacific regional activities relevant to China and regional legal governance.

authority.zh: 联合国国际贸易法委员会

en: Regional Centre for Asia and the Pacific

title.zh: UNCITRAL第三工作组：投资者—国家争端解决改革
title.en: UNCITRAL Working Group III on ISDS Reform

summary.zh: UNCITRAL第三工作组围绕投资者—国家争端解决改革开展工作，涉及投资调解、上诉机制、多边咨询中心和程序规则改革，是中国参与国际投资争端规则塑造的重要观察点。
summary.en: UNCITRAL Working Group III addresses investor-State dispute settlement reform, including investment mediation, appellate mechanisms, advisory centres, and procedural reforms.

authority.zh: 联合国国际贸易法委员会

title.zh: UNCTAD投资政策中心：中国投资协定导航
title.en: UNCTAD Investment Policy Hub: China IIA Navigator

summary.zh: UNCTAD中国投资协定导航列明中国双边投资协定、含投资条款协定和投资相关文书，是研究中国投资条约网络、ISDS和条约改革的重要数据库。
summary.en: UNCTAD’s China IIA Navigator lists China’s BITs, treaties with investment provisions, and investment-related instruments, supporting research on investment treaties, ISDS, and treaty reform.

authority.zh: 联合国贸易和发展会议

title.zh: 世界知识产权组织：中国资料页
title.en: WIPO China Country Profile

summary.zh: WIPO中国资料页汇集中国在PCT、马德里、海牙体系、知识产权数据和国际合作中的信息，是涉外知识产权研究的官方入口。
summary.en: WIPO’s China profile aggregates information on China’s participation in PCT, Madrid and Hague systems, IP data, and cooperation with WIPO.

title.zh: 世界贸易组织争端解决资料入口
title.en: WTO Dispute Settlement Gateway

summary.zh: WTO争端解决入口提供争端解决机制、DSU、案件检索和成员参与信息，是研究中国在WTO争端中的角色及多边贸易法治的基础工具。
summary.en: The WTO dispute settlement gateway provides access to the DSU, case search, member participation data, and explanations of the WTO dispute settlement system.

title.zh: 涉外法治人才培养与实践发展
title.en: Talent training and practical development in foreign-related rule of law

summary.zh: 司法部理论文章讨论涉外法治人才的类型、实践场景和协同培养路径，适合作为人才培养专题的基础文献题录。
summary.en: A Ministry of Justice theory article discusses categories of foreign-related legal talent, practical scenarios, and collaborative training pathways.

title.zh: 最高法发布第三批涉外商事海事调解典型案例
title.en: SPC third batch of typical mediation cases in foreign-related commercial and maritime disputes

summary.zh: 第三批案例涵盖跨境投资、股权转让、买卖合同、船舶经营管理、海难救助、涉外仲裁裁决承认与执行等领域。
summary.en: The third batch covers cross-border investment, equity transfer, sales contracts, vessel operation, maritime salvage, and recognition and enforcement of foreign-related arbitral awards.

title.zh: 国际商事法庭：《反外国不当域外管辖条例》专家解读
title.en: CICC Expert Commentary on the Regulation Countering Unlawful Extraterritorial Jurisdiction

summary.zh: 国际商事法庭发布专家解读，说明条例在反制裁、阻断、恶意实体清单和高水平开放法治保障中的实践意义。
summary.en: The CICC expert commentary explains the regulation’s role in counter-sanctions, blocking mechanisms, malicious entity lists, and legal safeguards for high-level opening-up.

authority.zh: 最高人民法院国际商事法庭

title.zh: 中国国际民商事司法协助进展
title.en: China makes solid strides in international civil and commercial judicial assistance

summary.zh: 司法部介绍中国在国际民商事司法协助中的进展，包括送达、调查取证、外国民事判决承认与执行等合作机制。
summary.en: The Ministry of Justice describes progress in civil and commercial judicial assistance, including service of documents, evidence taking, and recognition and enforcement of judgments.

title.zh: 中华人民共和国反外国不当域外管辖条例
title.en: Rules on Countermeasures Against Foreign States' Unlawful Extraterritorial Jurisdiction

summary.zh: 国务院2026年公布反外国不当域外管辖条例，建立不当域外管辖识别、恶意实体清单、禁执令、反制和司法救济等制度。
summary.en: The 2026 State Council rules establish mechanisms for identifying unlawful extraterritorial jurisdiction, a malicious entity list, prohibition orders, countermeasures, and judicial remedies.

authority.zh: 国务院 / 中国政府网

title.zh: 张文显：涉外法治基本属性的法理分析
title.en: Zhang Wenxian on the jurisprudential attributes of foreign-related rule of law

summary.zh: 文章从概念源流、体系定位、国内法治与国际法治衔接等角度分析涉外法治的基本属性，是理解涉外法治作为独立学术范畴的重要基础文献。
summary.en: The essay analyzes the conceptual origin, system position, and domestic-international linkage of foreign-related rule of law, making it a useful foundational reading for the portal.

authority.zh: 中国法学会 / 学术前沿杂志公众号
authority.en: China Law Society / Frontiers journal account

en: domestic and international rule of law

title.zh: 湖南提升涉外法律服务支持高水平开放
title.en: Hunan enhances foreign-related legal services to support high-level opening-up

summary.zh: 司法部英文网介绍湖南围绕自贸试验区、涉外法律服务、涉外律师人才库和中国—非洲经贸合作推进涉外法治能力建设。
summary.en: The Ministry of Justice reports on Hunan's foreign-related legal services, FTZ support, legal talent pools, and China-Africa trade-related legal capacity.

title.zh: 中华人民共和国网络安全法（2025年修改）
title.en: Cybersecurity Law of the PRC (2025 Amendment)

summary.zh: 网络安全法及其2025年修改是网络空间治理、关键信息基础设施保护、数据出境安全和企业网络合规的基础法律。
summary.en: The Cybersecurity Law and its 2025 amendment form a core framework for cyberspace governance, critical information infrastructure protection, data export security, and cyber compliance.

authority.zh: 全国人大 / 国家法律法规数据库
authority.en: National People’s Congress / National Laws and Regulations Database

title.zh: 国际调解院正式成立
title.en: International Organization for Mediation officially inaugurated

summary.zh: 国际调解院在香港开业，作为专门以调解方式解决国际争端的政府间国际组织，为国际争端解决和全球治理提供新平台。
summary.en: The International Organization for Mediation opened in Hong Kong as an intergovernmental organization dedicated to mediation-based resolution of international disputes.

authority.zh: 中华人民共和国外交部
authority.en: Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the People's Republic of China

title.zh: 第五批涉“一带一路”建设典型案例
title.en: Fifth batch of typical Belt and Road-related cases

summary.zh: 最高人民法院发布第五批涉“一带一路”建设典型案例，涵盖独立保函、建设工程、外国判决和外国仲裁裁决承认执行等问题。
summary.en: The fifth batch of Belt and Road-related cases covers independent guarantees, construction contracts, and recognition and enforcement of foreign judgments and arbitral awards.

authority.zh: 最高人民法院 / 中国国际商事法庭
authority.en: Supreme People's Court / China International Commercial Court

title.zh: 2025年人民法院反垄断典型案例
title.en: 2025 People’s Courts Typical Antimonopoly Cases

summary.zh: 最高人民法院发布2025年反垄断典型案例，涉及横向垄断协议、行政性垄断和行业协会行为，可用于研究竞争法、平台经济和跨境企业合规。
summary.en: The 2025 SPC antimonopoly typical cases address horizontal monopoly agreements, administrative monopoly, and trade association conduct, supporting competition-law and corporate compliance research.

authority.zh: 最高人民法院知识产权法庭

title.zh: 数据权益司法保护专题指导性案例
title.en: SPC Guiding Cases on Judicial Protection of Data Rights

summary.zh: 最高人民法院首次发布数据权益司法保护专题指导性案例，回应数据权属、数据产品利用、个人信息保护和网络平台账号交付等问题。
summary.en: The SPC’s first data-rights guiding cases address data entitlement, data product use, personal information protection, and transfer of online platform accounts.

authority.zh: 最高人民法院知识产权法庭

title.zh: 最高法发布第二批涉外商事海事调解典型案例
title.en: SPC second batch of typical mediation cases in foreign-related commercial and maritime disputes

summary.zh: 第二批案例涉及新加坡、孟加拉国、乌兹别克斯坦、土耳其、瑞士、马绍尔群岛、科特迪瓦、智利等国家和地区当事人，突出海事审判与高水平开放。
summary.en: The second batch involves parties from Singapore, Bangladesh, Uzbekistan, Türkiye, Switzerland, the Marshall Islands, Côte d’Ivoire, Chile, and others, emphasizing maritime justice and high-level opening-up.

title.zh: 首批涉外商事海事调解典型案例
title.en: First batch of typical foreign-related commercial and maritime mediation cases

summary.zh: 最高人民法院发布首批涉外商事海事调解典型案例，展示人民法院多元解纷、国际商事调解和海事审判实践。
summary.en: The Supreme People's Court released typical foreign-related commercial and maritime mediation cases, highlighting diversified dispute resolution and maritime adjudication practice.

title.zh: 最高法发布首批涉外商事海事调解典型案例
title.en: SPC first batch of typical mediation cases in foreign-related commercial and maritime disputes

summary.zh: 最高人民法院2025年发布首批6个涉外商事海事调解典型案例，涉及新加坡、韩国、意大利、美国等国家当事人，展示诉调对接和国际商事调解实践。
summary.en: The SPC’s first batch of six typical mediation cases covers parties from Singapore, Korea, Italy, the United States, and others, illustrating diversified dispute resolution in foreign-related commercial and maritime matters.

title.zh: “一带一路”国际商事审判案例：信用证开证纠纷案
title.en: CICC Belt and Road Case: Letter of Credit Issuance Dispute

summary.zh: 国际商事法庭选登《最高人民法院“一带一路”国际商事审判案例精要》中信用证开证纠纷案例，适合研究跨境金融交易、信用证独立性和国际商事审判方法。
summary.en: The CICC selected case from the SPC Belt and Road case digest illustrates issues in cross-border finance, letters of credit, and international commercial adjudication.

authority.zh: 最高人民法院 / 国际商事法庭
authority.en: Supreme People’s Court / China International Commercial Court

title.zh: 外国数据法效力的域外扩张与中国范式研究
title.en: Extraterritorial expansion of foreign data law and the Chinese paradigm

summary.zh: 文章从美国、欧盟数据法域外适用出发，讨论中国数据法域外效力、阻断机制和全球数据治理中国范式。
summary.en: The article examines extraterritorial data-law regimes in the United States and Europe and proposes a Chinese paradigm for data-law extraterritoriality and blocking mechanisms.

authority.zh: 中国高校人文社会科学信息网
authority.en: Chinese University Humanities and Social Sciences Online

title.zh: 统合法律理论视角下数据跨境流动的困境与因应
title.en: Cross-border data flows from the perspective of integrated legal theory

summary.zh: 《国际商务——对外经济贸易大学学报》文章，从价值、规范和事实三维框架分析数据跨境流动壁垒及其法治化因应。
summary.en: This International Business article analyzes barriers to cross-border data flows through value, norm, and fact dimensions and proposes rule-of-law responses.

authority.zh: 国际商务——对外经济贸易大学学报

authors.en: Jian Liu; Qin Zhu; Jingchen Pan

title.zh: 国际调解院基本文件
title.en: International Organization for Mediation Basic Documents

summary.zh: 国际调解院官网基本文件页面收录《建立国际调解院公约》等文件，是跟踪中国参与创建新型国际争端解决机制的重要入口。
summary.en: The IOMed basic documents page includes the Convention on the Establishment of the International Organization for Mediation and related institutional materials.

title.zh: 国务院2025年度立法工作计划中的涉外领域立法
title.en: Foreign-Related Legislation in the State Council 2025 Legislative Plan

summary.zh: 国务院2025年度立法工作计划提出统筹推进国内法治和涉外法治，加强重点领域、新兴领域、涉外领域立法，是跟踪行政法规和涉外立法动态的年度入口。
summary.en: The 2025 State Council legislative plan emphasizes coordinated domestic and foreign-related rule of law and stronger legislation in key, emerging, and foreign-related fields.

authority.zh: 国务院办公厅 / 中国政府网
authority.en: General Office of the State Council

title.zh: 中国涉外“法治”：一个概念的演变
title.en: China’s Foreign-Related “Rule of Law”: The Evolution of an Idea

summary.zh: 《Hague Journal on the Rule of Law》开放获取论文，系统回顾涉外法治概念的形成、功能扩张及其对中国法律框架和国际事务的影响。
summary.en: An open-access Hague Journal on the Rule of Law article reviewing the emergence, functions, and legal-political significance of China’s foreign-related rule of law.

authority.zh: Hague Journal on the Rule of Law / Springer Nature
authority.en: Hague Journal on the Rule of Law / Springer Nature

title.zh: 中国海事审判（2022-2024）英文资料
title.en: China Maritime Trial (2022-2024)

summary.zh: 最高人民法院英文网发布的海事审判专题英文资料，概述中国海事审判制度、典型案例和国际海事司法合作。
summary.en: An SPC English-language report on China’s maritime trial work from 2022 to 2024, including institutional developments, typical cases, and international maritime judicial cooperation.

title.zh: 反外国制裁法实施条例
title.en: Regulation on Implementing the Anti-Foreign Sanctions Law

summary.zh: 国务院公布反外国制裁法实施条例，细化反制措施、程序协调和执行机制，是反制裁法律工具箱的重要组成部分。
summary.en: The State Council regulation details countermeasure procedures and enforcement mechanisms under the Anti-Foreign Sanctions Law, strengthening China's counter-sanctions toolkit.

authority.zh: 国务院 / 中国政府网

title.zh: 国务院关于涉外知识产权纠纷处理的规定
title.en: State Council Regulations on Resolving Foreign-Related Intellectual Property Disputes

summary.zh: 国务院2025年发布涉外知识产权纠纷处理规定，强调海外知识产权信息查询、预警服务、企业能力建设、境内送达取证规则和不公平待遇反制。
summary.en: The 2025 State Council regulations provide mechanisms for overseas IP information services, warnings, enterprise capacity building, domestic service and evidence procedures, and countermeasures against unfair treatment.

authority.zh: 国务院 / 中国政府网

title.zh: 论中国反制裁法的域外效力
title.en: The extraterritorial effect of China’s anti-sanctions law

summary.zh: 《上海对外经贸大学学报》文章从立法管辖、法律适用和国际礼让角度讨论中国反制裁法的域外效力合法性。
summary.en: This Shanghai University of International Business and Economics Law Journal article studies the extraterritorial effect of China’s anti-sanctions law through jurisdiction, application, and comity.

authority.zh: 上海对外经贸大学学报
authority.en: Journal of Shanghai University of International Business and Economics

title.zh: 中国涉外“法治”：概念演进
title.en: China’s Foreign-Related “Rule of Law”: The Evolution of an Idea

summary.zh: Hague Journal on the Rule of Law文章追踪“涉外法治”概念在中国政策和学术语境中的演化，可与中文基础理论文献形成对读。
summary.en: This Hague Journal on the Rule of Law article traces the evolution of the concept of foreign-related rule of law in Chinese policy and academic discourse.

authority.zh: Hague Journal on the Rule of Law / Springer
authority.en: Hague Journal on the Rule of Law / Springer

title.zh: 浦东新区涉外法治建设白皮书
title.en: White Paper on Foreign-Related Rule of Law Development in Pudong New Area

summary.zh: 浦东新区发布涉外法治建设白皮书，集中展示地方制度型开放、涉外法律服务、国际商事争端解决和营商环境建设实践。
summary.en: Pudong’s white paper documents local practice in institutional opening-up, foreign-related legal services, international commercial dispute resolution, and business environment reform.

authority.zh: 上海市浦东新区人民政府

en: foreign-related rule of law white paper

title.zh: OECD外商直接投资监管限制指数（2024）
title.en: OECD FDI Regulatory Restrictiveness Index 2024

summary.zh: OECD 2024外商直接投资监管限制指数覆盖百余经济体，对外资股比、外资审查、关键人员和其他运营限制进行比较，是观察中国外资准入法治环境的外部指标。
summary.en: The OECD 2024 FDI Regulatory Restrictiveness Index compares statutory FDI restrictions across more than 100 economies, including equity, screening, key personnel, and operational limits.

title.zh: OECD服务贸易限制指数：中国
title.en: OECD Services Trade Restrictiveness Index: China

summary.zh: OECD中国服务贸易限制指数提供服务贸易监管的年度比较资料，可用于研究制度型开放、服务业准入、数字服务和贸易合规。
summary.en: The OECD STRI China country note provides annually updated comparative data on services trade regulation, useful for studying institutional opening-up, services access, digital services, and trade compliance.

title.zh: 中国海洋安全法治体系研究
title.en: The Rule of Law System for China’s Marine Security

summary.zh: Frontiers in Marine Science文章从海洋安全、海洋治理和法治体系角度讨论中国海洋法律制度，适合纳入海外利益保护和海事法治专题。
summary.en: This Frontiers in Marine Science article examines China’s marine security rule-of-law system, relevant to maritime governance, overseas interests, and foreign-related legal capacity.

title.zh: 论涉外法治的底层逻辑
title.en: On the Underlying Logic of Foreign-Related Rule of Law

summary.zh: 法治日报摘编《中国法学》2024年第5期文章，围绕涉外法治的底层逻辑、概念边界和理论表达展开，是概念研究的重要题录。
summary.en: This Legal Daily excerpt from China Legal Science (2024 Issue 5) addresses the underlying logic, conceptual boundaries, and theoretical expression of foreign-related rule of law.

authority.zh: 中国法学 / 法治日报

en: concept of foreign-related rule of law

title.zh: 最高人民法院首次发布海事审判专题指导性案例
title.en: SPC maritime trial guiding cases

summary.zh: 最高人民法院2024年发布海事审判专题指导性案例，涵盖海上货物运输、海难救助、船舶触碰损害、海事赔偿责任限制、外国法院判决承认等问题。
summary.en: The SPC’s 2024 maritime guiding cases cover carriage of goods by sea, salvage, vessel collision liability, limitation funds, recognition of foreign judgments, and applicable law.

title.zh: 应对法律战视角下的涉外法治建设初探
title.en: Foreign-related rule of law from the perspective of responding to legal warfare

summary.zh: 刊载于《和平与发展》的研究文章，从法律战、长臂管辖和外部风险应对角度讨论涉外法治建设的攻防功能。
summary.en: Published in Peace and Development, this research essay examines foreign-related rule of law through legal warfare, long-arm jurisdiction, and external risk response.

authority.zh: 上海社会科学院法学研究所 / 《和平与发展》
authority.en: Institute of Law, Shanghai Academy of Social Sciences / Peace and Development

title.zh: 以涉外法治人才协同培养基地建设推进人才培养
title.en: Collaborative Bases for Foreign-Related Rule-of-Law Talent Training

summary.zh: 检察日报“涉外法治”版面文章讨论以协同培养创新基地引入实务部门资源、推动教学科研与办案实践结合的路径。
summary.en: This Procuratorial Daily article discusses collaborative training bases that bring practice resources into legal education and connect teaching, research, and case-handling practice.

authors.en: Qin Sun; Jing Hu; Qingjiang Kong

title.zh: 中华人民共和国反洗钱法（2024修订）
title.en: Anti-Money Laundering Law of the People’s Republic of China (2024 Revision)

summary.zh: 2024年修订、2025年1月1日起施行，强化金融机构和特定非金融机构义务、反洗钱特别预防措施和国际合作条款，涉及跨境资金流动与企业合规。
summary.en: The 2024 revision, effective January 1, 2025, updates AML obligations for financial and designated non-financial institutions and includes international cooperation provisions.

authority.zh: 全国人大常委会 / 中国人大网

title.zh: 中华人民共和国能源法
title.en: Energy Law of the People’s Republic of China

summary.zh: 2024年通过、2025年1月1日起施行，确立能源安全、绿色低碳转型、能源市场体系和全方位国际合作等制度安排。
summary.en: Adopted in 2024 and effective January 1, 2025, the Energy Law establishes rules for energy security, green transition, energy markets, reserves, and international cooperation.

title.zh: 《新时代的中国网络法治建设》白皮书
title.en: China’s Law-Based Cyberspace Governance in the New Era

summary.zh: 国新办2023年白皮书介绍中国网络法治体系、数据与平台治理、网络司法和国际网络空间治理合作，是数据跨境与数字法治专题的基础材料。
summary.en: A 2023 SCIO white paper on China’s cyber legislation, law enforcement, cyber justice, data governance, and international cooperation in law-based cyberspace governance.

authority.zh: 国务院新闻办公室 / 中国政府网

title.zh: 个人信息出境标准合同办法
title.en: Measures for the Standard Contract for Outbound Transfer of Personal Information

summary.zh: 国家网信办第13号令规定以标准合同方式向境外提供个人信息的适用条件、影响评估、备案和合同条款。
summary.en: CAC Order No. 13 sets conditions, impact assessment, filing, and contractual requirements for outbound transfer of personal information through standard contracts.

authority.zh: 国家互联网信息办公室 / 中国政府网

title.zh: 全球安全倡议概念文件
title.en: The Global Security Initiative Concept Paper

summary.zh: 外交部发布全球安全倡议概念文件，提出共同、综合、合作、可持续安全观及二十项合作重点，是中国参与全球安全治理和国际法治秩序讨论的重要政策文本。
summary.en: The MFA concept paper sets out China’s Global Security Initiative, including a common, comprehensive, cooperative and sustainable security vision and twenty cooperation priorities for global security governance.

authority.en: Ministry of Foreign Affairs of China

title.zh: 论我国《反外国制裁法》第12条中的侵权行为及其责任
title.en: Torts and liability under Article 12 of China’s Anti-Foreign Sanctions Law

summary.zh: 《国际经济法学刊》文章从侵权行为、共同侵权和损害赔偿角度分析《反外国制裁法》第12条的司法救济路径。
summary.en: The article analyzes Article 12 of the Anti-Foreign Sanctions Law through tort, joint liability, and damages theories.

authority.zh: 国际经济法学刊 / 北京大学期刊网
authority.en: Journal of International Economic Law / Peking University journals platform

authors.en: Jiangang Wang; Ning Liang; Liu Yi

title.zh: 中华人民共和国对外贸易法
title.en: Foreign Trade Law of the People’s Republic of China

summary.zh: 对外贸易法规定货物贸易、技术进出口、服务贸易、贸易秩序和对外贸易促进等基本制度，是研究中国外贸管理和WTO履约的重要基础法律。
summary.en: The Foreign Trade Law sets out China’s basic rules for trade in goods, technology import and export, services trade, trade order, and foreign trade promotion.

title.zh: 涉外民商事案件管辖若干问题的规定
title.en: Provisions on jurisdiction over foreign-related civil and commercial cases

summary.zh: 最高人民法院发布涉外民商事案件管辖规定，明确中级人民法院集中管辖范围，便利当事人诉讼并提升涉外审判质效。
summary.en: The Supreme People's Court provisions clarify jurisdictional arrangements for foreign-related civil and commercial cases and support more efficient adjudication.

title.zh: 中国国际商事法庭：迈向国际商事争端“融解决”体系
title.en: The China International Commercial Court: Towards an Integrated Dispute Resolution System

summary.zh: 中国国际商事法庭研究文章，讨论一站式机制如何整合诉讼、仲裁与调解，并提出“融解决”体系建设路径。
summary.en: A CICC research article on how the one-stop mechanism integrates litigation, arbitration, and mediation into an integrated dispute resolution system.

title.zh: 以习近平法治思想为统领 构建涉外法治人才培养体系
title.en: Building a foreign-related rule of law talent training system

summary.zh: 文章从学科体系、学术体系、知识技能体系和培养场景等方面讨论涉外法治人才培养，适合人才培养专题使用。
summary.en: The article discusses talent training for foreign-related rule of law across disciplinary systems, academic systems, skill systems, and practical training scenarios.

authority.zh: 中国法学会 / 民主与法制周刊
authority.en: China Law Society / Democracy and Legal System Weekly

title.zh: 数据出境安全评估办法

summary.en: The measures set out the scope, filing procedure, and continuing supervision requirements for security assessment of important data and personal information exports.

authority.zh: 国家互联网信息办公室

title.zh: 数字社会治理下我国法院参与跨境数据治理体制机制构建的路径
title.en: Pathways for Chinese courts to participate in cross-border data governance

summary.en: The essay examines courts’ roles in cross-border data disputes, including jurisdiction, conflict rules, evidence, recognition and enforcement, and judicial cooperation.

authority.zh: 中国法学会 / 民主与法制网
authority.en: China Law Society / Democracy and Legal System Online

title.zh: 数据安全与开放之间：数字贸易国际规则构建的中国方案
title.en: Between data security and openness: a Chinese proposal for digital trade rules

summary.zh: 中国法治国际论坛主题征文，讨论数字贸易国际规则、数据跨境流动、源代码保护和中国参与规则构建的路径。
summary.en: A China Rule of Law International Forum essay on digital trade rules, cross-border data flows, source-code protection, and China’s approach to rule-making.

authority.zh: 中国法学会 / 民主与法制网
authority.en: China Law Society / Democracy and Legal System Online

title.zh: 工业品外观设计海牙体系与中国加入
title.en: Hague System for Industrial Designs and China

summary.en: WIPO materials record China’s 2022 accession to the Hague System for international design registration, relevant to overseas design protection and IP compliance.

title.zh: 马拉喀什条约：中国加入资料
title.en: Marrakesh Treaty: China Accession Materials

summary.en: WIPO reported China’s 2022 accession to the Marrakesh Treaty, an IP treaty facilitating access to published works for people who are blind, visually impaired, or otherwise print disabled.

title.zh: 《反外国制裁法》述评
title.en: A review of the Anti-Foreign Sanctions Law

summary.en: This Journal of International Economic Law article reviews the Anti-Foreign Sanctions Law, including countermeasures, prohibitions, private remedies, and business implications.

authority.zh: 国际经济法学刊 / 北京大学期刊网
authority.en: Journal of International Economic Law / Peking University journals platform

title.zh: 《中国的出口管制》白皮书
title.en: White Paper: China's Export Controls

summary.en: The State Council Information Office white paper explains China's export control positions, legal system, modernization of governance, and international cooperation.

authority.zh: 国务院新闻办公室 / 中国政府网
authority.en: State Council Information Office / The State Council of China

title.zh: 中华人民共和国个人信息保护法
title.en: Personal Information Protection Law of the People's Republic of China

summary.zh: 《个人信息保护法》确立个人信息处理规则、跨境提供个人信息规则和域外适用条款，是数据跨境与企业合规专题的核心法律。
summary.en: The Personal Information Protection Law establishes personal information processing rules, cross-border transfer mechanisms, and extraterritorial application provisions central to data compliance.

title.zh: 中国《反外国制裁法》：给世界的警示
title.en: China’s Anti-Foreign Sanctions Law: A warning to the world

summary.zh: MERICS 分析文章从反制裁、阻断和域外适用风险角度评估《反外国制裁法》对外国主体和企业的影响。
summary.en: A MERICS analysis assessing the AFSL as a counter-sanctions, blocking, and extraterritorial legal instrument with implications for foreign actors and companies.

title.zh: 中华人民共和国反外国制裁法
title.en: Anti-Foreign Sanctions Law of the People's Republic of China

summary.en: The Anti-Foreign Sanctions Law establishes the legal basis for countermeasures, countermeasure lists, and remedies against discriminatory restrictive measures imposed by foreign states.

title.zh: 中华人民共和国数据安全法
title.en: Data Security Law of the People's Republic of China

summary.zh: 《数据安全法》确立数据分类分级保护、重要数据出境安全管理和数据处理活动域外责任，是数字法治基础法律。
summary.en: The Data Security Law establishes classified data protection, important data export controls, and liability for certain data processing activities outside China.

summary.en: Adopted in 2021, the law provides the legal framework for Hainan Free Trade Port, including trade and investment liberalization, cross-border capital flows, mobility, transport, and data flows.

authority.zh: 全国人大常委会 / 海南省商务厅

summary.en: The Customs Law provides the framework for customs supervision of inbound and outbound conveyances, goods, articles, duty collection, anti-smuggling, and customs statistics.

summary.en: A 2021 white paper on China’s foreign aid, South-South cooperation, Belt and Road cooperation, and implementation of the UN 2030 Agenda.

authority.zh: 国务院新闻办公室 / 中国政府网

summary.en: MOFCOM Order No. 1 of 2021 creates reporting, assessment, prohibition order, exemption, and compensation mechanisms against unjustified extraterritorial measures.

authority.zh: 商务部 / 中国政府网

title.zh: 保守的创新：中国国际商事法庭的模糊性
title.en: Conservative Innovation: The Ambiguities of the China International Commercial Court

summary.zh: AJIL Unbound 开放获取文章，将中国国际商事法庭概括为“保守创新”，重点分析其一站式机制、管辖限制和跨境执行问题。
summary.en: This open-access AJIL Unbound essay frames the CICC as conservative innovation and examines its one-stop design, jurisdictional limits, and transnational enforcement issues.

title.zh: 中华人民共和国技术进出口管理条例

summary.en: The regulation governs technology import and export contracts, licensing for restricted technologies, and registration mechanisms relevant to cross-border technology transactions and IP licensing.

title.zh: 区域全面经济伙伴关系协定（RCEP）文本
title.en: Regional Comprehensive Economic Partnership Agreement (RCEP)

summary.zh: RCEP于2022年1月1日对中国生效，是亚太区域重要自贸协定，涵盖货物贸易、原产地规则、海关程序、服务贸易、投资、知识产权、电子商务和争端解决。

authority.zh: 商务部中国自由贸易区服务网
authority.en: MOFCOM China FTA Service Network / RCEP parties

title.zh: 中华人民共和国著作权法

summary.en: The Copyright Law is relevant to digital content circulation, cross-border licensing, platform responsibility, and implementation of international IP treaties.

summary.en: A MERICS brief analyzing China’s first unified export control law, extraterritorial compliance risks, and the U.S.-China-EU technology competition context.

title.zh: 中华人民共和国出口管制法

summary.zh: 《出口管制法》确立出口管制政策、管制清单、临时管制、许可管理、最终用户和最终用途管理等基础制度。
summary.en: The Export Control Law establishes China's basic export control framework, including policies, control lists, temporary controls, licensing, and end-user and end-use management.

authority.en: National People's Congress / The State Council of China

title.zh: 中华人民共和国专利法
title.en: Patent Law of the PRC

summary.zh: 专利法是涉外知识产权保护、技术贸易、跨境许可、标准必要专利和企业出海知识产权布局研究的核心法律。
summary.en: The Patent Law is central to foreign-related IP protection, technology trade, cross-border licensing, standard-essential patents, and outbound enterprise IP strategy.

authority.en: National People’s Congress / National Laws and Regulations Database

summary.en: A Brookings report reviewing China’s engagement with international law across issue areas and analyzing how China uses and shapes legal norms.

title.zh: 不可靠实体清单规定

summary.en: MOFCOM Order No. 4 of 2020 establishes the Unreliable Entity List system for foreign entities harming China's sovereignty, security, development interests, or Chinese parties' lawful rights.

title.zh: 中国式国际商事争端解决路径：中国国际商事法庭

summary.zh: 《The Chinese Journal of Comparative Law》论文，从内部视角介绍中国国际商事法庭、一站式机制、专家委员会和制度改进方向。
summary.en: An insider article in The Chinese Journal of Comparative Law on the CICC, its one-stop mechanism, expert committee, and recommendations for improvement.

authority.en: The Chinese Journal of Comparative Law / Oxford Academic

summary.en: The Civil Code’s contract, property, personality-rights, and tort rules provide key domestic-law foundations for foreign-related civil and commercial disputes.

title.zh: 中国国际商事法庭：背景、障碍与未来路径
title.en: China’s International Commercial Court: Background, Obstacles and the Road Ahead

summary.zh: 《Journal of International Dispute Settlement》论文比较中国国际商事法庭与其他国际商事法院，分析管辖、国际化和判决承认执行问题。
summary.en: This Journal of International Dispute Settlement article compares the CICC with other international commercial courts and analyzes jurisdiction, internationalization, and enforcement challenges.

authority.zh: Journal of International Dispute Settlement / Oxford Academic
authority.en: Journal of International Dispute Settlement / Oxford Academic

title.zh: 中华人民共和国证券法
title.en: Securities Law of the PRC

summary.en: The Cryptography Law addresses commercial cryptography, import licensing, export control, and information security, making it relevant to cross-border data, technology trade, and security compliance.

title.zh: 中国国际商事法庭的挑战与机遇
title.en: Challenges and Opportunities for the China International Commercial Court

summary.en: An International & Comparative Law Quarterly article analyzing the CICC framework, challenges for overseas parties, and reform opportunities from a comparative perspective.

authority.zh: 海牙国际私法会议 / 中国国际商事法庭

summary.en: The Trademark Law concerns registration, protection, infringement remedies, and international brand strategy, supporting cross-border trade, platform governance, and overseas interest protection.

authority.zh: 全国人大 / 国家法律法规数据库

authority.zh: 全国人大 / 中国政府网
authority.en: National People's Congress / The State Council of China

title.zh: 中华人民共和国条约数据库
title.en: Treaty Database of the People's Republic of China

summary.zh: 外交部条约数据库向公众开放，收录中国对外缔结的重要双边、多边条约，可查询条约信息并下载文本。
summary.en: The Ministry of Foreign Affairs treaty database provides public access to important bilateral and multilateral treaties concluded or acceded to by China.

authority.zh: 中华人民共和国外交部
authority.en: Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the People's Republic of China

title.zh: 中华人民共和国国际刑事司法协助法
title.en: Law of the PRC on International Criminal Judicial Assistance

summary.zh: 该法规定中国与外国在刑事案件调查、侦查、起诉、审判和执行等活动中的司法协助程序，是跨境执法、证据和资产追缴合作的重要法律依据。
summary.en: This law governs international criminal judicial assistance in investigation, prosecution, trial, enforcement, evidence, asset freezing, confiscation, return of proceeds, and transfer of sentenced persons.

title.zh: 中华人民共和国电子商务法
title.en: Electronic Commerce Law of the PRC

summary.zh: 电子商务法规定平台经营者责任、电子商务合同、争议解决和跨境电子商务监管协同，是数字贸易、平台合规和消费者保护的重要依据。
summary.en: The E-Commerce Law governs platform responsibilities, online contracts, dispute resolution, and cross-border e-commerce regulatory coordination, supporting digital trade and platform compliance research.

title.zh: 《中国与世界贸易组织》白皮书
title.en: China and the World Trade Organization

summary.zh: 国新办2018年白皮书回顾中国加入WTO后的履约、开放和参与多边贸易体制情况，是研究制度型开放、WTO规则与涉外经贸法治的重要政策材料。
summary.en: A 2018 SCIO white paper on China’s WTO accession commitments, domestic reforms, market opening, and participation in the multilateral trading system.

authority.zh: 国务院新闻办公室 / 中国政府网

title.zh: 中国国际商事法庭简介
title.en: A Brief Introduction of China International Commercial Court

summary.zh: 中国国际商事法庭由最高人民法院设立，负责审理国际商事案件，并建设诉讼、调解、仲裁衔接的“一站式”争端解决机制。
summary.en: The China International Commercial Court, established by the Supreme People's Court, adjudicates international commercial cases and supports a one-stop dispute resolution mechanism.

authority.zh: 最高人民法院国际商事法庭

title.zh: 海牙《选择法院协议公约》与中国签署状态
title.en: HCCH 2005 Choice of Court Convention: China Status

summary.zh: HCCH中国成员资料和公约状态表显示中国签署《选择法院协议公约》的状态；该公约与国际商事管辖协议和外国判决流通密切相关。
summary.en: HCCH status materials record China’s signature status for the 2005 Choice of Court Convention, relevant to exclusive choice-of-court agreements and circulation of judgments.

authority.en: Hague Conference on Private International Law (HCCH)

title.zh: WTO《贸易便利化协定》
title.en: WTO Agreement on Trade Facilitation

summary.zh: WTO《贸易便利化协定》2017年生效，围绕通关透明度、手续简化、合作机制和发展中国家实施安排，是研究中国海关法治和多边贸易规则的重要文本。
summary.en: The WTO Trade Facilitation Agreement entered into force in 2017 and addresses customs transparency, simplification, cooperation mechanisms, and implementation arrangements for developing members.

title.zh: 《巴黎协定》与中国批准状态
title.en: Paris Agreement: China Ratification Status

summary.zh: UNFCCC中国页面列明中国签署和批准《巴黎协定》的日期，是研究气候治理、绿色发展和国际环境法义务的权威入口。
summary.en: UNFCCC’s China page records China’s signature and ratification of the Paris Agreement and provides an official entry point for climate governance research.

authority.zh: 联合国气候变化框架公约秘书处

title.zh: 中华人民共和国涉外民事关系法律适用法
title.en: Law on the Law Applicable to Foreign-Related Civil Relations

summary.zh: 该法规定涉外民事关系的法律适用规则，是冲突法、域外法查明、国际商事争议解决和涉外民商事审判的基础法律。
summary.en: This law sets conflict-of-law rules for foreign-related civil relations and is a foundational text for foreign law ascertainment, private international law, and cross-border civil and commercial disputes.

authority.zh: 全国人大 / 最高人民法院英文网
authority.en: National People's Congress / Supreme People's Court English

title.zh: 开普敦公约：中国状态与声明
title.en: Cape Town Convention: China Status and Declarations

summary.zh: UNIDROIT状态表显示中国签署并批准《移动设备国际利益公约》，2009年6月1日对中国生效，是航空器融资、租赁和担保交易的重要统一法工具。
summary.en: UNIDROIT records China as a party to the Cape Town Convention, in force for China from June 1, 2009, with declarations relevant to aircraft finance, leasing, and secured transactions.

title.zh: 中国与世界贸易组织成员资料
title.en: China's WTO member profile

summary.zh: 中国于2001年12月11日成为世界贸易组织成员。WTO成员资料页汇集中国参与多边贸易体制、争端、审议和官方文件的入口。
summary.en: China has been a WTO member since December 11, 2001. The WTO member profile centralizes official documents, disputes, reviews, and trade data.

authority.zh: 中国政府网 / 世界贸易组织
authority.en: The State Council of China / World Trade Organization

title.zh: 中华人民共和国海事诉讼特别程序法
title.en: Special Maritime Procedure Law of the People’s Republic of China

summary.zh: 海事诉讼特别程序法规定海事法院管辖、海事请求保全、船舶扣押与拍卖、海事强制令、海事证据保全等程序，是涉外海事纠纷解决核心程序法。
summary.en: The law sets special procedures for maritime jurisdiction, preservation of maritime claims, arrest and auction of ships, maritime injunctions, evidence preservation, and related proceedings.

title.zh: 海牙取证公约：中国状态表
title.en: HCCH Evidence Convention: China Status Table

summary.zh: 海牙取证公约为涉外民商事案件境外取证提供合作机制。HCCH状态表显示中国1997年加入，1998年生效，并列明声明、保留和机关信息。
summary.en: The HCCH Evidence Convention supports taking evidence abroad in civil or commercial matters. The HCCH status table records China’s accession, entry into force, declarations, reservations, and authorities.

authority.en: Hague Conference on Private International Law (HCCH)

title.zh: 海牙送达公约与取证公约在中国的适用入口
title.en: HCCH Service and Evidence Conventions: China entry point

summary.zh: 海牙送达公约和取证公约是涉外民商事司法协助的核心机制，中国司法部为相关中央机关，适合跟踪送达、取证和法院合作。
summary.en: The HCCH Service and Evidence Conventions are core mechanisms for civil and commercial judicial assistance involving China, with the Ministry of Justice serving as central authority.

authority.zh: 司法部 / 海牙国际私法会议

title.zh: 《联合国海洋法公约》与中国参加状态
title.en: United Nations Convention on the Law of the Sea: China Status

summary.zh: 联合国海洋事务和海洋法司维护《联合国海洋法公约》及相关协定参加状态，是研究中国海洋权益、海事法和国际海洋秩序的基础入口。
summary.en: The UN Division for Ocean Affairs and the Law of the Sea maintains the status of UNCLOS and related agreements, a core source for China’s law-of-the-sea research.

authority.zh: 联合国海洋事务和海洋法司
authority.en: UN Division for Ocean Affairs and the Law of the Sea

title.zh: 中华人民共和国仲裁法
title.en: Arbitration Law of the People’s Republic of China

summary.zh: 仲裁法规定仲裁协议、仲裁委员会、仲裁程序、裁决撤销和涉外仲裁特别规定，是涉外商事争议解决研究的基础法律。
summary.en: The Arbitration Law governs arbitration agreements, commissions, proceedings, setting aside awards, enforcement, and special provisions for foreign-related arbitration.

title.zh: 《专利合作条约》（PCT）与中国
title.en: Patent Cooperation Treaty (PCT) and China

summary.zh: WIPO中国办公室页面介绍中国加入PCT及其作为PCT体系重要使用者的情况，是研究中国企业海外专利布局和知识产权国际化的入口。
summary.en: WIPO’s China office page introduces China’s participation in the PCT system and its role as a major user, useful for research on outbound patent strategy and IP internationalization.

title.zh: 《解决国家与他国国民间投资争端公约》与中国
title.en: ICSID Convention and China

summary.zh: 中国于1993年成为ICSID公约缔约国，并就可提交中心管辖的争端范围作出通知，是投资争端解决和投资条约研究的基础入口。
summary.en: The ICSID Convention entered into force for China in 1993. China's notifications are a key reference for investor-state dispute settlement research.

authority.zh: 外交部条约数据库 / ICSID

title.zh: 中华人民共和国海商法
title.en: Maritime Code of the People’s Republic of China

summary.zh: 海商法规定船舶、海上运输合同、海事赔偿责任限制、共同海损和涉外海事法律适用等制度，是国际航运和海事审判的重要法律基础。
summary.en: The Maritime Code governs vessels, maritime transport contracts, limitation of liability, general average, and foreign-related maritime legal issues.

title.zh: 中华人民共和国领海及毗连区法
title.en: Law on the Territorial Sea and the Contiguous Zone

summary.zh: 该法规定中国领海、毗连区、无害通过和海上权益维护等制度，是海洋法、主权安全与国际法研究的重要国内法资料。
summary.en: This law addresses China’s territorial sea, contiguous zone, innocent passage, and maritime rights protection, making it a key domestic source for law-of-the-sea research.

title.zh: 海牙送达公约：中国状态表
title.en: HCCH Service Convention: China Status Table

summary.zh: 海牙送达公约是涉外民商事司法文书送达的核心国际私法工具。HCCH状态表显示中国1991年加入，1992年生效，并列明声明和主管机关信息。
summary.en: The HCCH Service Convention is a core instrument for service abroad in civil or commercial matters. The HCCH status table records China’s accession, entry into force, declarations, and authorities.

authority.en: Hague Conference on Private International Law (HCCH)

title.zh: 商标国际注册马德里体系与中国
title.en: Madrid System for Trademarks and China

summary.zh: WIPO中国办公室介绍中国加入马德里商标国际注册体系及作为指定成员和原属局的情况，是研究商标国际保护和企业出海品牌合规的资料入口。
summary.en: WIPO’s China office page explains China’s participation in the Madrid System, relevant to international trademark protection and outbound brand compliance.

title.zh: 《联合国国际货物销售合同公约》与中国
title.en: United Nations Convention on Contracts for the International Sale of Goods and China

summary.zh: CISG是国际货物买卖合同的核心统一法公约，自1988年1月1日生效以来长期影响中国涉外商事审判和仲裁实践。
summary.en: The CISG is a core uniform law instrument for international sales contracts and has long shaped Chinese foreign-related commercial adjudication and arbitration practice.

authority.zh: 联合国 / 联合国贸法会

title.zh: 海牙国际私法会议：中国成员资料
title.en: HCCH China Member Profile

summary.zh: HCCH中国成员资料列明中国与海牙国际私法会议的联系机关及相关公约信息，是跟踪国际私法公约、司法协助和判决流通机制的基础入口。
summary.en: The HCCH China member profile lists contact organs and convention-related information, serving as a gateway for private international law conventions and judicial cooperation mechanisms.

authority.en: Hague Conference on Private International Law (HCCH)

title.zh: 《承认及执行外国仲裁裁决公约》与中国
title.en: New York Convention on Foreign Arbitral Awards and China

summary.zh: 中国于1987年加入《纽约公约》，该公约是外国仲裁裁决承认与执行的核心国际条约，也是国际商事仲裁研究的基础资料。
summary.en: China acceded to the New York Convention in 1987. The Convention is the core treaty for recognition and enforcement of foreign arbitral awards.

authority.zh: 最高人民法院国际商事法庭 / 联合国贸法会

title.zh: 国际法在维护国家利益中的实践运用（讲座稿）
title.en: The Practice of International Law in Safeguarding National Interests

summary.zh: 黄惠康在山东大学法学院公开讲座中提出，以国际法为核心处理国际热点争端是国家维护利益的重要路径，强调大国外交必须重法治，反对把‘规则’口号政治化。
summary.en: In a public lecture, Huang Huikang argued that legal argumentation in international disputes has become central to protecting national interests, and stressed that major-power diplomacy must be law-centered while resisting politicization of legal rules.

title.zh: 《对外关系法（草案）》的立法逻辑：守正与创新
title.en: Legislative Logic of the Draft Law on Foreign Relations: Orthodoxy and Innovation

summary.zh: 南京大学法学院发布的学术讲座实录梳理了黄惠康对《对外关系法（草案）》系统设计与“应运而生的时代背景”的讨论，强调建立贯通立法、政策与执法的统一法律支撑。
summary.en: This lecture review from Nanjing University records Huang Huikang’s analysis of the draft Law on Foreign Relations, highlighting integrated design across legal levels and the need to connect legislation, policy, and enforcement.

title.zh: 始终坚持国际法基本原则
title.en: Firmly Upholding the Basic Principles of International Law

summary.zh: 黄进围绕主权平等、不干涉内政、和平解决争端等国际法基本原则展开论述，并强调中国应在联合国体系框架下推动国际秩序更公正合理。
summary.en: Huang Jin discusses core international-law principles such as sovereign equality, non-interference, and peaceful settlement, arguing for a more just global order rooted in the UN Charter and international legality.

title.zh: 论加强涉外法治体系建设
title.en: On Strengthening the Foreign-Related Rule-of-Law System

summary.zh: 该发言从统筹国内法治与涉外法治、加强立法、执法与司法三个维度系统阐述，提出法域外适用、反制“长臂管辖”等重点议题对完善涉外法治体系的作用。
summary.en: The address presents an integrated framework for foreign-related rule-of-law building through coordinated legislation, enforcement, and adjudication, including rules for extraterritorial application and countering abusive long-arm jurisdiction.

authority.zh: 中国法学会 / 武汉大学

title.zh: 践行真正的多边主义，构建以国际法为基础的国际秩序
title.en: Practising Genuine Multilateralism and Building an International Order Rooted in International Law

summary.zh: 黄进在东湖国际法律论坛开幕致辞中，强调“真正多边主义”与“以国际法为基础的国际秩序”必须并行，反对选择性多边主义并主张提升发展中国家在国际规则中的代表性。
summary.en: In his keynote, Huang Jin argued that genuine multilateralism must be coupled with international law and equal participation by all states, rather than selective legal-imposition by powerful countries.

authority.zh: 中国法学会 / 中国国际法学会
authority.en: China Law Society / Chinese Association of International Law

title.zh: 未来科技发展对国际法和国际法治的挑战
title.en: Challenges of Emerging Technologies for International Law and Rule of Law

summary.zh: 该致辞梳理科技变革与国际法的互动逻辑，讨论从人工智能、区块链到大数据时代，国际法需要在规则制定、治理治理和跨境风险管理上加快体系更新。
summary.en: The keynote links rapid technology change with international-law development, highlighting the need for timely legal governance in areas such as AI, blockchain, and cross-border data in the new technological order.

title.zh: 琉球的领土地位与自决权
title.en: Territorial Status and Right to Self-Determination of the Ryukyu Islands

summary.zh: 罗欢欣在《中华海洋法学评论》发表了关于琉球群岛领土地位与自决议题的分析，聚焦历史法理基础与国际法规则之间的衔接。
summary.en: Ruo Huanxin’s article analyzes the legal status of the Ryukyu Islands and self-determination claims through historical context and international legal criteria.

authority.zh: 中国社会科学院国际法研究所

title.zh: 国家在国际造法进程中的角色与功能——以国际海洋法形成与运行为例
title.en: State Roles in International Law-Making: Lessons from the Development and Application of the Law of the Sea

summary.zh: 该文聚焦国家在国际法规范形成中的制度角色与实践功能，结合海洋法规则演进讨论制度塑造、规则解释与落实中权力配置与程序设计。
summary.en: The paper examines how states participate in international law-making, using the development and implementation of the law of the sea to discuss norm design, interpretation, and institutional enforcement.

authority.zh: 中国社会科学院国际法研究所

title.zh: 南海争端中的语言解释问题
title.en: Language Challenges in the South China Sea Dispute

summary.zh: 该英文专栏文章讨论南海争端中的语义解释与叙事建构问题，强调精确用语对规则适用和争端治理具有制度意义。
summary.en: This English-language commentary analyzes how legal language and narrative framing in South China Sea disputes affect interpretation, implementation, and regime-level governance.

authority.zh: 中国社会科学院国际法研究所

title.zh: 从时际法原则解析先占取得岛屿行为的效力
title.en: Temporal Legal Principles and Occupation-Based Acquisition of Islands

summary.zh: 论文从先占理论与时际法关系切入，讨论岛礁形成与效力认定机制及其在海洋法争端中的适用问题。
summary.en: This article approaches island-status disputes through historical acts of occupation and temporal legal principles, analyzing how legal effects should be assessed under maritime law.

authority.zh: 中国社会科学院大学法学院（马金星）
authority.en: CASS University School of Law (Ma Jinxing)

title.zh: 论海洋法公约中的强制性争端解决机制与中国应对
title.en: Compulsory Dispute Settlement in the Law of the Sea and China's Response

summary.zh: 文章以中菲南海仲裁为样本，分析《海洋法公约》强制性争端解决框架下，中国在海洋司法和证据提出中的制度回应。
summary.en: Using the China–Philippines arbitration as context, the article discusses China’s procedural and legal response to dispute settlement mechanisms under UNCLOS.

authority.zh: 中国社会科学院大学法学院（马金星）
authority.en: CASS University School of Law (Ma Jinxing)

title.zh: 南海航行安全中国家管辖权的冲突与协调
title.en: Conflicts and Coordination of Coastal-State Jurisdiction over Safety of Navigation in the South China Sea

summary.zh: 该研究聚焦航行安全规则中的国家管辖权冲突，在海上强制执行与航行安全平衡之间探索制度协调路径。
summary.en: This study focuses on conflicts of coastal-state jurisdiction in navigation safety and seeks legal coordination mechanisms between enforcement and safe passage objectives in contested waters.

authority.zh: 中国社会科学院大学法学院（马金星）
authority.en: CASS University School of Law (Ma Jinxing)

title.zh: 海上使用武力的限制：一项环境保护视角
title.en: Restrictions on the Use of Force at Sea: An Environmental Protection Perspective

summary.zh: 文章讨论海上武力使用的边界及其环境后果，强调在海事事件中将环境治理目标与武力合法性审查联动。
summary.en: Examining use of force at sea and environmental protection, this article links maritime security enforcement to environmental governance and legitimacy constraints.

authority.zh: 中国社会科学院大学法学院（马金星）
authority.en: CASS University School of Law (Ma Jinxing)

title.zh: 美国经贸单边主义:形式、动因与法律应对
title.en: US Unilateral Trade Measures: Forms, Drivers, and Legal Responses

summary.zh: 孙南翔梳理美国经贸单边主义的制度逻辑及利益导向，讨论我国在WTO体系下的政策法律对策。
summary.en: Sun Nanxiang analyzes patterns and incentives behind U.S. unilateral trade actions and suggests legal responses within WTO-based multilateral frameworks.

authority.zh: 中国社会科学院大学法学院（孙南翔）
authority.en: CASS University School of Law (Sun Nanxiang)

title.zh: 论作为消费者的数据主体及其数据保护机制
title.en: Consumers as Data Subjects and Data-Protection Mechanisms

summary.zh: 论文讨论消费者在数字时代的数据主体地位与保护机制，对跨境数据治理中的权利确认和合规义务提供了制度思路。
summary.en: The article discusses the status of consumers as data subjects and associated protection mechanisms, offering a framework for cross-border data governance and compliance duties.

authority.zh: 中国社会科学院大学法学院（孙南翔）
authority.en: CASS University School of Law (Sun Nanxiang)

title.zh: DSU仲裁体系与上诉机构改革：可行的过渡路径
title.en: DSU Appeal Arbitration and WTO Appellate Reform: A Viable Transitional Path

summary.zh: 李晓玲在《Global Trade and Customs Journal》讨论在上诉机构改革背景下，通过DSU第25条仲裁实现争端解决连续性与制度稳定性的可能性。
summary.en: Li Xiaoling discusses how DSU appeal arbitration can preserve continuity in WTO dispute settlement when the Appellate Body is in transition.

authority.zh: 中国社会科学院大学法学院（李晓玲）
authority.en: CASS University School of Law (Li Xiaoling)

title.zh: 世贸组织上诉机构改革的谈判进程与岔路口选择
title.en: Negotiation Pathways and Dilemmas in WTO Appellate Reform

summary.zh: 文中梳理世贸组织上诉机制改革中的议程分歧、制度博弈和我国可行的制度化回应。
summary.en: The article maps negotiation deadlocks and strategic choices in WTO appellate reform, and explores practical responses from China’s perspective.

authority.zh: 中国社会科学院大学法学院（李晓玲）
authority.en: CASS University School of Law (Li Xiaoling)

title.zh: WTO安全例外条款：实践演进、路径选择与中国因应
title.en: WTO Security Exceptions: Evolution, Options, and China’s Response

summary.zh: 文章追踪自1947年GATT以来安全例外条款适用演变，评估可裁判性与非违反之诉机制在约束单边措施中的作用。
summary.en: The article traces WTO security exception practice since GATT and evaluates justiciability as well as non-violation remedies for constraining unilateral security-based measures.

authority.zh: 中国社会科学院大学法学院（李晓玲）
authority.en: CASS University School of Law (Li Xiaoling)

title.zh: WTO反倾销法中的公共利益问题考量
title.en: Public Interest Considerations in WTO Anti-Dumping Law

summary.zh: 蒋小红讨论反倾销审议中公共利益标准的介入问题，评估公共利益与贸易救济规则的衔接与风险。
summary.en: Jiang Xiaohong examines how public-interest considerations can be integrated into anti-dumping adjudication and what doctrinal risks and constraints follow from this integration.

authority.zh: 中国社会科学院大学法学院（蒋小红）
authority.en: CASS University School of Law (Jiang Xiaohong)

title.zh: WTO法典文本入口
title.en: WTO Legal Texts Index

summary.zh: WTO《法典文本》入口集中展示多边贸易体系的核心协定、补充协议和相关法律文本，适合快速查找贸易救济、知识产权、服务贸易、投资措施等制度原文。
summary.en: WTO's legal-texts index brings together core multilateral agreements and related texts of the WTO system, including core trade remedies, intellectual property, services, and investment instruments.

title.zh: GATT 1994条款文本
title.en: GATT 1994 Text

summary.zh: 该文本收录了《GATT 1994》相关条款，是理解货物贸易、关税法治、国民待遇与最惠国待遇制度边界的重要基础材料。
summary.en: This entry contains the text of GATT 1994 and provides baseline reference for goods trade disciplines, MFN and national treatment principles in WTO law.

title.zh: WTO反倾销协议
title.en: WTO Agreement on Anti-dumping

summary.zh: 反倾销协议规定了反倾销税启动要件、认定程序和调查标准，是涉外贸易合规与争端应对的核心文本之一。
summary.en: The Anti-dumping Agreement sets investigation standards, dumping determination framework, and remedies discipline for anti-dumping actions.

title.zh: WTO保障措施协议
title.en: WTO Safeguards Agreement

summary.zh: 保障措施协议界定突发进口冲击下成员在特定条件下可采取的临时贸易救济制度，并明确通知与审查程序。
summary.en: The Safeguards Agreement governs emergency trade-restrictive measures for surges of imports and sets the related notification and review requirements.

title.zh: WTO补贴及反补贴措施协议
title.en: WTO Agreement on Subsidies and Countervailing Measures

summary.zh: SCM协议区分禁止性补贴和可起诉补贴，规定补贴可得性审查和反补贴程序，是外贸投资合规中的高频制度之一。
summary.en: The SCM Agreement classifies prohibited and actionable subsidies, and sets investigation and enforcement procedures for countervailing measures.

title.zh: WTO技术性贸易壁垒协议
title.en: WTO Agreement on Technical Barriers to Trade

summary.zh: 技术性贸易壁垒协议规范技术法规、标准和合格评定程序，兼顾技术合规和跨境贸易便利化的平衡。
summary.en: The TBT Agreement regulates technical regulations, standards and conformity assessment procedures to balance legitimate technical objectives with trade openness.

title.zh: WTO卫生与植物卫生措施协议
title.en: WTO Agreement on the Application of Sanitary and Phytosanitary Measures

summary.zh: SPS协议围绕食品安全、动植物卫生与检疫等议题，要求依据科学原则并避免对贸易造成不当歧视。
summary.en: The SPS Agreement sets science-based requirements for food and animal/plant safety measures while preventing arbitrary and unjustifiable discrimination in trade.

title.zh: WTO投资相关措施协议
title.en: WTO Agreement on Trade-Related Investment Measures (TRIMs)

summary.zh: TRIMs协议禁止违反国民待遇与数量限制原则的特定投资措施，直接关联外资市场准入制度的合规边界。
summary.en: The TRIMs Agreement limits investment measures that are inconsistent with MFN, national treatment, and quantitative restrictions disciplines.

title.zh: TRIPS协议（经2005修正）
title.en: TRIPS Agreement (As Amended by the 2005 Protocol)

summary.zh: TRIPS协定将知识产权制度纳入WTO规则体系，规定专利、版权、商标等最低保护和执行义务，关系企业涉外知识产权布局与合规。
summary.en: The TRIPS Agreement integrates key intellectual property standards into WTO law and sets minimum protection and enforcement obligations.

title.zh: WTO服务贸易总协定
title.en: WTO General Agreement on Trade in Services (GATS)

summary.zh: GATS建立服务贸易市场准入、最惠国待遇和国民待遇框架，为数字服务、金融和专业服务等高频涉外业务提供制度底座。
summary.en: GATS provides the framework for service market access, MFN, and national treatment disciplines across major service sectors.

title.zh: WTO货物贸易估值规则（关税估值）
title.en: WTO Customs Valuation Provisions (Article VII)

summary.zh: 该文本规范货物关税估值基本原则，减少任意估值导致的贸易争议，是涉外海关合规和反倾销审查中常见参数来源。
summary.en: The customs valuation text provides uniform valuation principles for customs duties and trade remedies, limiting arbitrary valuation in import administration.

title.zh: 经合组织跨税收管辖模型税约：2017
title.en: OECD Model Tax Convention 2017 (Income and Capital)

summary.zh: OECD税收模型条约为双边税收协定提供统一框架示范条款，企业涉外税务规划和反避税安排中常被引用。
summary.en: The OECD Model Tax Convention (2017) provides a benchmark framework for bilateral tax treaties and is frequently referenced in cross-border tax planning.

authority.en: Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development (OECD)

title.zh: UNCTAD投资法文本数据库（中国）
title.en: UNCTAD Investment Laws Database (China)

summary.zh: UNCTAD投资法数据库汇集中国《外国投资法》等投资法规，便于比对制度文本版本与条款结构。
summary.en: UNCTAD's investment laws database curates Chinese foreign investment laws and related enactments for cross-jurisdiction comparison.

authority.zh: 联合国贸易与发展会议（UNCTAD）
authority.en: United Nations Conference on Trade and Development (UNCTAD)

title.zh: UNCTAD双边投资协定导航（中国）
title.en: UNCTAD International Investment Agreements Hub (China)

summary.zh: 该页面提供中国BIT与投资条款协定列表与链接，支持快速确认条约状态与签署、进入生效信息。
summary.en: This entry links China-related IIAs and investment treaty texts, useful for checking treaty status and signature and entry into force data.

authority.zh: 联合国贸易与发展会议（UNCTAD）
authority.en: United Nations Conference on Trade and Development (UNCTAD)

title.zh: UNCITRAL商事仲裁示范法（含2006年修正）
title.en: UNCITRAL Model Law on International Commercial Arbitration (with 2006 amendments)

summary.zh: UNCITRAL商事仲裁示范法是跨境商事争议实务中最关键的仲裁程序文本之一，涵盖仲裁协议、生效、程序管辖及裁决承认。
summary.en: The Model Law on International Commercial Arbitration provides a core procedural framework for cross-border arbitration in commercial disputes.

authority.zh: 联合国国际贸易法委员会（UNCITRAL）
authority.en: United Nations Commission on International Trade Law (UNCITRAL)

title.zh: UNCITRAL国际商事调解示范法（2018）
title.en: UNCITRAL Model Law on International Commercial Mediation (2018)

summary.zh: 该示范法标准化国际商事调解程序，包括协议订立、调解人行为、保密、协议可执行性等条款，支持跨境纠纷友好解决。
summary.en: The 2018 UNCITRAL model law standardizes commercial mediation frameworks, including mediator duties, confidentiality, and enforceability of settlement outcomes.

authority.zh: 联合国国际贸易法委员会（UNCITRAL）
authority.en: United Nations Commission on International Trade Law (UNCITRAL)

title.zh: UNCITRAL电子商务示范法（1996）
title.en: UNCITRAL Model Law on Electronic Commerce

summary.zh: UNCITRAL电子商务示范法确立电子数据与电子文件与纸质文件同等法律效力，是数字贸易与电子交易法治化的重要起点。
summary.en: The UNCITRAL Model Law on Electronic Commerce provides legal recognition of electronic data and records on parity with paper documents.

authority.zh: 联合国国际贸易法委员会（UNCITRAL）
authority.en: United Nations Commission on International Trade Law (UNCITRAL)

title.zh: 《海牙儿童虐待/跨境儿童抚养纠纷公约》（1980）
title.en: Convention on the Civil Aspects of International Child Abduction (1980)

summary.zh: 1980年海牙儿童虐待并非字面用词，但该公约是涉外家庭与民事关系中的重要跨境返还与探视机制文件，涉及儿童移送、管辖协调与执行协作。
summary.en: The 1980 Convention governs prompt return and access arrangements in cross-border child abduction cases, including cooperation between central authorities.

authority.en: Hague Conference on Private International Law

title.zh: 《外国投资法实施条例》
title.en: Regulations on Implementing the Law on Foreign Investment

summary.zh: 国务院《外国投资法实施条例》细化外商投资法的投资者权益、登记、股权结构和执法接口安排，是企业与合规实务中的关键衔接法。
summary.en: The State Council regulations implementing the Foreign Investment Law detail investor rights, registration, equity structure, and enforcement interface.

title.zh: 外商投资信息报备与登记制度（司法解释）
title.en: Judicial Interpretation on Foreign Investment Reporting

summary.zh: 最高人民法院围绕《外国投资法》实施的司法解释强调争议处理中的权利救济与程序衔接，帮助厘清外商投资纠纷中的诉讼路径。
summary.en: Judicial guidance linked to the Foreign Investment Law clarifies remedy channels and procedural alignment for investor-related disputes.

title.zh: 全国外商投资准入特别管理措施（负面清单）2024版
title.en: National Special Management Measures for Foreign Investment Access (Negative List) 2024 Version

summary.zh: 2024年版全国外资准入负面清单由国家发展改革委与商务部发布，界定外商投资准入限制并随新版本持续优化市场准入。
summary.en: The 2024 National Foreign Investment Access Negative List defines remaining sectoral restrictions and reflects continued liberalization in market entry.

authority.zh: 国家发展改革委 / 商务部

title.zh: WTO《农业协定》
title.en: WTO Agreement on Agriculture

summary.zh: 该协定收录于乌拉圭回合成果，建立了农业市场准入、国内支持和出口补贴规则，是涉农贸易争端中的核心规则框架之一。
summary.en: A core WTO agriculture rulebook covering market access, domestic support, and export competition disciplines; it remains a key benchmark in agricultural trade disputes.

title.zh: WTO《进口许可程序协定》
title.en: WTO Agreement on Import Licensing Procedures

summary.zh: 该协定约束成员实施进口许可程序的方式，要求行政程序透明、非歧视并避免对贸易造成不必要阻碍。
summary.en: The Agreement disciplines import licensing systems, emphasizing transparency, non-discrimination, and minimizing unnecessary restrictions on trade.

title.zh: WTO《政府采购协定》
title.en: Revised WTO Agreement on Government Procurement

summary.zh: 该协定规定了政府采购活动中的公开、透明和程序性义务，是跨境政府采购市场准入与合规审查的重要法律基础。
summary.en: The revised Agreement on Government Procurement sets procedural obligations for covered procurement and is central to transparency and reciprocity in government purchasing.

title.zh: WTO争端解决机制协定（DSU）
title.en: WTO Understanding on Rules and Procedures Governing the Settlement of Disputes

summary.zh: DSU是WTO争端制度的基础文本，规定了磋商、成立争端小组、上诉与履行程序，是企业和政府应对贸易争端的核心依据。
summary.en: The DSU is the foundational WTO text for consultations, paneling, appeals, and implementation of rulings in trade dispute settlement.

title.zh: UNCITRAL《仲裁规则》（修订版，2010）
title.en: UNCITRAL Arbitration Rules (Revised 2010)

summary.zh: UNCITRAL仲裁规则为国际商业合同仲裁提供程序规则模板，覆盖仲裁协议、仲裁庭组成、证据、临时救济和裁决执行衔接等关键事项。
summary.en: These rules provide a widely used procedural framework for arbitration clauses in commercial relations and are extensively used in ad hoc and institutional arbitrations.

authority.zh: 联合国国际贸易法委员会（UNCITRAL）
authority.en: United Nations Commission on International Trade Law (UNCITRAL)

title.zh: UNCITRAL《投资者—国家仲裁透明度规则》
title.en: UNCITRAL Rules on Transparency in Treaty-based Investor-State Arbitration

summary.zh: 该规则用于提升基于投资条约的投资者—国家仲裁透明度，提供了书面文件、听证与公开披露机制，兼顾程序效率与当事人权利。
summary.en: The rules create mandatory transparency standards for treaty-based investor-state arbitration, including public access and disclosure procedures while balancing due process.

authority.zh: 联合国国际贸易法委员会（UNCITRAL）
authority.en: United Nations Commission on International Trade Law (UNCITRAL)

title.zh: UNCITRAL《加速仲裁规则》（2021）
title.en: UNCITRAL Expedited Arbitration Rules (2021)

summary.zh: 加速仲裁规则强调在当事人同意下缩短仲裁周期和成本，适用于金额或争议相对集中的案件，提供更快的程序化裁决路径。
summary.en: The 2021 Expedited Rules provide a streamlined arbitration option for faster, lower-cost resolution where parties agree to proceed under compressed timelines.

authority.zh: 联合国国际贸易法委员会（UNCITRAL）
authority.en: United Nations Commission on International Trade Law (UNCITRAL)

title.zh: UNIDROIT《国际商事合同通则》（2016）
title.en: UNIDROIT Principles of International Commercial Contracts 2016

summary.zh: UNIDROIT通则为国际商事合同关系提供跨法域的实务规则与一般条款框架，在司法与仲裁中被用于文本解释、补充适用法及风险分配。
summary.en: The UPICC 2016 provides a transnational baseline of general contract-law principles and is frequently used in international commercial contracts, courts, and arbitral tribunals.

authority.zh: 联合国国际贸易法学院际法机构（UNIDROIT）
authority.en: International Institute for the Unification of Private Law (UNIDROIT)

title.zh: UNIDROIT《UPICC示范条款》
title.en: UNIDROIT UPICC Model Clauses

summary.zh: UPICC示范条款提供合同中选择适用UNIDROIT通则的标准文本，在跨国交易中降低法域冲突与解释不确定性。
summary.en: The model clauses provide practical contract language to select and apply UPICC in dispute-related and performance contexts across jurisdictions.

authority.zh: 联合国国际贸易法学院际法机构（UNIDROIT）
authority.en: International Institute for the Unification of Private Law (UNIDROIT)

title.zh: ICSID《仲裁规则》（2006年生效）
title.en: ICSID Arbitration Rules (In force since 2006)

summary.zh: ICSID仲裁规则是投资者—国家争端程序的重要文本，涵盖仲裁庭组建、证据、临时救济、裁决及后审程序衔接。
summary.en: The ICSID Arbitration Rules govern procedural steps in ICSID Convention arbitration, including tribunal constitution, evidence, interim relief, and award processes.

authority.zh: 国际投资争端解决中心（ICSID）
authority.en: International Centre for Settlement of Investment Disputes (ICSID)

title.zh: HCCH《选择法院协议公约》（2005）
title.en: Hague Choice of Court Convention 2005

summary.zh: 该公约强化国际商业中的法院选择协议效力和跨境判决承认执行衔接，提升选择管辖的可预测性和仲裁成本可控性。
summary.en: The 2005 Convention enhances the effectiveness of exclusive choice-of-court clauses and provides a more predictable framework for recognition of judgments across borders.

authority.en: Hague Conference on Private International Law (HCCH)

title.zh: HCCH《2019外国判决承认与执行公约》
title.en: Hague Judgments Convention 2019

summary.zh: 该公约建立民商事判决在成员国间承认与执行的统一规则，降低跨境交易中的执行不确定性。
summary.en: The Convention sets uniform conditions for recognition and enforcement of civil and commercial judgments, improving predictability in cross-border litigation and enforcement.

authority.en: Hague Conference on Private International Law (HCCH)

title.zh: HCCH《国际收养公约》（1993）
title.en: Hague Convention on Protection of Children and Co-operation in Respect of Intercountry Adoption 1993

summary.zh: 该公约通过中央机关协作机制规范跨国收养流程，强调以儿童最大利益为核心，协调各国在合规与承认层面衔接。
summary.en: The 1993 Hague Adoption Convention establishes cooperation through central authorities for intercountry adoption with child-protection safeguards and recognition mechanisms.

authority.en: Hague Conference on Private International Law (HCCH)

title.zh: 经合组织《反对向外国公职人员行贿公约》
title.en: OECD Convention on Combating Bribery of Foreign Public Officials in International Business Transactions

summary.zh: 该公约是首个专门规制跨境商业贿赂外国公职人员的多边法律工具，直接影响涉外反腐合规与企业跨境投资风险治理。
summary.en: The Convention is the first multilateral legal instrument focused on supply-side bribery involving foreign public officials and is a central reference for cross-border anti-corruption compliance.

authority.en: Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development (OECD)

title.zh: OECD《十年BEPS倡议评估》
title.en: OECD: A Decade of the BEPS Initiative (2025)

summary.zh: 该报告梳理了BEPS15项措施十年来在税基侵蚀与利润转移治理中的实施进展，兼顾跨国企业税务合规、数字化与公共财政协作。
summary.en: This OECD report reviews the global BEPS project after ten years, with implementation outcomes on base erosion, profit shifting, and cross-border tax transparency.

authority.en: Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development (OECD)

title.zh: UNCTAD《2025世界投资报告》
title.en: UNCTAD World Investment Report 2025

summary.zh: UNCTAD 2025年《世界投资报告》聚焦数字经济背景下投资促进与数字政府，持续关注跨境投资流动、投资自由化和可持续发展议题。
summary.en: The 2025 World Investment Report examines digitalisation effects on investment facilitation and global capital flows under a rule-of-law-oriented investment governance lens.

authority.zh: 联合国贸易与发展会议（UNCTAD）
authority.en: United Nations Conference on Trade and Development (UNCTAD)

title.zh: UNCTAD《投资政策框架：可持续发展》
title.en: UNCTAD Investment Policy Framework for Sustainable Development (2015)

summary.zh: 该框架文件提出新一代投资政策设计理念，强调可持续发展目标与投资管理之间的政策衔接，可用于研究投资协定和国家投资政策改革。
summary.en: The 2015 framework provides policy design principles for investment reform and aligns investment governance with sustainable development objectives.

authority.zh: 联合国贸易与发展会议（UNCTAD）
authority.en: United Nations Conference on Trade and Development (UNCTAD)

title.zh: WTO《补贴及反补贴措施协定》(SCM)
title.en: WTO Agreement on Subsidies and Countervailing Measures (SCM)

summary.zh: SCM协定是反制出口补贴、禁止性补贴及反补贴措施规则的核心文本，涉及成员间补贴治理、产业竞争秩序与争端处理。
summary.en: The SCM Agreement sets multilateral disciplines on prohibited and actionable subsidies and countervailing measures in trade disputes.

title.zh: WTO《贸易便利化协定》(TFA)
title.en: WTO Agreement on Trade Facilitation (TFA)

summary.zh: TFA通过程序、通关、信息公开、跨部门合作等规则降低贸易成本，并与争端解决程序衔接，提升跨境供应链可预期性。
summary.en: The TFA modernizes customs procedures, transparency, cooperation and facilitation measures to improve trade efficiency and predictability.

title.zh: UNCITRAL《跨境破产示范法》(1997)
title.en: UNCITRAL Model Law on Cross-Border Insolvency (1997)

summary.zh: 该示范法建立跨境破产中的承认、合作与程序衔接机制，为各法域处理境外债务人、资产与程序协调提供基础模板。
summary.en: The MLCBI standardizes mechanisms for recognition, cooperation, and judicial coordination in cross-border insolvency cases.

authority.zh: 联合国国际贸易法委员会（UNCITRAL）
authority.en: United Nations Commission on International Trade Law (UNCITRAL)

title.zh: UNCITRAL《电子签名示范法》(2001)
title.en: UNCITRAL Model Law on Electronic Signatures (2001)

summary.zh: 该示范法补充电子商务环境下的电子签名法律框架，强调技术中立与等效原则，提升跨境签名与电子认证的可执行性。
summary.en: The Model Law on Electronic Signatures supports modern trust and signature systems in electronic transactions through technology-neutral legal standards.

authority.zh: 联合国国际贸易法委员会（UNCITRAL）
authority.en: United Nations Commission on International Trade Law (UNCITRAL)

title.zh: UNCITRAL《电子可转让记录示范法》(2017)
title.en: UNCITRAL Model Law on Electronic Transferable Records (2017)

summary.zh: MLETR把票据、提单等可转让单据的电子形式纳入法定框架，推动物流金融与跨境贸易中的电子化凭证互认。
summary.en: MLETR enables electronic transferable records to function as functional equivalents of paper transferable instruments across borders.

authority.zh: 联合国国际贸易法委员会（UNCITRAL）
authority.en: United Nations Commission on International Trade Law (UNCITRAL)

title.zh: 《国际货物销售合同公约》(CISG)
title.en: United Nations Convention on Contracts for the International Sale of Goods (CISG)

summary.zh: CISG是国际货物销售领域的核心统一法，涵盖合同成立、买卖双方权责与违约救济，为跨境贸易合同解释提供统一基础。
summary.en: The CISG is a central international sales convention that harmonizes rules on formation, obligations and remedies in cross-border sales.

authority.zh: 联合国国际贸易法委员会（UNCITRAL）
authority.en: United Nations Commission on International Trade Law (UNCITRAL)

title.zh: HCCH《海牙认证公约》（Apostille）
title.en: Hague Apostille Convention

summary.zh: 该公约通过简化认证方式实现公共文件在缔约国间的跨境使用，是涉外文书交换与司法协作中的核心证据制度。
summary.en: The Apostille Convention streamlines public document legalization and cross-border acceptance of official documents among member states.

authority.en: Hague Conference on Private International Law (HCCH)

title.zh: HCCH《跨境服务与取证程序公约》（1970）
title.en: Hague Convention on the Taking of Evidence in Civil or Commercial Matters (1970)

summary.zh: 该公约建立跨境民商事取证协作渠道与互助程序，对跨境纠纷证据调取、送达与合规性审查提供基础规则。
summary.en: This convention facilitates cross-border taking of evidence in civil or commercial matters and judicial cooperation.

authority.en: Hague Conference on Private International Law (HCCH)

title.zh: HCCH《国际送达与文书服务公约》（1965）
title.en: Hague Convention on the Service Abroad of Judicial and Extrajudicial Documents in Civil and Commercial Matters (1965)

summary.zh: 该公约为跨境送达诉讼文书建立中央机关通道与标准化程序，提升跨境民商事程序的送达效率与合法性。
summary.en: The convention sets central authority channels and standardized procedures for serving judicial and extrajudicial documents abroad.

authority.en: Hague Conference on Private International Law (HCCH)

title.zh: 《反腐败公约》
title.en: United Nations Convention against Corruption (UNCAC)

summary.zh: UNCAC是全球性反腐败框架性条约，覆盖预防、追责、国际合作与追缴赃款，支持跨境司法协作与治理现代化。
summary.en: UNCAC is the globally universal anti-corruption instrument covering prevention, criminalization, international cooperation and asset recovery.

authority.en: United Nations Office on Drugs and Crime (UNODC)

title.zh: 《跨国有组织犯罪公约》
title.en: United Nations Convention against Transnational Organized Crime (UNTOC)

summary.zh: UNTOC是打击跨国有组织犯罪的基础性多边条约，含三项核心议定书，支持成员国刑事合作、引渡与执法协同。
summary.en: UNTOC is the core UN treaty against transnational organized crime and includes protocols on trafficking in persons, smuggling of migrants, and firearms.

authority.en: United Nations Office on Drugs and Crime (UNODC)

title.zh: 《联合国宪章》
title.en: Charter of the United Nations

summary.zh: 《联合国宪章》是战后国际秩序的基础性条约，确立了国家主权平等、和平解决争端、集体安全和国际机构架构，并将国际法院置于联合国体系内。
summary.en: The UN Charter is the constitutional instrument of the United Nations, establishing sovereign equality, peaceful settlement of disputes, collective security, and the institutional basis for international legal cooperation.

title.zh: 《国际法院规约》
title.en: Statute of the International Court of Justice

summary.zh: 国际法院规约是国际司法合作核心文件，规定法官组成、管辖、程序和裁判机制，为国家间法律争端提供审判平台。
summary.en: The ICJ Statute sets out the composition, jurisdiction, procedure and adjudicatory structure of the principal judicial organ of the United Nations.

title.zh: 《维也纳外交关系公约》（1961）
title.en: Vienna Convention on Diplomatic Relations (1961)

summary.zh: 该公约统一了驻外外交使团的开设、豁免与保护规则，是国家间建立正式外交关系和处理使馆相关争议的重要基础。
summary.en: The Convention defines the legal regime of diplomatic missions, including privileges, immunities, and the legal status of diplomatic representation.

title.zh: 《维也纳领事关系公约》（1963）
title.en: Vienna Convention on Consular Relations (1963)

summary.zh: 《领事关系公约》规范领事保护、通知与协助机制及与领事机构相关的程序性保障，是跨境拘押、身份认证和民事协作的常用依据。
summary.en: The Convention governs consular functions, protection of consular premises and persons, and procedural assistance across States.

title.zh: 《条约法维也纳公约》（1969）
title.en: Vienna Convention on the Law of Treaties (1969)

summary.zh: 该公约是现代条约法的核心规则，统一了条约订立、解释、修订、权利义务终止与保留制度，对涉外规则解释影响极大。
summary.en: This convention sets the core rules for treaty making, interpretation, reservations, amendment, and invalidity, and is central to treaty interpretation.

title.zh: 《联合国气候变化框架公约》（UNFCCC）
title.en: United Nations Framework Convention on Climate Change (UNFCCC)

summary.zh: UNFCCC 是气候变化全球治理的框架性条约，确立了减缓和适应合作基本框架并连接后续巴黎协定等下位协议。
summary.en: UNFCCC provides the umbrella global framework for climate mitigation and adaptation cooperation and links to the Paris Agreement and later climate commitments.

authority.zh: 联合国气候变化框架公约（UNFCCC）
authority.en: United Nations Framework Convention on Climate Change (UNFCCC)

title.zh: 《京都议定书》
title.en: Kyoto Protocol to the UNFCCC

summary.zh: 《京都议定书》是UNFCCC下的第一份具有量化减排义务的国际气候协议，对工业化国家设定了核算与履约规则。
summary.en: The Kyoto Protocol operationalized emission-reduction commitments for industrialized Parties and established accounting and compliance structures under the UNFCCC.

authority.zh: 联合国气候变化框架公约秘书处

title.zh: 《维也纳《保护臭氧层公约》议定书》（1987）
title.en: Montreal Protocol on Substances that Deplete the Ozone Layer (1987)

summary.zh: 《蒙特利尔议定书》通过对耗臭氧化学物质分阶段淘汰，建立普遍合作与修订修补机制，属于全球最广泛适用的环境协定之一。
summary.en: The Montreal Protocol phases out ozone-depleting substances through differentiated obligations and amendment cycles and has near-universal participation.

title.zh: 《联合国海洋法公约》（UNCLOS）
title.en: United Nations Convention on the Law of the Sea (UNCLOS)

summary.zh: 《海洋法公约》是海洋权益、领海、专属经济区、海底资源与航行权的核心法典化文本，是涉海法与海洋治理的重要母法。
summary.en: UNCLOS governs maritime zones, navigation rights, marine resources and coastal governance and remains foundational for modern ocean law.

title.zh: 《公民权利和政治权利国际公约》
title.en: International Covenant on Civil and Political Rights (ICCPR)

summary.zh: 《公民和政治权利国际公约》确立生命权、言论自由、正当程序和救济权等核心权利，为涉外争端中的程序性权利问题提供普遍人权基准。
summary.en: ICCPR provides core civil and political rights such as life, fair trial, due process and freedoms, widely used as a standard in state conduct and litigation.

authority.zh: 联合国人权理事会/联合国

title.zh: 《经济、社会及文化权利国际公约》
title.en: International Covenant on Economic, Social and Cultural Rights (ICESCR)

summary.zh: 《经济、社会及文化权利国际公约》确立逐步实现义务，涵盖劳动、教育、健康、文化与社会保障权利，是跨国投资与国家义务框架的重要参考。
summary.en: ICESCR establishes rights and progressive realization obligations regarding labor, education, health, and social and cultural rights.

authority.zh: 联合国人权理事会/联合国

title.zh: 《禁止酷刑公约》
title.en: Convention Against Torture and Other Cruel, Inhuman or Degrading Treatment or Punishment (CAT)

summary.zh: 该公约确立酷刑绝对禁令及引渡、引证和执行合作框架，为跨国执法合作和司法程序中的酷刑证据排除提供核心准则。
summary.en: CAT establishes an absolute prohibition on torture and provides frameworks for prevention, enforcement obligations, and judicial cooperation.

authority.zh: 联合国反酷刑委员会秘书处

title.zh: 《世界人权宣言》
title.en: Universal Declaration of Human Rights (UDHR)

summary.zh: 《世界人权宣言》建立了国际人权通用标准与基本框架，被视为后续多边人权条约与国家立法的价值基础。
summary.en: The Universal Declaration of Human Rights sets out core universal standards of human dignity, liberty, and equality, and underpins the architecture of modern international human rights law.

authority.zh: 联合国人权事务高级专员办
authority.en: United Nations High Commissioner for Human Rights

title.zh: 《消除一切形式种族歧视国际公约》
title.en: International Convention on the Elimination of All Forms of Racial Discrimination (CERD)

summary.zh: 该公约要求缔约国消除种族歧视并设立监测机制，对跨境劳动、出入境与反歧视救济具有重要国际法支撑。
summary.en: CERD requires states to condemn and eliminate racial discrimination and establishes monitoring mechanisms that support anti-discrimination standards in cross-border legal cooperation.

authority.en: United Nations High Commissioner for Human Rights

title.zh: 《消除对妇女一切形式歧视公约》
title.en: Convention on the Elimination of All Forms of Discrimination Against Women (CEDAW)

summary.zh: 《妇女歧视消除公约》确立性别平等与国家义务框架，是涉外婚姻、劳工与反歧视制度衔接的重要国际法律依据。
summary.en: CEDAW establishes comprehensive equality obligations and state duties, serving as a key anchor for cross-border family, labor, and anti-discrimination legal harmonization.

authority.en: United Nations High Commissioner for Human Rights

title.zh: 《儿童权利公约》
title.en: Convention on the Rights of the Child (CRC)

summary.zh: 《儿童权利公约》规定儿童的生存、发展与受保护权利，已成为跨境家庭法、民事管辖、儿童移民与社会保障合作中的核心参考。
summary.en: The CRC protects children's civil, political, economic, social and cultural rights and is a core reference for cross-border family, civil, and social protection coordination.

title.zh: 《残疾人权利公约》
title.en: Convention on the Rights of Persons with Disabilities (CRPD)

summary.zh: 《残疾人权利公约》把残疾人置于平等、可及与反歧视的权利框架中，对外商投资项目中的无障碍与反歧视治理提供补充参考。
summary.en: CRPD establishes equal access, non-discrimination, and participation standards for persons with disabilities, relevant to inclusion compliance in international legal and commercial practice.

title.zh: 《防止及惩治灭绝种族罪公约》
title.en: Convention on the Prevention and Punishment of the Crime of Genocide

summary.zh: 该公约首次将“种族灭绝”定为国际犯罪，并要求缔约国采取预防、惩治及引渡合作安排，是国际刑事合作的重要法基。
summary.en: This Convention criminalizes genocide and obliges states to prevent and punish genocide, including cooperation in extradition and international legal assistance.

authority.zh: 联合国人权事务高级专员办

title.zh: 《1949年日内瓦公约及附加议定书》
title.en: Geneva Conventions of 1949 and Additional Protocols

summary.zh: 日内瓦公约及其议定书构建了武装冲突中平民保护与作战行为边界，对涉外法治中的人道法与国家责任评估具有基础性意义。
summary.en: The Geneva Conventions and Additional Protocols establish fundamental humanitarian law boundaries for armed conflict and civilian protection, guiding extraterritorial responsibility analysis.

authority.en: International Committee of the Red Cross

title.zh: 《罗马规约》
title.en: Rome Statute of the International Criminal Court (ICC)

summary.zh: 《罗马规约》设立国际刑事法院并确立战争罪、反人类罪及灭绝种族罪管辖规则，影响跨境重大刑事司法协助与引渡合作实践。
summary.en: The Rome Statute establishes the International Criminal Court and defines core international crimes and jurisdiction rules affecting extradition and cross-border criminal cooperation.

title.zh: 《生物多样性公约》
title.en: Convention on Biological Diversity (CBD)

summary.zh: 《生物多样性公约》构建了遗传资源利用、公平分享与可持续利用的国际规则体系，对跨境生态合作和贸易争端评估均具约束与解释作用。
summary.en: The Convention on Biological Diversity sets international rules on conservation, sustainable use, and fair and equitable benefit-sharing of genetic resources, relevant to cross-border environmental governance.

authority.zh: 联合国生物多样性条约秘书处

title.zh: 《巴塞尔危险废物越境转移及其处置公约》
title.en: Basel Convention on the Control of Transboundary Movements of Hazardous Wastes and Their Disposal

summary.zh: 该公约通过跨境转移许可与环境责任规则对危险废物进出口进行控制，是涉外环境风险监管与双边合作条款设计的重要依据。
summary.en: The Basel Convention controls transboundary movements of hazardous wastes and disposal through prior informed consent and liability-related obligations, guiding cross-border environmental risk governance.

title.zh: 《鹿特丹公约》
title.en: Rotterdam Convention on the Prior Informed Consent Procedure

summary.zh: 《鹿特丹公约》建立有毒化学品和农药跨境贸易中的事前知情同意制度，直接关联进出口审批与国内风险管制协作。
summary.en: The Rotterdam Convention establishes a prior informed consent regime for certain hazardous chemicals and pesticides in international trade, shaping import-export control coordination.

authority.zh: 联合国环境规划署 / 联合国粮农组织

title.zh: 《斯德哥尔摩公约》
title.en: Stockholm Convention on Persistent Organic Pollutants (POPs)

summary.zh: 该公约致力于限制和淘汰持久性有机污染物，对污染物进出口、生产替代和区域化学品监管合作具有直接影响。
summary.en: The Stockholm Convention addresses persistent organic pollutants through restrictions, elimination and substitution obligations, shaping cross-border chemical risk and environmental cooperation.

title.zh: 《水俣公约》
title.en: Minamata Convention on Mercury

summary.zh: 《水俣公约》通过控制汞生产、贸易、排放与产品使用，完善跨境公害治理框架，是环境投资和跨国监管合规的重要工具之一。
summary.en: The Minamata Convention provides global controls on mercury production, use, emissions, and waste handling, strengthening cross-border environmental compliance obligations.

title.zh: 《水下文化遗产保护公约》
title.en: Convention on the Protection of the Underwater Cultural Heritage

summary.zh: 《水下文化遗产保护公约》规范海域水下文化遗产的保护、挖掘与共享利用规则，兼顾文化主权与国际合作。
summary.en: The Convention sets rules for safeguarding, excavation and stewardship of underwater cultural heritage while balancing national competence with international cooperation.

title.zh: 《海牙判决公约》(2019)
title.en: Convention of 2 July 2019 on the Recognition and Enforcement of Foreign Judgments in Civil or Commercial Matters

summary.zh: 该公约统一了外国产生的民商事判决承认与执行规则，适用于跨境商业争端判决协作、执行基础和抗辩标准。
summary.en: The Hague Judgments Convention provides harmonized rules on recognition and enforcement of foreign civil and commercial judgments, supporting transnational enforcement cooperation.

authority.en: Hague Conference on Private International Law

title.zh: 《不扩散核武器条约》
title.en: Treaty on the Non-Proliferation of Nuclear Weapons (NPT)

summary.zh: 不扩散核武器条约是核扩散治理的核心框架，平衡核裁减、和平利用核能与核军控义务，对涉外投资、技术转移和进出口管控具有基础性约束作用。
summary.en: The NPT is the core framework of nuclear non-proliferation, balancing disarmament, peaceful nuclear use and safeguards obligations, and shaping technology-transfer and export-control governance in cross-border settings.

title.zh: 《禁止化学武器公约》
title.en: Convention on the Prohibition of the Development, Production, Stockpiling and Use of Chemical Weapons and on their Destruction

summary.zh: 该公约对化学武器的研制、生产、储存、使用与销毁作出全面禁令，是高风险技术与武器管制合作中最核心的硬法依据之一。
summary.en: The Convention establishes a comprehensive ban on chemical weapons development, production, stockpiling, use and destruction, and is central to global chemical-security governance.

authority.zh: 联合国 / 组织禁化武委员会

title.zh: 《生物武器禁止公约》
title.en: Convention on the Prohibition of the Development, Production and Stockpiling of Bacteriological (Biological) and Toxin Weapons and on their Destruction

summary.zh: 该公约禁止细菌和毒素武器的开发、生产和储存，对生物技术应用、公共卫生应对和跨境生物安全合作具有基础性法理约束。
summary.en: The Convention bans development, production and stockpiling of biological and toxin weapons, linking biosecurity, public health and transnational compliance mechanisms.

title.zh: 《全面禁止核试验条约》
title.en: Comprehensive Nuclear-Test-Ban Treaty (CTBT)

summary.zh: CTBT禁止所有核试验爆炸，建立核爆监测体系与核试验核查机制，为核扩散预防和相关执法合作提供制度抓手。
summary.en: The CTBT prohibits all nuclear explosions, supports verification and monitoring structures, and underpins prevention-oriented non-proliferation cooperation.

title.zh: 《武器贸易条约》
title.en: Arms Trade Treaty (ATT)

summary.zh: ATT对常规武器进出口交易设立国家评估和报告框架，兼顾人道影响、冲突风险和安全出口合规考量。
summary.en: The ATT sets out a global framework for conventional arms transfer regulation with obligations on risk assessment and transparency in cross-border export decisions.

title.zh: 《集束弹药公约》
title.en: Convention on Cluster Munitions

summary.zh: 《集束弹药公约》全面禁止常规武器使用、生产、转让和储存，强调战争后清扫与受害者援助，强化作战技术与武器伦理边界。
summary.en: The CCM prohibits use, transfer, production and stockpiling of cluster munitions, with explicit obligations on post-conflict clearance and victim assistance.

authority.zh: 国际性武器禁令倡议与联合国渠道
authority.en: Convention on Cluster Munitions Secretariat / UN Channels

title.zh: 《反人身地雷公约》
title.en: Convention on the Prohibition of the Use, Stockpiling, Production and Transfer of Anti-Personnel Mines and on their Destruction

summary.zh: 该公约对反人士雷的使用、储存、生产和转让实行总体性禁令，并要求清除与受害者援助，形成持续影响战争遗留风险治理的法治模型。
summary.en: Known as the Ottawa Convention, this treaty imposes broad prohibitions on anti-personnel mines and requires destruction, clearance and assistance obligations.

title.zh: 《禁止酷刑公约任择议定书（OPCAT）》
title.en: Optional Protocol to the Convention Against Torture and Other Cruel, Inhuman or Degrading Treatment or Punishment

summary.zh: OPCAT在酷刑绝对禁令下建立预防性拘留场所访问制度，强调国家与国际机制联动，以访问制度降低酷刑风险。
summary.en: OPCAT builds a preventive visitation system for places of detention and reinforces compliance through regular independent international and national inspection mechanisms.

title.zh: 《马拉喀什协定》
title.en: Agreement Establishing the World Trade Organization (Marrakesh Agreement)

summary.zh: 《马拉喀什协定》建立世界贸易组织法理框架，是当代多边贸易规则、争端解决与经济治理协作的根本性文件。
summary.en: The Marrakesh Agreement establishes the WTO and its agreements system, forming the constitutional framework for contemporary multilateral trade governance.

title.zh: 《濒危野生动植物物种国际贸易公约》
title.en: Convention on International Trade in Endangered Species of Wild Fauna and Flora (CITES)

summary.zh: CITES以濒危动植物及其附录制度约束跨境贸易，直接影响生态安全、野生资源合规、海关执法与企业供应链风险管理。
summary.en: CITES governs trade in endangered species through appendices and licensing rules, shaping conservation compliance and cross-border enforcement in environmental governance.

authority.zh: 国际濒危野生动植物种群及其栖息地贸易公约秘书处
