title.zh: 《联合国海洋法公约》官方门户
title.en: UN Convention on the Law of the Sea Gateway

summary.zh: 联合国海洋事务署的海洋法公约门户集中了《海洋法公约》的历史背景、全本与签署缔约数据、附件与相关文书入口，适合做海事法治主线的入口资源。
summary.en: The UN Law of the Sea Division portal consolidates history, full-text access, ratification/acceptance data, and convention-related documentation for UNCLOS, useful as a primary starting point for maritime legal governance.

authority.en: UN Division for Ocean Affairs and the Law of the Sea

title.zh: 《联合国海洋法公约》英文全文（1982）
title.en: United Nations Convention on the Law of the Sea (Full Text PDF)

summary.zh: UN发布的《海洋法公约》PDF汇编版，覆盖条款、附件、序言与签署信息，是涉外海洋管辖与资源治理研究的核心法条来源。
summary.en: The UN official PDF text collection for UNCLOS provides the convention provisions and annexes used as the primary legal basis for marine jurisdiction, navigation, fisheries, marine environment, and dispute-settlement structures.

title.zh: 国际海洋法法庭章程（《海洋法公约》附件VI）
title.en: ITLOS Statute (Annex VI to UNCLOS)

summary.zh: 该附录为国际海洋法法庭章程文本，明确法庭组成、管辖、程序与争端类别，对涉外海事争端程序化路径的研究尤其重要。
summary.en: Annex VI to UNCLOS contains the Statute of ITLOS, including composition, jurisdiction, procedure and dispute categories, central to understanding judicial remedies in international marine disputes.

title.zh: 国际海洋法法庭（ITLOS）官方网站
title.en: International Tribunal for the Law of the Sea (ITLOS) Official Portal

summary.zh: ITLOS官网发布法庭构成、审理机构与案件程序信息，是查询公海法与海洋争端实体及程序的官方入口。
summary.en: The ITLOS portal provides official information on the Tribunal, its organization, competence and core procedural framework for understanding international marine dispute adjudication.

authority.en: International Tribunal for the Law of the Sea

title.zh: 《海牙公约（服务送达）1965》
title.en: Hague Service Convention (1965)

summary.zh: 《海牙公约》对跨境民商事文书送达提供统一渠道（中央机关制度），是涉外司法协助中的基础性条约资源。
summary.en: The 1965 Hague Convention on the Service Abroad of Judicial and Extrajudicial Documents in Civil or Commercial Matters provides the central-authority framework for cross-border transmission and service of documents.

authority.zh: 海牙国际法院合作会议（Hague Conference）
authority.en: Hague Conference on Private International Law

title.zh: 《海牙公约（取证）1970》
title.en: Hague Evidence Convention (1970)

summary.zh: 1970年《海牙公约》建立跨境取证与证据采集机制，是涉外民商事争议中取证互助的关键条约。
summary.en: The 1970 Hague Evidence Convention establishes channels for cross-border taking of evidence in civil or commercial matters through letters of request and other cooperative mechanisms.

authority.zh: 海牙国际法院合作会议（Hague Conference）
authority.en: Hague Conference on Private International Law

title.zh: 《海牙公约（免证书）1961》
title.en: Hague Apostille Convention (1961)

summary.zh: 1961年《公函认证废除公证书公约》以Apostille取代传统文书认证程序，便于公共文件在国际间通行。
summary.en: The 1961 Hague Apostille Convention replaces cumbersome diplomatic/legalization processes for certain public documents through a single apostille system.

authority.zh: 海牙国际法院合作会议（Hague Conference）
authority.en: Hague Conference on Private International Law

title.zh: 《海牙公约（管辖选择）2005》
title.en: Hague Convention on Choice of Court Agreements (2005)

summary.zh: 该公约旨在强化国际商业纠纷中独占性法院选择条款的可预见性与判决承认执行效率。
summary.en: This convention enhances certainty in international commercial litigation by supporting exclusive choice-of-court clauses and promoting recognition and enforcement of resulting judgments.

authority.zh: 海牙国际法院合作会议（Hague Conference）
authority.en: Hague Conference on Private International Law

title.zh: 《联合国有组织犯罪公约》及三部议定书
title.en: UN Convention against Transnational Organized Crime and Protocols

summary.zh: UNODC提供的UNTOC官方入口同时链接正文与反人贩、非法移民走私、非法制造与贩运枪支等三大补充议定书。
summary.en: UNODC’s official page links the Convention against Transnational Organized Crime text together with the three Protocols on trafficking in persons, smuggling of migrants and illicit firearms.

authority.zh: 联合国毒品和犯罪问题办公室
authority.en: United Nations Office on Drugs and Crime

title.zh: 《联合国反腐败公约》正式文本（UNCAC）
title.en: United Nations Convention against Corruption (UNCAC) Text

summary.zh: UNODC保存的UNCAC文本是反腐败跨境追缴、预防、执法协作与司法互助框架的基础国际法依据。
summary.en: UNODC-hosted UNCAC text serves as the core legal framework for anti-corruption prevention, criminalization, international cooperation, money-laundering coordination, and asset recovery.

authority.zh: 联合国毒品和犯罪问题办公室
authority.en: United Nations Office on Drugs and Crime

title.zh: 《网络犯罪公约》（布达佩斯公约）
title.en: Budapest Convention on Cybercrime

summary.zh: 该公约是首个针对网络犯罪的全球性多边条约，覆盖电子证据跨境调取、程序协助与犯罪定义，属于涉外网络法治基础规则。
summary.en: The Budapest Convention is the first global treaty on cybercrime, harmonizing cyber offences and international cooperation including preservation and cross-border access to electronic evidence.

title.zh: ICSID公约与仲裁规则（含更新）
title.en: ICSID Convention and Rules (Official Resources)

summary.zh: ICSID汇集投资者—国家争端解决公约、仲裁与和解规则及修订版本，是涉外投资争端制度化执行的核心平台文本。
summary.en: ICSID provides the Convention, Arbitration/Conciliation rules, and administrative rules, central to investment arbitration and state-investor dispute settlement under treaty-backed framework.

title.zh: ICC《2021年仲裁规则》
title.en: ICC Arbitration Rules 2021

summary.zh: ICC最新版仲裁规则明确案件启动、仲裁庭组成、程序管理与裁决执行程序，对国际商事争端解决实践有直接指导作用。
summary.en: The ICC 2021 Arbitration Rules define case filing, tribunal constitution, procedural management and award-related steps for international commercial arbitration.

title.zh: 芝加哥公约附录17《航空安全》
title.en: ICAO Annex 17 to the Chicago Convention

summary.zh: ICAO对所有成员国适用的《芝加哥公约》第17号附件规定了防范和遏制非法干预航空运输的标准，是航空运输跨境安全治理的重要规则。
summary.en: Annex 17 sets minimum standards for safeguarding international civil aviation against acts of unlawful interference, forming a core universal safety governance instrument in aviation transport.

title.zh: 《世界知识产权组织版权条约》（WCT）
title.en: WIPO Copyright Treaty (WCT)

summary.zh: WCT是WIPO在数字环境下更新版权国际规则的重要条约，涵盖著作权在网络与技术性环境中的权利安排与保护。
summary.en: The WIPO Copyright Treaty updates core copyright obligations for the digital environment and cross-border IP protection under multilateral IP governance.

title.zh: 《巴黎协定》与《联合国气候变化框架公约》文本合集
title.en: Paris Agreement and UNFCCC Convention Text Package

summary.zh: UNFCCC页面整合了《联合国气候变化框架公约》与巴黎协定文本，便于查看气候治理条款、履约和透明度安排。
summary.en: UNFCCC official pages collect foundational climate governance documents, including the Convention and the Paris Agreement, supporting legal research on climate commitments and compliance architecture.

authority.zh: 联合国气候变化框架公约秘书处

title.zh: 《维也纳外交关系公约
title.en: Vienna Convention on Diplomatic Relations

summary.zh: 《维也纳外交关系公约》确立了外交使团特权与豁免的国际通行规则，对国家间外交关系与争端处理具有基础性法源作用。
summary.en: The Vienna Convention on Diplomatic Relations codifies the core international rules on diplomatic privileges and immunities and underpins interstate diplomatic relations and dispute prevention.

title.zh: 《维也纳领事关系公约
title.en: Vienna Convention on Consular Relations

summary.zh: 该公约统一了各国领事机构的职能、特权及使领馆运作规范，是跨境人员保护与领事合作的重要国际法律基础。
summary.en: The Vienna Convention on Consular Relations harmonizes consular functions, immunities, and mission operations, and is central to cross-border consular cooperation.

title.zh: 《维也纳条约法公约
title.en: Vienna Convention on the Law of Treaties

summary.zh: 该公约确立了条约缔结、解释、效力与终止的一套一般国际法规则，是研究涉外条约法最核心的正式文本之一。
summary.en: This Convention sets out general rules on treaty conclusion, interpretation, effect, amendment, suspension, and termination and is a foundational text of modern treaty law.

en: Vienna Convention on the Law of Treaties

title.zh: WTO《争端解决谅解备忘录》文本
title.en: WTO Understanding on Rules and Procedures Governing the Settlement of Disputes

summary.zh: 争端解决谅解备忘录是WTO体系下处理成员间贸易争端的程序法核心文件，覆盖磋商、专家组与上诉机制。
summary.en: The Dispute Settlement Understanding is the core procedural instrument of WTO trade dispute law, covering consultations, panels, and the appellate review system.

title.zh: WTO《关税与贸易总协定》（1994）文本
title.en: General Agreement on Tariffs and Trade 1994 Text

summary.zh: GATT 1994文本为WTO的基石之一，规定最惠国待遇、关税减让、贸易一般规则与一般豁免条款，适用于货物贸易制度。
summary.en: The GATT 1994 text provides the core rules for merchandise trade, including MFN treatment, tariff commitments, and general trade disciplines.

title.zh: WTO《服务贸易总协定》（GATS）文本
title.en: General Agreement on Trade in Services (GATS)

summary.zh: 《服务贸易总协定》规范跨境服务贸易中的市场准入、国民待遇、最惠国待遇与透明度规则，影响数字服务与专业服务跨境提供。
summary.en: The GATS governs cross-border trade in services through market access, national treatment, MFN, and transparency disciplines relevant to digital and professional services.

title.zh: WTO《农业协定》文本
title.en: Agreement on Agriculture

summary.zh: 《农业协定》调整农业补贴、国内支持、市场准入和出口补贴规则，是贸易摩擦中最常见的农业争端法条依据之一。
summary.en: The Agreement on Agriculture structures domestic support, market access and export subsidy disciplines and is central to WTO agricultural trade disputes.

title.zh: WTO《保障措施协定》文本
title.en: Agreement on Safeguards

summary.zh: 《保障措施协定》提供成员在进口突增或市场受损情形下采取临时性救济的制度基础，重要于反倾销与争端处理。
summary.en: The Agreement on Safeguards provides a legal basis for temporary protective actions in case of import surges and serious injury, intersecting with anti-dumping and dispute practice.

title.zh: WTO《技术性贸易壁垒协定》文本
title.en: Agreement on Technical Barriers to Trade

summary.zh: TBT协定规范成员间技术标准、合格评定和技术法规的一致性与透明程序，平衡监管目标与反歧视要求。
summary.en: The TBT Agreement regulates technical regulations, standards, and conformity assessment with transparency requirements balancing legitimate regulation and non-discrimination.

title.zh: WTO《卫生与植物检疫措施协定》文本
title.en: Agreement on the Application of Sanitary and Phytosanitary Measures

summary.zh: SPS协定围绕食品安全与动植物检疫措施的科学依据、风险评估与透明度义务展开，是检疫争端中关键条约文本。
summary.en: The SPS Agreement regulates sanitary and phytosanitary measures through scientific justification, risk assessment, and transparency, serving as a core basis in trade-health disputes.

title.zh: 《国际法院章程》
title.en: Statute of the International Court of Justice

summary.zh: 《国际法院章程》规定国际法院法庭组成、管辖、诉讼程序与裁决执行关系，是世界性国家间争端司法化的核心规则文本。
summary.en: The ICJ Statute sets out the Court’s composition, jurisdiction, procedure, and judgment regime, forming the constitutional basis of the principal judicial branch of the UN system.

title.zh: 《罗马规约》文本（国际刑事法院）
title.en: Rome Statute of the International Criminal Court

summary.zh: 罗马规约确立国际刑事法院管辖范围与程序框架，规定战犯法庭、反人类罪与种族灭绝罪等核心国际犯罪的追诉规则。
summary.en: The Rome Statute establishes the ICC jurisdiction and procedures, including accountability for genocide, war crimes, and crimes against humanity.

title.zh: 《公民权利和政治权利国际公约》文本（ICCPR）
title.en: International Covenant on Civil and Political Rights (ICCPR)

summary.zh: ICCPR是联合国最核心的人权条约之一，规定包括生命权、表达自由、正当程序、宗教自由等第一代公民权利的国际标准。
summary.en: The ICCPR is one of the core UN human rights treaties setting civil and political rights standards such as life, expression, fair trial, and freedom of religion.

authority.en: Office of the UN High Commissioner for Human Rights

title.zh: 《经济、社会及文化权利国际公约》文本（ICESCR）
title.en: International Covenant on Economic, Social and Cultural Rights (ICESCR)

summary.zh: ICESCR确立劳动、教育、健康、住房、文化等经济社会权利的国际义务与实现进步性，并强调国家在资源约束下逐步实现义务。
summary.en: ICESCR sets out economic, social and cultural rights obligations, including progressive realization standards in health, education, work, and housing.

authority.en: Office of the UN High Commissioner for Human Rights

title.zh: 《儿童权利公约》文本（CRC）
title.en: Convention on the Rights of the Child (CRC)

summary.zh: 《儿童权利公约》是国际儿童人权的核心公约，系统规定儿童在生存、发展、参与与保护方面的基本权利与国家义务。
summary.en: The CRC is the cornerstone global treaty on children’s rights, detailing survival, development, participation, and protection obligations owed by states.

authority.zh: 联合国儿童权利委员会
authority.en: UN Committee on the Rights of the Child

title.zh: 《1951年难民地位公约》文本
title.en: Convention Relating to the Status of Refugees (1951)

summary.zh: 1951年《难民地位公约》与其议定书规定难民定义、非遣返原则与成员国在避难保护领域的基本义务。
summary.en: The 1951 Refugee Convention and related protocol govern refugee status, non-refoulement, and state obligations in protection practice.

title.zh: 《禁止酷刑及其他残忍、不人道或有辱人格的待遇或处罚公约》文本（CAT）
title.en: Convention Against Torture and Other Cruel, Inhuman or Degrading Treatment or Punishment (CAT)

summary.zh: CAT确立禁止酷刑的绝对禁止规则，规定国家的预防、调查、移交与问责义务，是国际刑事与人权法中的基本禁止性规范。
summary.en: CAT establishes the absolute prohibition of torture and requires prevention, investigation, extradition and accountability obligations under international human rights and criminal law.

authority.en: Office of the UN High Commissioner for Human Rights

title.zh: 《消除对妇女一切形式歧视公约》文本（CEDAW）
title.en: Convention on the Elimination of All Forms of Discrimination against Women (CEDAW)

summary.zh: CEDAW是性别平等领域的基础性国际公约，规定消除政治、经济、文化和家庭领域对妇女歧视的国家义务。
summary.en: CEDAW is the core international treaty on gender equality and obliges states to eliminate discrimination against women in political, economic, cultural and family life.

title.zh: 《巴塞尔危险废物公约》文本
title.en: Basel Convention on the Control of Transboundary Movements of Hazardous Wastes and Their Disposal

summary.zh: 《巴塞尔公约》规范危险废物跨境转运、处置与环境安全信息公开，是环境法和国际环境犯罪治理的基础文本。
summary.en: The Basel Convention regulates transboundary movements and disposal of hazardous wastes and is a core instrument for transboundary environmental risk governance.

title.zh: 《斯德哥尔摩公约》文本
title.en: Stockholm Convention on Persistent Organic Pollutants

summary.zh: 《斯德哥尔摩公约》是持久性有机污染物治理的国际框架，规定了清单制定、禁限措施和技术援助机制。
summary.en: The Stockholm Convention establishes an international regime for eliminating or restricting persistent organic pollutants through listing, bans/controls, and assistance mechanisms.

authority.zh: 斯德哥尔摩公约秘书处

title.zh: 《濒危野生动植物种国际贸易公约》文本（CITES）
title.en: Convention on International Trade in Endangered Species of Wild Fauna and Flora (CITES)

summary.zh: CITES通过附录分级控制濒危野生动植物跨境贸易，建立许可体系，是野生动植物保护与跨境生态治理中的核心条约。
summary.en: CITES controls international trade in endangered species through a species-list based licensing and control system and is foundational in transboundary biodiversity protection.

authority.zh: 濒危野生动植物种国际贸易公约秘书处

title.zh: HCCH《国际儿童诱拐民事方面公约》（1980）
title.en: Convention of 25 October 1980 on the Civil Aspects of International Child Abduction

summary.zh: 该公约围绕儿童被非法带离或滞留后的迅速返还、探视权保护和中央机关合作展开，是跨境家事纠纷中最常引用的国际文本之一。
summary.en: This Convention provides a return-and-access framework for children wrongfully removed or retained across borders and is central to international family law cooperation.

authority.en: Hague Conference on Private International Law

title.zh: 《欧洲人权公约》官方文本
title.en: European Convention on Human Rights

summary.zh: 《欧洲人权公约》是欧洲区域最重要的人权法基础文本，规定生命权、公正审判、表达自由等权利，并通过欧洲人权法院形成判例体系。
summary.en: The European Convention on Human Rights is the core regional human rights instrument in Europe and underpins the jurisprudence of the European Court of Human Rights.

authority.zh: 欧洲人权法院 / 欧洲委员会
authority.en: European Court of Human Rights / Council of Europe

title.zh: 欧洲人权法院《法院规则》
title.en: Rules of Court of the European Court of Human Rights

summary.zh: 该规则规定欧洲人权法院案件受理、临时措施、第三方参与和程序推进方式，是研究欧洲人权诉讼程序的直接文本。
summary.en: The Rules of Court govern admissibility, interim measures, third-party participation and procedural steps before the European Court of Human Rights.

title.zh: 欧盟《通用数据保护条例》（GDPR）法文本
title.en: General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)

summary.zh: GDPR是当前跨境数据合规、隐私治理和平台责任领域最具影响力的欧盟规则之一，涉及合法性基础、数据主体权利和域外适用。
summary.en: The GDPR is a cornerstone EU regulation on cross-border data governance, privacy rights, lawful processing and extraterritorial compliance obligations.

title.zh: 欧盟《数字服务法》（DSA）法文本
title.en: Digital Services Act (DSA)

summary.zh: DSA重塑平台责任、非法内容治理、透明度报告和超大型平台监管，是研究跨境平台治理与算法责任的重要欧盟法源。
summary.en: The DSA reshapes platform accountability, illegal-content governance, transparency duties and oversight of very large platforms in the EU digital regulatory framework.

title.zh: 欧盟《人工智能法案》法文本
title.en: EU Artificial Intelligence Act

summary.zh: 欧盟AI法案围绕风险分级、禁止性用途、通用人工智能模型义务和合规评估建立统一规则，是全球 AI 治理的重要参照。
summary.en: The EU AI Act establishes a risk-based legal framework for prohibited practices, high-risk systems and general-purpose AI models, making it a major global reference point.

title.zh: 欧盟《加密资产市场条例》（MiCA）法文本
title.en: Markets in Crypto-assets Regulation (MiCA)

summary.zh: MiCA为加密资产发行、稳定币、服务提供者许可和市场行为建立统一框架，是数字金融跨境监管的重要新规。
summary.en: MiCA establishes a unified EU framework for crypto-asset issuance, stablecoins, service providers and market conduct in digital finance.

title.zh: 《承认及执行外国仲裁裁决公约》（1958纽约公约）
title.en: Convention on the Recognition and Enforcement of Foreign Arbitral Awards (New York Convention)

summary.zh: 1958年《纽约公约》是国际商事仲裁裁决承认与执行的核心条约，奠定仲裁协议效力和跨境裁决流通的共同标准。
summary.en: The 1958 New York Convention is the cornerstone treaty for recognition and enforcement of foreign arbitral awards and for giving effect to arbitration agreements.

authority.zh: 联合国国际贸易法委员会

title.zh: 《条约型投资者与国家仲裁透明度公约》（毛里求斯公约）
title.en: United Nations Convention on Transparency in Treaty-based Investor-State Arbitration (Mauritius Convention on Transparency)

summary.zh: 该公约推动旧有投资协定项下投资者与国家仲裁适用透明度规则，是投资仲裁公开化和程序正当化的重要制度安排。
summary.en: The Mauritius Convention extends transparency rules to treaty-based investor-State arbitrations under pre-2014 investment treaties and advances openness in investment dispute settlement.

authority.zh: 联合国国际贸易法委员会

title.zh: UNCITRAL《国际商事仲裁示范法》
title.en: UNCITRAL Model Law on International Commercial Arbitration

summary.zh: 该示范法覆盖仲裁协议、仲裁庭组成、临时措施和裁决承认执行，是各国仲裁立法现代化中最重要的统一法文本之一。
summary.en: This Model Law covers arbitration agreements, tribunal powers, interim measures and award recognition, and is one of the most influential harmonization texts in arbitration law reform.

authority.zh: 联合国国际贸易法委员会

title.zh: 《国际合同使用电子通信公约》
title.en: United Nations Convention on the Use of Electronic Communications in International Contracts

summary.zh: 该公约为电子合同、电子通知和跨境电子交易确立等效规则，用于消除传统纸面形式要求对数字贸易的障碍。
summary.en: This Convention ensures the legal effectiveness of electronic communications in international contracting and reduces formal barriers to digital trade.

authority.zh: 联合国国际贸易法委员会

title.zh: FATF《反洗钱和反恐怖融资建议》官方文本
title.en: The FATF Recommendations

summary.zh: FATF建议构成全球反洗钱、反恐融资和反扩散融资合规的国际标准，是金融机构、支付平台和跨境企业合规体系的基础文本。
summary.en: The FATF Recommendations form the core global standard for anti-money laundering, counter-terrorist financing and counter-proliferation financing compliance.

title.zh: 《国际货币基金组织协定》官方文本
title.en: Articles of Agreement of the International Monetary Fund

summary.zh: IMF协定是国际货币金融治理的宪章性文本，规定成员义务、基金资源、汇率安排和特别提款权等核心制度。
summary.en: The IMF Articles of Agreement serve as the constitutional charter of the Fund, governing members’ obligations, exchange arrangements, Fund resources and SDR-related mechanisms.

title.zh: Basel III 国际银行监管框架
title.en: Basel III: international regulatory framework for banks

summary.zh: Basel III 是全球银行资本、杠杆率和流动性监管的核心标准体系，对跨境金融审慎监管和银行合规具有持续影响。
summary.en: Basel III is the core global prudential framework for bank capital, leverage and liquidity standards with ongoing significance for cross-border financial regulation.

authority.zh: 巴塞尔银行监管委员会 / 国际清算银行
authority.en: Basel Committee on Banking Supervision / BIS

title.zh: OECD《实施税收协定相关措施以防止税基侵蚀和利润转移的多边公约》（BEPS MLI）
title.en: Multilateral Convention to Implement Tax Treaty Related Measures to Prevent BEPS

summary.zh: BEPS MLI 通过多边方式统一修改双边税收协定，是国际税收反避税、协定滥用防范和争端解决机制升级的重要工具。
summary.en: The BEPS MLI enables coordinated modification of bilateral tax treaties to implement anti-BEPS measures, treaty-abuse standards and dispute resolution improvements.

authority.en: Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development

title.zh: ICSID《公约、规章与规则》（2022版）
title.en: ICSID Convention, Regulations and Rules (2022 edition)

summary.zh: ICSID 2022版规则体系整合了投资争端仲裁、调解、事实调查及程序透明度安排，是投资者与国家争端解决研究的直接程序文本。
summary.en: The 2022 ICSID Convention, Regulations and Rules consolidate arbitration, conciliation, mediation, fact-finding and transparency-related procedures for investment disputes.

authority.zh: 国际投资争端解决中心
authority.en: International Centre for Settlement of Investment Disputes

title.zh: 《联合国国际货物销售合同公约》（CISG）
title.en: United Nations Convention on Contracts for the International Sale of Goods (CISG)

summary.zh: CISG 是国际货物买卖合同领域最核心的统一法条约之一，系统规定合同成立、卖方与买方义务、违约救济、风险转移等关键问题。
summary.en: The CISG is one of the core uniform law conventions on international sale contracts, governing formation, party obligations, remedies, and passing of risk.

authority.zh: 联合国国际贸易法委员会

title.zh: 《国际货物销售时效期间公约》
title.en: Convention on the Limitation Period in the International Sale of Goods

summary.zh: 该公约统一跨境货物销售争议中的时效规则，规定四年一般时效及若干延长情形，是 CISG 体系的重要补充文本。
summary.en: This Convention harmonizes limitation rules for claims arising from international sales transactions and serves as an important complement to the CISG.

authority.zh: 联合国国际贸易法委员会

title.zh: UNCITRAL《自动化订约示范法》
title.en: UNCITRAL Model Law on Automated Contracting

summary.zh: 这是 2024 年通过的新文本，专门回应自动交易系统、算法平台、智能合约和 AI 参与合同订立与履行时的法律效力与归责问题。
summary.en: Adopted in 2024, this Model Law addresses legal recognition, attribution and validity issues arising from automated systems, algorithmic platforms, smart contracts and AI-assisted contracting.

authority.zh: 联合国国际贸易法委员会

title.zh: HCCH《国际商事合同法律选择原则》
title.en: HCCH Principles on Choice of Law in International Commercial Contracts

summary.zh: 该原则聚焦国际商事合同中的意思自治与法律选择问题，为法院、仲裁庭和立法者处理准据法选择提供中性而灵活的参考框架。
summary.en: The HCCH Principles provide a neutral framework on party autonomy and choice of law in international commercial contracts for courts, arbitral tribunals and legislators.

authority.en: Hague Conference on Private International Law

title.zh: 《国际商事合同统一法律文书法律指南：以销售为重点》
title.en: Legal Guide to Uniform Instruments in the Area of International Commercial Contracts, with a Focus on Sales

summary.zh: 这份由 UNCITRAL、HCCH 和 UNIDROIT 联合推出的指南系统梳理了 CISG、HCCH 法律选择原则和 UNIDROIT 通则之间的适用关系，是理解国际商事合同法源互动关系的高质量入口。
summary.en: This joint guide by UNCITRAL, HCCH and UNIDROIT maps the relationship among the CISG, the HCCH Principles and the UNIDROIT Principles, offering a practical roadmap to uniform contract law instruments.

title.zh: WTO《与贸易有关的知识产权协定》（TRIPS）修正文本
title.en: Agreement on Trade-Related Aspects of Intellectual Property Rights as Amended

summary.zh: TRIPS 是全球知识产权国际治理的核心多边文本，系统规定著作权、商标、专利、地理标志、商业秘密及知识产权执法的最低保护标准。
summary.en: TRIPS is the central multilateral text in global intellectual property governance, setting minimum standards on copyright, trademarks, patents, geographical indications, trade secrets and enforcement.

title.zh: 《保护文学和艺术作品伯尔尼公约》
title.en: Berne Convention for the Protection of Literary and Artistic Works

summary.zh: 《伯尔尼公约》是国际著作权保护体系的基石，确立国民待遇、自动保护和独立保护等基本原则，并规定作品保护的最低标准。
summary.en: The Berne Convention is the cornerstone of international copyright protection, establishing national treatment, automatic protection and independence of protection.

title.zh: 《保护工业产权巴黎公约》
title.en: Paris Convention for the Protection of Industrial Property

summary.zh: 《巴黎公约》是国际工业产权制度的起点文本，覆盖专利、商标、工业品外观设计、厂商名称和反不正当竞争，并确立优先权制度。
summary.en: The Paris Convention is the foundational treaty of international industrial property law, covering patents, trademarks, industrial designs, trade names, unfair competition and priority rights.

title.zh: 《专利合作条约》（PCT）
title.en: Patent Cooperation Treaty (PCT)

summary.zh: PCT 建立了一次国际申请、面向多国寻求专利保护的制度，是跨境专利布局、检索和进入国家阶段的核心国际法律框架。
summary.en: The PCT establishes a single international filing framework for seeking patent protection in multiple jurisdictions and is central to cross-border patent strategy.

title.zh: 《马德里议定书》国际商标注册文本
title.en: Protocol Relating to the Madrid Agreement Concerning the International Registration of Marks

summary.zh: 《马德里议定书》构成国际商标注册体系的核心法律文本，使申请人能够通过一次国际申请在多个法域寻求商标保护。
summary.en: The Madrid Protocol is the core legal text of the international trademark registration system, enabling trademark protection across multiple jurisdictions through a single filing.

title.zh: 《世界知识产权组织表演和录音制品条约》（WPPT）
title.en: WIPO Performances and Phonograms Treaty (WPPT)

summary.zh: WPPT 聚焦数字环境下表演者和录音制品制作者的权利保护，是版权相关权国际规则的重要组成部分，也与网络传播和平台使用场景密切相关。
summary.en: The WPPT protects performers and phonogram producers in the digital environment and forms a major part of the international regime for related rights.

title.zh: 《海牙协定》国际外观设计注册文本
title.en: Hague Agreement Concerning the International Registration of Industrial Designs

summary.zh: 《海牙协定》建立国际外观设计注册体系，使权利人可以通过一次申请在多个国家或地区寻求外观设计保护，是跨境设计保护与品牌布局的重要法源。
summary.en: The Hague Agreement establishes the international registration system for industrial designs, allowing protection in multiple jurisdictions through a single filing.

title.zh: 《里斯本协定》及《里斯本协定日内瓦文本》地理标志法源
title.en: Lisbon Agreement for the Protection of Appellations of Origin and their International Registration

summary.zh: 里斯本体系通过国际注册程序保护原产地名称和地理标志，其 2015 年《日内瓦文本》进一步扩展和现代化了该制度，是国际地理标志治理的重要法律基础。
summary.en: The Lisbon system protects appellations of origin and geographical indications through international registration, with the 2015 Geneva Act modernizing and expanding that framework.

title.zh: 《布达佩斯条约》微生物保藏国际承认文本
title.en: Budapest Treaty on the International Recognition of the Deposit of Microorganisms for the Purposes of Patent Procedure

summary.zh: 《布达佩斯条约》要求缔约方承认国际保存机构中的微生物保藏，用以满足专利程序中的披露要求，是生物技术专利保护中的关键国际规则。
summary.en: The Budapest Treaty requires contracting parties to recognize microorganism deposits with international depository authorities for patent procedure purposes, making it a key rule in biotech patent practice.

title.zh: 《马拉喀什条约》无障碍阅读例外文本
title.en: Marrakesh Treaty to Facilitate Access to Published Works for Persons Who Are Blind, Visually Impaired or Otherwise Print Disabled

summary.zh: 《马拉喀什条约》为盲人、视障者及其他阅读障碍者设立强制性版权限制与例外，推动无障碍格式作品制作与跨境交换，兼具版权治理与社会发展意义。
summary.en: The Marrakesh Treaty creates mandatory copyright limitations and exceptions for blind, visually impaired and print-disabled persons, facilitating accessible formats and cross-border exchange.

title.zh: 《汉堡规则》海上货物运输公约文本
title.en: United Nations Convention on the Carriage of Goods by Sea (Hamburg Rules)

summary.zh: 《汉堡规则》为海上货物运输中的托运人、承运人和收货人权利义务建立统一框架，是现代海商运输责任制度的重要国际法源之一。
summary.en: The Hamburg Rules establish a uniform legal regime governing the rights and obligations of shippers, carriers and consignees in contracts for carriage of goods by sea.

authority.zh: 联合国国际贸易法委员会

title.zh: 《鹿特丹规则》国际海上及多式联运货物运输公约文本
title.en: United Nations Convention on Contracts for the International Carriage of Goods Wholly or Partly by Sea (Rotterdam Rules)

summary.zh: 《鹿特丹规则》面向集装箱化、门到门运输和电子运输单证时代，对含海运航段的国际货物运输合同提供更现代化、覆盖多式联运的统一规则。
summary.en: The Rotterdam Rules provide a modern legal framework for international carriage contracts including a sea leg, reflecting containerization, door-to-door transport and electronic transport records.

authority.zh: 联合国国际贸易法委员会

title.zh: 《1999年蒙特利尔公约》国际航空运输统一规则文本
title.en: Convention for the Unification of Certain Rules for International Carriage by Air (Montreal Convention 1999)

summary.zh: 《1999年蒙特利尔公约》统一国际航空旅客、行李和货物运输责任规则，现代化了华沙体系，并为电子空运单和跨境航空索赔提供法律基础。
summary.en: The Montreal Convention 1999 modernizes and consolidates the Warsaw system by establishing uniform liability rules for international carriage of passengers, baggage and cargo by air.

title.zh: 《国际公路货物运输合同公约》（CMR）文本
title.en: Convention on the Contract for the International Carriage of Goods by Road (CMR)

summary.zh: CMR 是国际公路货物运输合同的基础性条约，围绕运单、承运人责任、索赔和管辖等问题建立统一规则，对跨境陆路物流非常关键。
summary.en: The CMR Convention is the foundational treaty for contracts of international carriage of goods by road, harmonizing consignment notes, carrier liability, claims and jurisdiction.

authority.zh: 联合国欧洲经济委员会
authority.en: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe

title.zh: 《开普敦公约》及《航空器设备议定书》法文本
title.en: Convention on International Interests in Mobile Equipment and Aircraft Protocol

summary.zh: 《开普敦公约》及其《航空器设备议定书》为高价值移动设备，尤其是航空器融资、担保、登记和违约救济建立国际统一框架，是跨境航空融资的核心制度文本。
summary.en: The Cape Town Convention and its Aircraft Protocol establish a unified framework for financing, security interests, registration and remedies relating to high-value mobile equipment, especially aircraft.

authority.zh: 国际统一私法协会 / 国际民用航空组织

title.zh: 《解决国家与他国国民之间投资争端公约》（ICSID公约）
title.en: Convention on the Settlement of Investment Disputes between States and Nationals of Other States

summary.zh: ICSID公约是投资者与国家争端解决体系的基础性条约，规定 ICSID 仲裁与调解的适用范围、管辖基础、程序结构及裁决承认执行机制。
summary.en: The ICSID Convention is the foundational treaty for investor-State dispute settlement, governing jurisdiction, procedure and the recognition and enforcement framework for ICSID awards.

authority.zh: 国际投资争端解决中心
authority.en: International Centre for Settlement of Investment Disputes

title.zh: UNCITRAL《条约型投资者与国家仲裁透明度规则》
title.en: UNCITRAL Rules on Transparency in Treaty-based Investor-State Arbitration

summary.zh: 该规则自 2014 年起生效，围绕文件公开、程序开放和第三方信息获取建立制度，是投资仲裁透明化改革的关键程序文本。
summary.en: Effective from 2014, these Rules establish procedural standards for publication, openness and public accessibility in treaty-based investor-State arbitration.

authority.zh: 联合国国际贸易法委员会

title.zh: 《能源宪章条约》官方文本
title.en: Energy Charter Treaty

summary.zh: 《能源宪章条约》是能源投资、贸易、运输和争端解决领域的重要多边文本，长期被广泛用于跨境能源投资保护与仲裁研究。
summary.en: The Energy Charter Treaty is a major multilateral text on energy investment, trade, transit and dispute settlement, long used in cross-border energy investment protection and arbitration.

title.zh: 《多边投资担保机构公约》（MIGA公约）
title.en: Convention Establishing the Multilateral Investment Guarantee Agency

summary.zh: MIGA公约确立世界银行集团多边投资担保机构的法律基础，围绕政治风险担保、合格投资和机构治理为跨境投资增信提供制度支持。
summary.en: The MIGA Convention provides the legal basis for the World Bank Group’s political risk guarantee agency, supporting eligible investments, guarantees and institutional governance.

title.zh: 《新加坡调解公约》国际商事和解执行文本
title.en: United Nations Convention on International Settlement Agreements Resulting from Mediation

summary.zh: 《新加坡调解公约》为国际商事调解达成的和解协议建立跨境执行框架，是继纽约公约之后国际争端解决制度中的又一项重要执行性公约。
summary.en: The Singapore Convention on Mediation creates a cross-border enforcement framework for international settlement agreements resulting from mediation and is a major addition to global dispute resolution architecture.

authority.zh: 联合国国际贸易法委员会

title.zh: 《联合国海洋法公约》官方文本
title.en: United Nations Convention on the Law of the Sea

summary.zh: 海洋法领域的基础性全球公约，系统规定领海、专属经济区、大陆架、公海、国际海底区域、海洋环境保护与争端解决等核心制度。
summary.en: Foundational global convention on the law of the sea covering maritime zones, navigation, the EEZ, the continental shelf, marine environmental protection and dispute settlement.

authority.zh: 联合国海洋事务和海洋法司
authority.en: United Nations Division for Ocean Affairs and the Law of the Sea

title.zh: 《执行1982年12月10日〈联合国海洋法公约〉第十一部分的协定》
title.en: Agreement relating to the Implementation of Part XI of the United Nations Convention on the Law of the Sea

summary.zh: 该协定是对《联合国海洋法公约》第十一部分深海海底制度的重要实施文件，关系国际海底区域资源开发与制度运作。
summary.en: Key implementing agreement to Part XI of UNCLOS concerning the deep seabed regime and the institutional framework for the Area.

authority.zh: 联合国海洋事务和海洋法司
authority.en: United Nations Division for Ocean Affairs and the Law of the Sea

zh: 海洋法公约第十一部分

title.zh: 《国际海洋法法庭规约》官方文本
title.en: Statute of the International Tribunal for the Law of the Sea

summary.zh: 国际海洋法法庭规约规定了法庭的组成、权限和程序基础，是海洋争端司法解决的重要制度文本。
summary.en: The ITLOS Statute sets out the composition, jurisdiction and institutional basis of the Tribunal for the judicial settlement of law of the sea disputes.

authority.en: International Tribunal for the Law of the Sea

title.zh: 经合组织《跨国企业负责任商业行为准则（2023）》
title.en: OECD Guidelines for Multinational Enterprises on Responsible Business Conduct (2023)

summary.zh: 该准则是跨国企业负责任商业行为的重要国际软法文本，涵盖人权、环境、商业诚信、披露、供应链尽职调查等议题。
summary.en: Leading international soft-law instrument on responsible business conduct for multinational enterprises, covering human rights, environment, business integrity, disclosure and supply-chain due diligence.

authority.en: Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development

title.zh: 《国际投资与跨国企业宣言》
title.en: Declaration on International Investment and Multinational Enterprises

summary.zh: 该宣言是经合组织国际投资治理的重要政策文本，也是跨国企业准则所依附的更广框架之一。
summary.en: Important OECD policy instrument on international investment governance and the broader framework within which the OECD Guidelines for multinational enterprises operate.

authority.en: Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development

title.zh: 《联合国反腐败公约》官方文本
title.en: United Nations Convention against Corruption

summary.zh: 全球反腐败领域的核心公约，涵盖预防、刑事定罪、执法合作、资产追回与国际合作，是涉外合规和跨境执法的重要法源。
summary.en: Core global anti-corruption convention covering prevention, criminalization, enforcement cooperation, asset recovery and international cooperation.

authority.zh: 联合国毒品和犯罪问题办公室
authority.en: United Nations Office on Drugs and Crime

title.zh: 国际劳工组织《跨国企业与社会政策三方原则宣言（2022修订）》
title.en: Tripartite Declaration of Principles concerning Multinational Enterprises and Social Policy

summary.zh: 该宣言是国际劳工组织面向跨国企业、政府和劳资双方的重要规范性文件，涵盖就业、培训、劳动条件、产业关系与负责任经营。
summary.en: Important ILO normative text directed to multinational enterprises, governments and social partners, covering employment, training, working conditions, industrial relations and responsible business conduct.

title.zh: 《G20/经合组织公司治理原则（2023）》
title.en: G20/OECD Principles of Corporate Governance 2023

summary.zh: 公司治理领域的国际基准性软法文本，覆盖股东权利、董事会责任、信息披露、可持续性与市场诚信。
summary.en: Benchmark international soft-law text on corporate governance covering shareholder rights, board responsibilities, disclosure, sustainability and market integrity.

authority.zh: 二十国集团 / 经济合作与发展组织
authority.en: G20 / Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development

title.zh: 常设仲裁法院《PCA仲裁规则（2012）》
title.en: PCA Arbitration Rules 2012

summary.zh: PCA仲裁规则适用于国家、国有实体、政府间组织与私人主体之间的多类型争端，是公法与商事争端衔接处的重要程序法文本。
summary.en: PCA procedural rules for disputes involving States, state entities, intergovernmental organizations and private parties, important at the intersection of public and commercial dispute resolution.

title.zh: 国际商会《ICC仲裁规则（2021）》
title.en: ICC Arbitration Rules 2021

summary.zh: ICC仲裁规则是国际商事仲裁实践中使用最广泛的机构规则之一，对跨境合同争端、并案、多方程序和紧急仲裁等具有重要参考价值。
summary.en: One of the most widely used institutional rule sets in international commercial arbitration, highly relevant to cross-border contracts, consolidation, multi-party proceedings and emergency arbitration.

title.zh: UNCITRAL《调解规则（2021）》
title.en: UNCITRAL Mediation Rules (2021)

summary.zh: 该规则为国际商事调解程序提供统一的程序框架，与《新加坡调解公约》和UNCITRAL相关示范法共同构成跨境调解的重要文本体系。
summary.en: Provides a harmonized procedural framework for international mediation and complements the Singapore Convention and UNCITRAL model-law texts.

authority.zh: 联合国国际贸易法委员会

title.zh: UNCITRAL《国际商事调解及调解所产生国际和解协议示范法（2018）》
title.en: UNCITRAL Model Law on International Commercial Mediation and International Settlement Agreements Resulting from Mediation (2018)

summary.zh: 该示范法为各国完善国际商事调解立法提供统一模板，并就调解程序及国际和解协议的援用与执行作出系统安排。
summary.en: Model legislative text to help States modernize mediation law, providing uniform rules for mediation procedure and international settlement agreements resulting from mediation.

authority.zh: 联合国国际贸易法委员会

title.zh: UNCITRAL《国际投资争端调解指引（2023）》
title.en: UNCITRAL Guidelines on Mediation for International Investment Disputes (2023)

summary.zh: 该指引围绕投资争端调解的可适用性、程序设计、信息处理与和解安排提供框架性建议，是投资争端解决改革中的重要新文本。
summary.en: Guidance text on the use of mediation in international investment disputes, addressing suitability, procedure design, information handling and settlement arrangements.

authority.zh: 联合国国际贸易法委员会

title.zh: 瓦森纳安排《军民两用货物和技术清单及军品清单》
title.en: Wassenaar Arrangement Control Lists of Dual-Use Goods and Technologies and Munitions List

summary.zh: 瓦森纳安排是传统武器与军民两用物项出口控制的重要多边机制，其控制清单是观察两用技术与敏感装备国际控制范围的关键文本。
summary.en: The Wassenaar Arrangement is a key multilateral export control regime for conventional arms and dual-use items, and its control lists are a core reference for sensitive technology transfers.

title.zh: 核供应国集团《NSG指南》官方入口
title.en: Nuclear Suppliers Group Guidelines

summary.zh: NSG指南是核出口和核相关两用物项出口控制的重要多边规则文本，在核不扩散与敏感技术转移治理中具有核心地位。
summary.en: The NSG Guidelines are a central multilateral framework for nuclear export controls and nuclear-related dual-use items in the non-proliferation regime.

title.zh: 导弹及其技术控制制度《MTCR指南与设备、软件和技术附件》
title.en: MTCR Guidelines and the Equipment, Software and Technology Annex

summary.zh: MTCR指南及附件构成导弹和运载工具相关技术出口控制的重要多边框架，广泛影响无人机、推进、制导和运载系统的跨境转移监管。
summary.en: The MTCR Guidelines and Annex form a key multilateral framework for missile-related export controls, relevant to UAVs, propulsion, guidance and delivery systems.

authority.zh: 导弹及其技术控制制度

title.zh: 澳大利亚集团《共同控制清单》官方入口
title.en: Australia Group Common Control Lists

summary.zh: 澳大利亚集团共同控制清单聚焦化学与生物武器相关前体、设备、技术和软件，是化生两用物项出口控制的重要国际基准。
summary.en: The Australia Group Common Control Lists focus on chemical and biological weapon-related precursors, equipment, technology and software, forming a major benchmark in CBW-related export controls.

title.zh: 欧盟《2021/821号双用途物项出口管制条例》
title.en: Regulation (EU) 2021/821 on Dual-Use Export Controls

summary.zh: 该条例建立了欧盟统一的双用途物项出口、经纪、技术援助、过境与转移管制框架，是观察欧盟出口管制制度的核心法源。
summary.en: This regulation establishes the EU-wide regime for controls on exports, brokering, technical assistance, transit and transfer of dual-use items.

title.zh: 美国《出口管理条例》（EAR）官方入口
title.en: U.S. Export Administration Regulations (EAR)

summary.zh: EAR是美国军民两用物项和广泛商业技术出口管制的核心法规体系，覆盖受控物项范围、许可要求、例外、再出口与境内转移等。
summary.en: The EAR is the core U.S. regulatory framework for export controls on dual-use and many commercial items, covering scope, licensing, exceptions, reexports and in-country transfers.

authority.zh: 美国商务部工业与安全局
authority.en: U.S. Bureau of Industry and Security

title.zh: 美国BIS《实体清单》官方入口
title.en: U.S. BIS Entity List

summary.zh: 实体清单是美国出口管制实践中的高频工具，针对被认定涉及国家安全或外交政策风险的主体设置额外许可要求和限制。
summary.en: The Entity List is a high-frequency U.S. export control tool imposing additional license requirements and restrictions on listed persons posing national security or foreign policy concerns.

authority.zh: 美国商务部工业与安全局
authority.en: U.S. Bureau of Industry and Security

title.zh: 美国OFAC《制裁项目与国家信息》官方入口
title.en: OFAC Sanctions Programs and Country Information

summary.zh: 该页面是美国经济制裁制度的重要总入口，汇集各制裁项目、国家与名单适用信息，是涉外合规、支付、航运和贸易审查中的高频参考源。
summary.en: This page is a major gateway to U.S. sanctions programs, country information and program materials, widely used in compliance, payments, shipping and trade screening.

authority.zh: 美国财政部外国资产控制办公室
authority.en: U.S. Office of Foreign Assets Control

title.zh: 联合国安理会《综合制裁名单》官方入口
title.en: United Nations Security Council Consolidated List

summary.zh: 安理会综合制裁名单汇集各制裁委员会管理的相关指定信息，是联合国制裁合规、金融审查与跨境风险识别的重要基础数据源。
summary.en: The UNSC Consolidated List aggregates relevant designations managed by Security Council sanctions committees and is a foundational source for sanctions compliance and risk screening.

title.zh: 联合国安理会第1540号决议（防扩散）
title.en: United Nations Security Council Resolution 1540 (2004)

summary.zh: 第1540号决议要求各国建立国内控制措施，防止核、生物、化学武器及其运载工具相关物项落入非国家行为体之手，是出口管制与防扩散治理的关键规范基础。
summary.en: Resolution 1540 requires States to establish domestic controls to prevent nuclear, biological and chemical weapons and related means of delivery from reaching non-State actors, making it a key foundation for export control and non-proliferation governance.

title.zh: 美国《国际武器贸易条例》（ITAR）官方文本入口
title.en: International Traffic in Arms Regulations (ITAR)

summary.zh: ITAR 是美国军品、国防服务和相关技术出口管制的核心法规体系，由美国国务院军贸管制局负责实施，在军贸、航天、军工和敏感技术合作中具有基础性地位。
summary.en: ITAR is the core U.S. regulatory regime governing exports of defense articles, defense services and related technical data, fundamental to defense trade, aerospace and sensitive technology cooperation.

authority.zh: 美国国务院国防贸易管制局
authority.en: U.S. Directorate of Defense Trade Controls

title.zh: 美国《军品清单》（USML）官方文本
title.en: United States Munitions List (USML)

summary.zh: USML 是 ITAR 体系下界定受控军品类别的核心清单，决定相关物项是否纳入美国军品出口管制范围。
summary.en: The USML is the central list under ITAR defining controlled defense article categories and determining whether an item falls within the U.S. arms export control regime.

authority.zh: 美国国务院国防贸易管制局
authority.en: U.S. Directorate of Defense Trade Controls

title.zh: 欧盟《限制性措施（制裁）》官方总入口
title.en: EU Sanctions (Restrictive Measures) Official Overview

summary.zh: 该页面是欧盟制裁制度的官方总入口，集中汇总制裁框架、法律依据、成员国主管机关、指导文件与专题资源。
summary.en: This page is the official EU gateway for restrictive measures, bringing together the sanctions framework, legal bases, national competent authorities, guidance and thematic resources.

title.zh: 欧盟《制裁地图》官方数据库入口
title.en: EU Sanctions Map

summary.zh: 欧盟制裁地图是查阅各制裁制度、法律文件、适用措施、旅行禁令和金融制裁名单的重要官方数据库入口。
summary.en: The EU Sanctions Map is a key official database for consulting sanctions regimes, legal acts, applicable measures, travel bans and financial sanctions listings.

title.zh: 欧盟《资产冻结与禁止提供资金或经济资源》官方指引
title.en: EU Asset Freeze and Prohibition to Provide Funds or Economic Resources

summary.zh: 该官方问答聚焦资产冻结、资金与经济资源禁止提供等核心金融制裁问题，是理解欧盟个人金融制裁实施逻辑的重要实务材料。
summary.en: This official FAQ focuses on asset freezes and the prohibition on making funds or economic resources available, and is a key practical resource for understanding EU financial sanctions implementation.

authority.zh: 欧盟委员会金融稳定总司

title.zh: 欧盟《制裁规避与尽职调查》官方指引
title.en: EU Circumvention and Due Diligence Guidance

summary.zh: 该文件围绕制裁规避、交易结构、第三国转运和经营者尽职调查展开，是理解欧盟反规避执法思路的重要官方材料。
summary.en: This official guidance addresses circumvention, transaction structuring, third-country transit and operator due diligence, making it highly relevant for understanding the EU’s anti-circumvention approach.

authority.zh: 欧盟委员会金融稳定总司

title.zh: 美国外国投资委员会（CFIUS）官方入口
title.en: Committee on Foreign Investment in the United States (CFIUS)

summary.zh: CFIUS 是美国外商投资国家安全审查的核心机制，负责审查特定外国投资和部分不动产交易对美国国家安全的影响。
summary.en: CFIUS is the core U.S. national security review mechanism for certain foreign investments and real estate transactions in the United States.

zh: 外商投资国家安全审查

title.zh: CFIUS《31 CFR Part 800：外国人在美投资规定》
title.en: CFIUS Regulations at 31 CFR Part 800

summary.zh: Part 800 是 CFIUS 审查一般投资交易的核心实施规则，涵盖受管辖交易、关键技术、关键基础设施、敏感个人数据、申报与审查程序。
summary.en: Part 800 is the core implementing regulation for CFIUS review of investment transactions, covering covered transactions, critical technologies, critical infrastructure, sensitive personal data, declarations and review procedures.

authority.zh: 美国财政部投资安全办公室
authority.en: Office of Investment Security, U.S. Department of the Treasury

title.zh: CFIUS《31 CFR Part 802：外国人涉美不动产交易规定》
title.en: CFIUS Regulations at 31 CFR Part 802

summary.zh: Part 802 规定了 CFIUS 对特定不动产交易的审查框架，是理解机场、港口、军事设施周边敏感不动产交易审查的重要规则文本。
summary.en: Part 802 establishes the CFIUS framework for certain real estate transactions, important for understanding reviews involving airports, ports and property near sensitive government sites.

authority.zh: 美国财政部投资安全办公室
authority.en: Office of Investment Security, U.S. Department of the Treasury

title.zh: 欧盟《2019/452号外商直接投资审查框架条例》
title.en: Regulation (EU) 2019/452 on the Screening of Foreign Direct Investments

summary.zh: 该条例建立了欧盟层面的外商直接投资审查合作框架，是欧盟成员国与欧盟委员会围绕安全与公共秩序开展投资审查协调的基础法源。
summary.en: This regulation establishes the EU-level framework for screening foreign direct investments and is the foundational legal act for coordination between Member States and the Commission on security and public order concerns.

title.zh: 欧盟《投资审查》官方专题入口
title.en: EU Investment Screening Official Portal

summary.zh: 该专题页集中说明欧盟外资审查框架、成员国机制、年度报告与修法进展，是追踪欧盟投资安全治理动态的高价值官方入口。
summary.en: This portal centralizes information on the EU investment screening framework, Member State mechanisms, annual reports and legislative reform progress.

authority.zh: 欧盟委员会贸易与经济安全总司
authority.en: European Commission DG Trade and Economic Security

title.zh: 欧盟《反洗钱管理局条例》（Regulation (EU) 2024/1620）
title.en: Regulation (EU) 2024/1620 establishing the Anti-Money Laundering Authority

summary.zh: 该条例设立欧盟反洗钱管理局（AMLA），是欧盟反洗钱和反恐融资单一监管体系的重要制度支柱。
summary.en: This regulation establishes the EU Anti-Money Laundering Authority (AMLA), a central institutional pillar of the EU’s single AML/CFT supervisory framework.

title.zh: 欧盟《反洗钱条例（AMLR）》（Regulation (EU) 2024/1624）
title.en: Regulation (EU) 2024/1624 on the prevention of the use of the financial system for the purposes of money laundering or terrorist financing

summary.zh: 该条例构成欧盟反洗钱单一规则手册的核心文本，系统规定客户尽职调查、受益所有人透明度、内部控制和高风险业务场景。
summary.en: This regulation forms the core of the EU’s AML single rulebook, setting out customer due diligence, beneficial ownership transparency, internal controls and rules for higher-risk scenarios.

title.zh: 欧盟《第六反洗钱指令》（Directive (EU) 2024/1640）
title.en: Directive (EU) 2024/1640 on the mechanisms to be put in place by Member States for the prevention of the use of the financial system for the purposes of money laundering or terrorist financing

summary.zh: 该指令围绕成员国层面的反洗钱制度、金融情报机构、受益所有人登记和主管机关协作作出安排，是欧盟AML制度的重要配套文本。
summary.en: This directive provides for Member State-level AML/CFT mechanisms, including FIUs, beneficial ownership registers and cooperation among competent authorities.

title.zh: FATF《法人受益所有权透明度指引（2023）》
title.en: FATF Guidance on Beneficial Ownership for Legal Persons (2023)

summary.zh: 该指引围绕 FATF 第24项建议展开，聚焦法人受益所有权信息的可得性、准确性和及时性，是公司透明度治理的重要国际基准。
summary.en: This FATF guidance elaborates Recommendation 24 and focuses on the availability, accuracy and timeliness of beneficial ownership information for legal persons.

title.zh: FATF《法律安排受益所有权与透明度指引（2024）》
title.en: FATF Guidance on Beneficial Ownership and Transparency of Legal Arrangements (2024)

summary.zh: 该指引围绕信托等法律安排的受益所有权透明度展开，是 FATF 第25项建议的重要实施参考。
summary.en: This FATF guidance addresses beneficial ownership and transparency of legal arrangements such as trusts, serving as a key implementation reference for Recommendation 25.

title.zh: FATF《扩散融资风险评估与缓释指引》
title.en: FATF Guidance on Proliferation Financing Risk Assessment and Mitigation

summary.zh: 该指引围绕扩散融资风险识别、内部控制和风险缓释展开，对出口管制、制裁合规和金融机构审查具有联动意义。
summary.en: This FATF guidance addresses proliferation financing risk identification, internal controls and mitigation, with strong relevance to export controls, sanctions compliance and financial sector screening.

title.zh: 欧洲银行管理局《远程客户尽职调查开户指引》
title.en: EBA Guidelines on the Use of Remote Customer Onboarding Solutions

summary.zh: 该指引聚焦远程身份识别和客户尽职调查流程，是金融机构开展跨境数字开户、KYC 和反欺诈控制的重要官方规范文件。
summary.en: These guidelines focus on remote identification and customer due diligence processes, providing important official guidance for cross-border digital onboarding, KYC and anti-fraud controls.

title.zh: WTO《贸易便利化协定》官方文本
title.en: WTO Trade Facilitation Agreement

summary.zh: 该协定是多边贸易体制中推动通关透明化、程序简化和边境协作的关键文本，与海关执法、合规和跨境物流效率紧密相关。
summary.en: This agreement is a key WTO text for customs transparency, procedural simplification and border cooperation, closely tied to customs compliance and cross-border logistics efficiency.

title.zh: WTO《原产地规则协定》官方文本
title.en: WTO Agreement on Rules of Origin

summary.zh: 该协定是国际贸易中原产地判定制度的重要基础文本，关系关税适用、贸易救济、统计、标签和市场准入管理。
summary.en: This agreement is a foundational WTO text on origin determination, relevant to tariff treatment, trade remedies, statistics, labelling and market access administration.

title.zh: WTO《反倾销协定》官方文本
title.en: WTO Anti-Dumping Agreement

summary.zh: 该协定系统规定倾销认定、损害分析、调查程序和反倾销措施适用条件，是贸易救济制度的核心法源之一。
summary.en: This agreement sets out the core WTO rules on dumping determinations, injury analysis, investigative procedures and the application of anti-dumping measures.

title.zh: WTO《补贴与反补贴措施协定》官方文本
title.en: WTO Agreement on Subsidies and Countervailing Measures

summary.zh: 该协定规定补贴分类、可诉补贴、禁止性补贴及反补贴调查与措施，是国际贸易补贴治理和贸易争端中的关键法源。
summary.en: This agreement addresses subsidy categories, actionable and prohibited subsidies, and countervailing investigations and measures, making it central to subsidy governance and trade disputes.

title.zh: WTO《海关估价协定》官方文本
title.en: WTO Customs Valuation Agreement

summary.zh: 该协定确立国际贸易货物海关估价的基本规则，对完税价格、申报合规、海关争议和通关执法具有重要意义。
summary.en: This agreement establishes the core WTO rules for customs valuation of traded goods, with major implications for declared value, compliance, customs disputes and border enforcement.

title.zh: 世界海关组织《SAFE全球贸易安全与便利标准框架》
title.en: WCO SAFE Framework of Standards

summary.zh: SAFE 框架是全球海关安全与便利化治理的重要标准文本，推动海关与企业协作、风险管理和 AEO 制度发展。
summary.en: The SAFE Framework is a major global customs security and facilitation standard promoting customs-business partnership, risk management and the development of AEO systems.

title.zh: 世界海关组织《AEO互认与项目门户》
title.en: WCO Authorized Economic Operator (AEO) Portal

summary.zh: 该门户汇集各成员 AEO 项目及互认安排信息，是观察海关可信企业制度国际实践的重要官方入口。
summary.en: This portal brings together information on member AEO programmes and mutual recognition arrangements, serving as an important official gateway to trusted trader practice worldwide.

title.zh: 《布达佩斯网络犯罪公约》官方文本入口
title.en: Convention on Cybercrime (Budapest Convention)

summary.zh: 布达佩斯公约是国际网络犯罪合作的核心条约，涵盖刑事定罪、电子证据、程序措施和跨境执法协作。
summary.en: The Budapest Convention is the central international treaty on cybercrime, covering substantive offences, electronic evidence, procedural powers and cross-border cooperation.

title.zh: 《布达佩斯公约第二附加议定书》官方入口
title.en: Second Additional Protocol to the Budapest Convention

summary.zh: 第二附加议定书重点强化跨境电子证据获取与执法合作机制，是数字时代国际刑事司法协助的重要补充文本。
summary.en: The Second Additional Protocol strengthens cross-border access to electronic evidence and international cooperation, making it an important modern supplement to cybercrime mutual assistance rules.

title.zh: 《108+号公约：现代化个人数据保护公约》官方入口
title.en: Convention 108+ for the Protection of Individuals with regard to the Processing of Personal Data

summary.zh: 108+号公约是跨境个人数据保护领域的重要国际条约框架，对数据处理原则、跨境流动和监督机制具有长期影响。
summary.en: Convention 108+ is a major international treaty framework on personal data protection, influencing data processing principles, cross-border flows and supervisory arrangements.

title.zh: 欧盟《NIS2指令》（Directive (EU) 2022/2555）
title.en: Directive (EU) 2022/2555 (NIS2 Directive)

summary.zh: NIS2 是欧盟网络与信息系统安全治理的核心立法，覆盖重要和关键实体的风险管理、通报义务与供应链安全。
summary.en: NIS2 is the core EU law on network and information systems security, covering risk management, incident reporting and supply-chain security for important and essential entities.

title.zh: 欧盟《关键实体韧性指令》（Directive (EU) 2022/2557）
title.en: Directive (EU) 2022/2557 on the resilience of critical entities

summary.zh: 该指令聚焦能源、交通、金融、卫生、数字基础设施等关键实体韧性建设，是欧盟关键基础设施安全治理的重要制度支柱。
summary.en: This directive focuses on resilience of critical entities in sectors such as energy, transport, finance, health and digital infrastructure, forming a key pillar of EU critical infrastructure governance.

title.zh: 欧盟《数据治理法》（Regulation (EU) 2022/868）
title.en: Regulation (EU) 2022/868 (Data Governance Act)

summary.zh: 数据治理法旨在推动公共部门数据再利用、数据中介服务和数据利他机制，是欧盟数字主权与数据空间治理的重要基础法源。
summary.en: The Data Governance Act promotes re-use of public-sector data, data intermediation services and data altruism, making it a key legal basis for EU data spaces and digital sovereignty governance.

title.zh: 欧盟《数据法》（Regulation (EU) 2023/2854）
title.en: Regulation (EU) 2023/2854 (Data Act)

summary.zh: 数据法围绕联网设备数据访问、使用与共享、云切换和政府非常规调取等问题建立制度框架，是欧盟数据经济治理的重要立法。
summary.en: The Data Act establishes a framework for access to and use of connected-device data, data sharing, cloud switching and exceptional public-sector access, making it central to EU data economy governance.

title.zh: 欧盟《网络安全法》（Regulation (EU) 2019/881）
title.en: Regulation (EU) 2019/881 (Cybersecurity Act)

summary.zh: 该条例强化欧盟网络安全局 ENISA 的职能，并建立欧盟网络安全认证框架，是欧盟数字基础设施与产品安全治理的重要立法。
summary.en: This regulation strengthens the role of ENISA and establishes an EU cybersecurity certification framework, making it a major legal foundation for digital infrastructure and product security governance.

title.zh: 欧盟《网络韧性法》（Cyber Resilience Act）
title.en: Regulation (EU) 2024/2847 (Cyber Resilience Act)

summary.zh: 网络韧性法面向带数字元素产品设定网络安全设计、漏洞管理和合规要求，是欧盟产品安全与供应链安全治理的重要新法。
summary.en: The Cyber Resilience Act sets cybersecurity-by-design, vulnerability handling and compliance requirements for products with digital elements, making it a significant new EU law on product and supply-chain security.

title.zh: OECD/G20“国际税收双支柱方案”官方专题入口
title.en: OECD/G20 Two-Pillar Solution to International Tax Reform

summary.zh: 该专题页是 OECD 关于国际税收改革的总入口，集中展示双支柱方案、BEPS、税收协定和跨境税收治理的核心材料。
summary.en: This OECD topic page is a main gateway to international tax reform materials, bringing together the Two-Pillar Solution, BEPS, tax treaties and cross-border tax governance resources.

authority.en: Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development

title.zh: OECD《全球反税基侵蚀规则（支柱二）》官方入口
title.en: OECD Global Anti-Base Erosion Model Rules (Pillar Two)

summary.zh: 该页面汇集支柱二 GloBE 规则、评注、行政指引、安全港和实施工具，是全球最低税制度的核心官方入口。
summary.en: This page brings together the Pillar Two GloBE Rules, commentary, administrative guidance, safe harbours and implementation tools, serving as the core official entry point to the global minimum tax regime.

authority.en: Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development

title.zh: OECD《支柱二受限征税规则（STTR）》官方专题
title.en: OECD Subject to Tax Rule (Pillar Two)

summary.zh: STTR 是支柱二中面向税收协定的核心安排，重点保护来源国对特定低税集团内部支付重新征税的权利。
summary.en: The STTR is the treaty-based component of Pillar Two, designed to protect source jurisdictions’ ability to tax certain low-taxed intra-group payments.

authority.en: Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development

title.zh: OECD《实施支柱二受限征税规则的多边公约》
title.en: Multilateral Convention to Facilitate the Implementation of the Pillar Two Subject to Tax Rule

summary.zh: 该多边工具旨在以统一方式将 STTR 快速嵌入现有双边税收协定，是税收协定层面落实支柱二的重要制度文件。
summary.en: This multilateral instrument enables the rapid and coordinated insertion of the STTR into existing bilateral tax treaties and is a key treaty-level implementation tool for Pillar Two.

authority.en: Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development

title.zh: OECD《所得和资本税收协定范本》官方入口
title.en: OECD Model Tax Convention on Income and on Capital

summary.zh: OECD 范本是双边税收协定谈判、解释与适用的经典基础文本，对国际重复征税、常设机构和协定待遇等问题具有长期影响。
summary.en: The OECD Model is the classic foundational text for negotiating, interpreting and applying bilateral tax treaties, with long-term influence on double taxation, permanent establishments and treaty benefits.

authority.en: Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development

title.zh: 联合国《发达国家与发展中国家间避免双重征税协定范本（2021）》
title.en: United Nations Model Double Taxation Convention between Developed and Developing Countries (2021)

summary.zh: 联合国税收协定范本更强调来源国征税权，对发展中国家参与国际税收协定谈判和设计本国协定政策具有重要参考价值。
summary.en: The UN Model places greater emphasis on source-country taxing rights and is especially influential for developing countries in negotiating and designing tax treaty policy.

authority.zh: 联合国经济和社会事务部
authority.en: United Nations Department of Economic and Social Affairs

title.zh: 《税务事项行政互助多边公约》官方入口
title.en: Convention on Mutual Administrative Assistance in Tax Matters

summary.zh: 该公约是税务信息交换、协助征收、同期税务检查等国际税务合作的重要多边法律框架，也是 CRS 等安排的重要制度基础。
summary.en: This convention is a major multilateral legal framework for tax information exchange, assistance in recovery, simultaneous examinations and other forms of tax cooperation, and underpins arrangements such as the CRS.

authority.zh: 经济合作与发展组织 / 欧洲委员会

title.zh: OECD《支柱一金额B》官方文本
title.en: OECD Pillar One – Amount B

summary.zh: 金额 B 旨在简化基础营销与分销活动的转让定价适用，是双支柱改革中面向低能力税务辖区的重要实施工具之一。
summary.en: Amount B is designed to simplify transfer pricing for baseline marketing and distribution activities and is one of the important implementation tools of the Two-Pillar Solution, particularly for low-capacity jurisdictions.

authority.en: Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development

title.zh: 日本特许厅《专利审查高速路（PPH）门户》
title.en: JPO PPH Portal

summary.zh: PPH 门户汇集多边与双边审查高速路安排，是跨国专利申请加速审查与审查协作的重要官方入口。
summary.en: The PPH Portal consolidates multilateral and bilateral Patent Prosecution Highway arrangements and serves as an important official gateway to accelerated examination and patent office work-sharing.

title.zh: USPTO《专利审查高速路（PPH）快速审查》官方入口
title.en: USPTO Patent Prosecution Highway (PPH) – Fast Track Examination

summary.zh: 该页面是美国专利商标局关于 PPH 的实务入口，说明如何基于合作局的可授权结论申请对应美国案件的加速审查。
summary.en: This USPTO page is a practical portal for the PPH, explaining how applicants may seek accelerated examination in the United States based on allowable claims found by a partner office.

authority.en: United States Patent and Trademark Office

title.zh: 欧盟《608/2013号知识产权海关保护条例》
title.en: Regulation (EU) No 608/2013 on Customs Enforcement of Intellectual Property Rights

summary.zh: 该条例规定欧盟海关对涉嫌侵害知识产权货物采取行动的程序，是边境知识产权执法的重要区域法源。
summary.en: This regulation sets out the procedures for customs action against goods suspected of infringing intellectual property rights and is a key regional legal source for border IP enforcement.

title.zh: 欧盟《1352/2013号知识产权海关保护实施条例》
title.en: Commission Implementing Regulation (EU) No 1352/2013

summary.zh: 该实施条例细化了欧盟知识产权海关保护申请和续期等表格制度，是理解 608/2013 在实务中如何运作的重要配套文件。
summary.en: This implementing regulation specifies forms for applications and extensions under the EU customs IP enforcement regime and is an important practical companion to Regulation 608/2013.

title.zh: ICANN《统一域名争议解决政策（UDRP）》
title.en: ICANN Uniform Domain Name Dispute Resolution Policy

summary.zh: UDRP 是全球通用顶级域名下处理抢注和商标型域名争议的核心制度文本，是跨境域名纠纷最重要的基础规则之一。
summary.en: The UDRP is the core rule-set for addressing cybersquatting and trademark-based disputes in generic top-level domains and remains one of the most important foundational rules for cross-border domain name disputes.

authority.zh: 互联网名称与数字地址分配机构
authority.en: Internet Corporation for Assigned Names and Numbers

title.zh: ICANN《统一域名争议解决政策规则》
title.en: ICANN Rules for Uniform Domain Name Dispute Resolution Policy

summary.zh: 该规则规定 UDRP 案件的程序步骤、送达、答辩、裁决和执行安排，是域名争议实务中的直接程序法依据。
summary.en: These rules govern the procedure for UDRP cases, including notice, response, decision-making and implementation, and serve as the direct procedural framework for domain dispute practice.

authority.zh: 互联网名称与数字地址分配机构
authority.en: Internet Corporation for Assigned Names and Numbers

title.zh: WIPO《UDRP实务指南》
title.en: WIPO Guide to the Uniform Domain Name Dispute Resolution Policy (UDRP)

summary.zh: 该指南系统说明 UDRP 的适用范围、举证、程序和 WIPO 受理流程，是域名争议研究和办案中的高频官方参考材料。
summary.en: This guide systematically explains the scope, evidence, procedure and WIPO case-administration process under the UDRP and is a high-frequency official reference in domain dispute practice.

authority.zh: 世界知识产权组织仲裁与调解中心

title.zh: ICANN《统一快速暂停系统（URS）》官方入口
title.en: ICANN Uniform Rapid Suspension System (URS)

summary.zh: URS 是对 UDRP 的补充机制，面向更明显的侵权域名争议提供更快、更低成本的救济路径。
summary.en: The URS complements the UDRP by offering a faster and lower-cost path to relief for more clear-cut cases of infringing domain name registrations.

authority.zh: 互联网名称与数字地址分配机构
authority.en: Internet Corporation for Assigned Names and Numbers

title.zh: ICANN《商标信息交换库（Trademark Clearinghouse）》官方入口
title.en: ICANN Trademark Clearinghouse for Rights Holders

summary.zh: 商标信息交换库是新通用顶级域名体系中的核心权利保护机制，为日升期和商标通知等制度提供基础支撑。
summary.en: The Trademark Clearinghouse is a core rights protection mechanism in the new gTLD space and underpins systems such as sunrise registrations and trademark claims notices.

authority.zh: 互联网名称与数字地址分配机构
authority.en: Internet Corporation for Assigned Names and Numbers

title.zh: 《1980年国际司法救助公约》官方文本
title.en: Convention of 25 October 1980 on International Access to Justice

summary.zh: 该公约旨在消除跨境民商事诉讼中的国籍和居所歧视，涉及法律援助、诉讼费用担保和文书获取等国际司法协助问题。
summary.en: This convention aims to eliminate discrimination based on nationality or residence in cross-border civil and commercial litigation, covering legal aid, security for costs and access to documents.

authority.en: Hague Conference on Private International Law

title.zh: 新加坡国际商事法庭（SICC）官方入口
title.en: Singapore International Commercial Court

summary.zh: SICC 是亚洲具有代表性的国际商事法院平台之一，面向跨境商事争议提供国际化、英语化和程序灵活的诉讼路径。
summary.en: The SICC is one of Asia’s leading international commercial court platforms, offering an internationalised, English-language and procedurally flexible forum for cross-border commercial disputes.

title.zh: 《新加坡国际商事法庭规则（2021）》
title.en: Singapore International Commercial Court Rules 2021

summary.zh: 该规则系统规定 SICC 的管辖、移送、证据、程序管理和上诉安排，是研究国际商事法院程序设计的重要文本。
summary.en: These rules govern jurisdiction, transfer, evidence, case management and appeals before the SICC and are important for studying the procedural design of international commercial courts.

title.zh: 迪拜国际金融中心法院（DIFC Courts）管辖权官方说明
title.en: DIFC Courts Jurisdiction

summary.zh: 该页面说明 DIFC Courts 的民商事管辖范围、当事人合意选择和制度定位，是理解中东国际商事法院实践的重要入口。
summary.en: This page explains the civil and commercial jurisdiction of the DIFC Courts, party opt-in arrangements and institutional role, making it an important entry point to international commercial court practice in the Middle East.

authority.zh: 迪拜国际金融中心法院

title.zh: DIFC Courts《法院规则》官方入口
title.en: DIFC Courts Rules

summary.zh: 该页面汇集 DIFC Courts 各部分程序规则，覆盖立案、证据、判决执行、上诉和仲裁相关申请等内容。
summary.en: This page consolidates the DIFC Courts’ procedural rules across filing, evidence, enforcement, appeals and arbitration-related applications.

authority.zh: 迪拜国际金融中心法院

title.zh: 阿布扎比全球市场法院（ADGM Courts）官方入口
title.en: ADGM Courts

summary.zh: ADGM Courts 是另一类中东国际化商事法院平台，强调英语普通法式程序和数字化法院服务，在跨境商事争议中日益受到关注。
summary.en: The ADGM Courts are another internationalised commercial court platform in the Middle East, emphasising English common-law style procedure and digital court services in cross-border disputes.

authority.zh: 阿布扎比全球市场法院

title.zh: 《ADGM法院程序规则（2016）》官方文本
title.en: ADGM Court Procedure Rules 2016

summary.zh: 该规则规定 ADGM Courts 的具体诉讼程序，包括管辖、送达、证据、审理和承认执行等内容，是研究国际化商事法院制度设计的重要材料。
summary.en: These rules set out the detailed procedure of the ADGM Courts, including jurisdiction, service, evidence, hearings and recognition and enforcement, and are important for studying the design of internationalised commercial courts.

authority.zh: 阿布扎比全球市场法院

title.zh: 国际商事法院常设论坛（SIFoCC）官方入口
title.en: Standing International Forum of Commercial Courts

summary.zh: SIFoCC 是全球商事法院交流最佳实践和推动法治合作的重要平台，对观察国际商事法院制度发展具有较高参考价值。
summary.en: SIFoCC is a major platform for commercial courts worldwide to exchange best practices and promote rule-of-law cooperation, making it valuable for tracking the evolution of international commercial court systems.

authority.zh: 国际商事法院常设论坛
authority.en: Standing International Forum of Commercial Courts

title.zh: 《LCIA仲裁规则（2020）》
title.en: LCIA Arbitration Rules 2020

summary.zh: LCIA 规则是国际商事仲裁中的重要机构规则体系，涵盖紧急仲裁员、加速组成仲裁庭、合并与并行审理、电子通信等核心程序安排。
summary.en: The LCIA Rules are a leading institutional framework in international commercial arbitration, covering emergency arbitrators, expedited tribunal formation, consolidation, concurrent conduct and electronic communications.

title.zh: 《SIAC规则（2025）》
title.en: SIAC Rules 2025

summary.zh: SIAC 规则是亚洲高频使用的国际仲裁机构规则之一，反映了新加坡在跨境商事争端解决中的制度竞争力和程序创新。
summary.en: The SIAC Rules are one of the most frequently used institutional rule sets in Asia and reflect Singapore’s procedural innovation and competitiveness in cross-border commercial dispute resolution.

title.zh: 《HKIAC 2024年机构仲裁规则》
title.en: HKIAC 2024 Administered Arbitration Rules

summary.zh: HKIAC 2024 规则在 2018 版基础上完善了效率、信息安全、成本和仲裁庭权限安排，是香港国际仲裁制度更新的重要文本。
summary.en: The 2024 HKIAC Rules refine the 2018 version on efficiency, information security, costs and tribunal powers, making them a key text in the evolution of Hong Kong’s arbitration framework.

title.zh: 《SCC仲裁规则（2023）》
title.en: SCC Arbitration Rules 2023

summary.zh: SCC 规则在欧洲与投资仲裁实践中具有较高影响力，兼顾效率、第三方陈述、成本配置与程序管理等议题。
summary.en: The SCC Rules are influential in European and investment arbitration practice and address efficiency, third-party submissions, cost allocation and case management.

authority.zh: 斯德哥尔摩商会仲裁院

title.zh: ICDR《国际争端解决程序》官方入口
title.en: ICDR International Dispute Resolution Procedures

summary.zh: ICDR 程序是 AAA 国际分支的核心规则入口，涵盖国际仲裁与调解规则、费用和相关文件，是美系国际仲裁制度的重要参照。
summary.en: The ICDR Procedures page is the main rules portal for the international arm of the AAA, covering international arbitration and mediation rules, fees and related materials.

title.zh: CPMI-IOSCO《金融市场基础设施原则（PFMI）》
title.en: Principles for Financial Market Infrastructures (PFMI)

summary.zh: PFMI 是支付系统、中央证券存管机构、证券结算系统、中央对手方和交易数据库的全球核心标准，对金融稳定和市场基础设施治理具有基础地位。
summary.en: The PFMI are the core global standards for payment systems, central securities depositories, securities settlement systems, central counterparties and trade repositories.

authority.zh: 支付和市场基础设施委员会 / 国际证监会组织
authority.en: Committee on Payments and Market Infrastructures / International Organization of Securities Commissions

title.zh: 《PFMI披露框架与评估方法》
title.en: PFMI Disclosure Framework and Assessment Methodology

summary.zh: 该文件为 PFMI 的公开披露和合规评估提供统一方法，是各司法辖区和市场基础设施运营者落实 PFMI 的重要配套标准。
summary.en: This document provides a common disclosure framework and assessment methodology for the PFMI and is an important companion standard for implementation and compliance.

authority.zh: 支付和市场基础设施委员会 / 国际证监会组织
authority.en: Committee on Payments and Market Infrastructures / International Organization of Securities Commissions

title.zh: IOSCO《证券监管目标与原则》官方入口
title.en: IOSCO Objectives and Principles of Securities Regulation

summary.zh: IOSCO 原则是全球证券监管的重要国际基准，围绕投资者保护、市场公平透明和系统性风险控制建立规范框架。
summary.en: The IOSCO Principles are key international benchmarks for securities regulation, structured around investor protection, fair and transparent markets and systemic risk reduction.

title.zh: ISDA《主协议与用户指南》官方入口
title.en: ISDA Master Agreements and User Guides

summary.zh: 该页面汇集 ISDA 主协议及相关用户指南，是跨境场外衍生品交易文件体系、净额结算和法律风险控制的核心入口。
summary.en: This page consolidates ISDA Master Agreements and related user guides and serves as a core entry point to the documentation architecture, netting and legal risk management of cross-border OTC derivatives.

authority.zh: 国际掉期与衍生工具协会

title.zh: ISDA《净额结算立法现状》官方追踪页
title.en: ISDA Status of Netting Legislation

summary.zh: 该页面追踪全球各法域净额结算立法状况，是评估衍生品交易、破产隔离和跨产品净额结算可执行性的高价值实务资料。
summary.en: This page tracks the status of netting legislation across jurisdictions and is a valuable practical resource for assessing enforceability of derivatives netting, insolvency protection and cross-product close-out.

authority.zh: 国际掉期与衍生工具协会

title.zh: UNCITRAL《担保交易示范法（2016）》
title.en: UNCITRAL Model Law on Secured Transactions (2016)

summary.zh: 该示范法为各国统一动产担保融资制度提供框架，覆盖有体和无体财产担保权设立、优先顺位、登记与执行。
summary.en: This model law provides a unified framework for secured transactions in movable assets, covering creation, priority, registration and enforcement across tangible and intangible property.

authority.zh: 联合国国际贸易法委员会

title.zh: UNCITRAL《担保交易立法指南（2007）》
title.en: UNCITRAL Legislative Guide on Secured Transactions (2007)

summary.zh: 该指南从立法设计层面系统讨论现代担保交易制度，是理解 UNCITRAL 担保交易体系与融资法改革逻辑的重要基础文本。
summary.en: This guide systematically addresses the legislative design of modern secured transactions law and is a foundational text for understanding the logic of UNCITRAL’s secured financing framework.

authority.zh: 联合国国际贸易法委员会

title.zh: UNCITRAL《担保权登记簿实施指南（2013）》
title.en: UNCITRAL Guide on the Implementation of a Security Rights Registry (2013)

summary.zh: 该指南围绕担保权公示登记系统的建立与运行提供操作性建议，是现代动产融资制度落地的重要配套文件。
summary.en: This guide provides practical recommendations on the establishment and operation of a security rights registry, making it an important implementation companion to modern movable financing regimes.

authority.zh: 联合国国际贸易法委员会

title.zh: UNCITRAL《担保交易示范法制定说明（2017）》
title.en: UNCITRAL Model Law on Secured Transactions: Guide to Enactment (2017)

summary.zh: 该制定说明逐条解释担保交易示范法与相关 UNCITRAL 文本的关系，是各国国内法转化和制度比较的重要辅助材料。
summary.en: This guide to enactment explains the provisions of the secured transactions model law and its relationship with related UNCITRAL texts, serving as an important aid for domestic implementation and comparative analysis.

authority.zh: 联合国国际贸易法委员会

title.zh: 《联合国气候变化框架公约》官方文本入口
title.en: United Nations Framework Convention on Climate Change

summary.zh: UNFCCC 是全球气候治理的基础性框架公约，构成后续《京都议定书》《巴黎协定》及其配套制度的上位法律基础。
summary.en: The UNFCCC is the foundational framework convention of global climate governance and provides the overarching legal basis for the Kyoto Protocol, the Paris Agreement and related instruments.

authority.zh: 联合国气候变化框架公约秘书处

title.zh: 《京都议定书》官方文本
title.en: Kyoto Protocol

summary.zh: 《京都议定书》将 UNFCCC 框架下的减排义务具体化，是早期国际碳市场和配额治理制度的重要法律来源。
summary.en: The Kyoto Protocol operationalized the UNFCCC’s mitigation commitments and is a key early legal source for international carbon markets and emissions allocation governance.

authority.zh: 联合国气候变化框架公约秘书处

title.zh: 《巴黎协定》官方文本
title.en: Paris Agreement

summary.zh: 《巴黎协定》是当前全球气候治理的核心条约，围绕温控目标、国家自主贡献、透明度、资金与合作机制建立总体制度框架。
summary.en: The Paris Agreement is the core treaty of current global climate governance, establishing the overall framework for temperature goals, nationally determined contributions, transparency, finance and cooperative mechanisms.

authority.zh: 联合国气候变化框架公约秘书处

title.zh: 《巴黎协定》第6条官方专题入口
title.en: Article 6 of the Paris Agreement

summary.zh: 该专题页系统汇集《巴黎协定》第6条下合作方式、机制和非市场方法的规则材料，是理解国际碳市场和合作减排制度的关键入口。
summary.en: This topic page brings together materials on cooperative approaches, the Article 6.4 mechanism and non-market approaches, and is a key gateway to understanding the legal architecture of international carbon markets.

authority.zh: 联合国气候变化框架公约秘书处

title.zh: 《巴黎协定》第6条决定与文件库
title.en: Article 6 Decisions and Documentation

summary.zh: 该页面按年度和机制分类汇集第6条相关 CMA 决定、会期文件和工作材料，是追踪国际碳市场规则演进的高价值官方数据库。
summary.en: This page organizes Article 6-related CMA decisions, sessional documents and work materials by year and mechanism, making it a high-value official database for tracking the evolution of international carbon market rules.

authority.zh: 联合国气候变化框架公约秘书处

title.zh: 欧盟《碳边境调节机制条例》（Regulation (EU) 2023/956）
title.en: Regulation (EU) 2023/956 establishing a Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism

summary.zh: CBAM 是欧盟气候与贸易交叉治理的重要制度创新，将碳成本要求扩展到特定进口产品，对全球绿色贸易规则具有显著外溢影响。
summary.en: The CBAM is a major innovation at the intersection of climate and trade governance, extending carbon-cost disciplines to certain imports and exerting significant spillover effects on global green trade rules.

title.zh: 欧盟《排放交易体系指令》（Directive 2003/87/EC）
title.en: Directive 2003/87/EC establishing the EU Emissions Trading System

summary.zh: EU ETS 指令是全球最具代表性的碳排放交易制度法源之一，也是 CBAM 和欧盟内部碳价格治理的重要制度基础。
summary.en: The EU ETS Directive is one of the world’s most representative legal sources for emissions trading systems and forms an important institutional basis for both EU carbon pricing and the CBAM.

title.zh: ICAO《CORSIA实施要素》官方入口
title.en: ICAO CORSIA Implementation Elements

summary.zh: 该页面汇集国际航空碳抵销与减排机制（CORSIA）的实施文件、合格减排单位、可持续航空燃料和中央登记等核心材料，是国际航空碳治理的重要入口。
summary.en: This page consolidates key implementation documents for CORSIA, including eligible emissions units, sustainable aviation fuels and registry-related materials, and serves as an important gateway to international aviation carbon governance.

title.zh: 联合国国际贸易法委员会《破产法立法指南》
title.en: UNCITRAL Legislative Guide on Insolvency Law

summary.zh: 该指南系统梳理现代破产法应当体现的目标、制度结构与程序设计，是各国进行破产法改革、重整程序设计与债权人保护平衡时最常引用的国际基准文本之一。
summary.en: The Guide provides a comprehensive international benchmark on the objectives, structure and procedural design of insolvency law and is widely used in national insolvency law reform.

authority.zh: 联合国国际贸易法委员会

title.zh: 联合国国际贸易法委员会《跨境破产合作实践指南》（2009）
title.en: UNCITRAL Practice Guide on Cross-Border Insolvency Cooperation (2009)

summary.zh: 该实践指南面向法官与破产从业者，聚焦跨境破产案件中的沟通、协调与合作安排，尤其强调跨境破产协议和程序协同在多法域案件中的操作价值。
summary.en: The Practice Guide offers practical guidance for judges and insolvency practitioners on communication, coordination and cooperation in cross-border insolvency cases.

authority.zh: 联合国国际贸易法委员会

title.zh: 联合国国际贸易法委员会《破产相关判决承认与执行示范法》（2018）
title.en: UNCITRAL Model Law on Recognition and Enforcement of Insolvency-Related Judgments (2018)

summary.zh: 该示范法补足了传统跨境破产规则在“破产相关判决”承认与执行方面的制度缺口，为各国提供统一、简明的承认与执行程序框架。
summary.en: The Model Law addresses the recognition and enforcement of insolvency-related judgments and complements the cross-border insolvency framework with a harmonized procedure.

authority.zh: 联合国国际贸易法委员会

title.zh: 联合国国际贸易法委员会《企业集团破产示范法》（2019）
title.en: UNCITRAL Model Law on Enterprise Group Insolvency with Guide to Enactment (2019)

summary.zh: 该示范法针对企业集团在境内外成员同时陷入财务困境时的协调需求，提供集团层面的程序协同、规划协调与价值保全工具。
summary.en: The Model Law equips States with tools to address the domestic and cross-border insolvency of enterprise groups through coordinated proceedings and planning.

authority.zh: 联合国国际贸易法委员会

title.zh: 联合国国际贸易法委员会《跨境破产示范法：司法视角》
title.en: UNCITRAL Model Law on Cross-Border Insolvency: The Judicial Perspective

summary.zh: 这是一份面向法官的解释性材料，按照法院审查承认申请的一般顺序，对跨境破产示范法的关键条款和适用问题作出司法化说明。
summary.en: This explanatory text is designed for judges and examines the key provisions of the Model Law in the order in which a court would typically consider a recognition application.

authority.zh: 联合国国际贸易法委员会

title.zh: 联合国国际贸易法委员会《微型和小型企业破产法立法指南》（2021）
title.en: UNCITRAL Legislative Guide on Insolvency Law for Micro- and Small Enterprises (2021)

summary.zh: 该文本聚焦微型和小型企业在债务与经营高度交织、资源有限、污名压力较大等情形下的破产与重整需求，是 MSE 破产制度设计的重要国际参考。
summary.en: The text addresses the specific insolvency and restructuring needs of micro- and small enterprises and serves as an important benchmark for MSE insolvency regime design.

authority.zh: 联合国国际贸易法委员会

title.zh: 联合国国际贸易法委员会《跨境破产、破产相关判决承认与执行及企业集团破产示范法合并文本》（2021）
title.en: Consolidated Text of the UNCITRAL Model Laws on Cross-Border Insolvency, Recognition and Enforcement of Insolvency-related Judgments and Enterprise Group Insolvency (2021)

summary.zh: 该合并文本展示了如何将跨境破产、破产相关判决承认与执行、企业集团破产三套示范法整合实施，适合各国进行一体化立法设计与制度衔接参考。
summary.en: The consolidated text illustrates how States may enact the three UNCITRAL insolvency model laws together in a single integrated legislative framework.

authority.zh: 联合国国际贸易法委员会

title.zh: 欧盟《破产程序条例》（EU 2015/848）
title.en: Regulation (EU) 2015/848 on Insolvency Proceedings

summary.zh: 这是欧盟跨境破产程序协调的核心法规，围绕管辖、主要利益中心、承认与执行、信息公开以及集团协调等问题建立统一规则。
summary.en: This Regulation is the core EU instrument on cross-border insolvency proceedings, addressing jurisdiction, COMI, recognition, publicity and group coordination.

title.zh: 欧盟《预防性重整与破产指令》（EU 2019/1023）
title.en: Directive (EU) 2019/1023 on Preventive Restructuring Frameworks and Insolvency

summary.zh: 该指令围绕预防性重整、债务豁免与程序效率提升，推动成员国建立更早介入、更有持续经营导向的企业纾困与第二次机会机制。
summary.en: The Directive promotes preventive restructuring, debt discharge and more efficient insolvency procedures, aiming to preserve viable businesses and offer a second chance.

title.zh: 欧盟《破产程序标准表格实施条例》（EU 2017/1105）
title.en: Commission Implementing Regulation (EU) 2017/1105 on Standard Forms for Insolvency Proceedings

summary.zh: 该实施条例为欧盟跨境破产程序中的通知、申报与沟通提供统一标准表格，是制度落地层面极具实务价值的配套文件。
summary.en: This Implementing Regulation provides standard forms for notifications and communications in EU insolvency proceedings and is highly relevant for practice.

title.zh: 世界银行《有效破产与债权人/债务人制度原则》
title.en: World Bank Principles for Effective Insolvency and Creditor/Debtor Regimes

summary.zh: 该原则与 UNCITRAL 破产法立法指南共同构成国际上评估一国破产与债权保障体系的重要基准，兼具制度评估、能力建设与改革导向价值。
summary.en: The Principles, together with the UNCITRAL Legislative Guide, form a leading international benchmark for evaluating and strengthening insolvency and creditor/debtor rights systems.

title.zh: ISO/IEC 指令第1部分：技术工作程序
title.en: ISO/IEC Directives, Part 1: Procedures for the Technical Work

summary.zh: 该文件是国际标准制定程序的核心规则文本，系统规定了新项目立项、技术委员会运作、草案表决、出版与维护等程序，是理解国际标准如何形成的基础入口。
summary.en: This text is the core procedural rulebook for international standardization work, covering project initiation, committee operations, balloting, publication and maintenance.

authority.zh: 国际标准化组织 / 国际电工委员会

title.zh: ISO/IEC 指令第2部分：国际标准的结构与起草规则
title.en: ISO/IEC Directives, Part 2: Principles and Rules for the Structure and Drafting of ISO and IEC Documents

summary.zh: 该文件规定国际标准文本的结构、术语、规范性引用、条款编排与起草方式，是技术规则文本表达与法律可适用性之间的重要桥梁。
summary.en: This text sets out the drafting and structural rules for ISO and IEC documents, shaping how technical rules are written, referenced and applied.

authority.zh: 国际标准化组织 / 国际电工委员会

title.zh: 国际电信联盟《组织法与公约》基本文本
title.en: ITU Basic Texts: Constitution and Convention of the International Telecommunication Union

summary.zh: 该基本文本构成 ITU 制度架构与国际电信规则协调的根基，涉及成员资格、机构权限、标准化与无线电等领域的基本治理安排。
summary.en: The Basic Texts provide the foundational constitutional framework of the ITU, including institutional powers and core governance arrangements for global telecommunications.

title.zh: ITU-T A.1 建议书：研究组工作方法
title.en: ITU-T Recommendation A.1: Working Methods for Study Groups of the Telecommunication Standardization Sector

summary.zh: 该建议书规定 ITU-T 研究组在标准提案、协商、同意与审批中的工作方式，是理解国际电信技术规则生成机制的重要程序文本。
summary.en: This Recommendation sets out how ITU-T study groups develop, negotiate, agree and approve standards within the telecommunication standardization sector.

authority.zh: 国际电信联盟电信标准化部门

title.zh: 《食品法典委员会程序手册》
title.en: Codex Alimentarius Commission Procedural Manual

summary.zh: 该手册是 Codex 标准、准则与操作规范制定的基础性程序文件，直接关系到食品安全、标签、检验检疫与国际贸易中的标准协调。
summary.en: This manual is the foundational procedural text for the development of Codex standards, guidelines and codes of practice relevant to food safety and international trade.

title.zh: WTO/TBT 关于制定国际标准、指南和建议的六项原则
title.en: WTO TBT Committee Decision on Principles for the Development of International Standards, Guides and Recommendations

summary.zh: 该文件概括了透明度、开放性、公正与共识、有效性与相关性、一致性及发展中成员关切等六项原则，是衡量国际标准“正当性”的经典 WTO 参照文本。
summary.en: This WTO TBT text articulates the six principles of transparency, openness, impartiality and consensus, effectiveness and relevance, coherence, and development dimension.

authority.zh: 世界贸易组织技术性贸易壁垒委员会
authority.en: WTO Committee on Technical Barriers to Trade

title.zh: 《1958年协定》：关于轮式车辆、设备和部件统一技术规定及相互承认
title.en: 1958 Agreement Concerning the Adoption of Harmonized Technical United Nations Regulations for Wheeled Vehicles, Equipment and Parts

summary.zh: 该协定是全球汽车技术法规协调的重要制度基础，围绕联合国法规的制定、采纳与型式批准相互承认建立跨境技术规则体系。
summary.en: The 1958 Agreement is a cornerstone of global automotive technical regulation, providing the basis for UN Regulations and mutual recognition of type approvals.

authority.zh: 联合国欧洲经济委员会 WP.29

title.zh: 《1998年协定》：关于制定全球技术法规
title.en: 1998 Agreement Concerning the Establishing of Global Technical Regulations for Wheeled Vehicles, Equipment and Parts

summary.zh: 该协定为全球技术法规（GTRs）的制定提供程序平台，与 1958 年协定共同构成国际汽车技术规则协调的双支柱。
summary.en: The 1998 Agreement provides the procedural platform for developing Global Technical Regulations and complements the 1958 Agreement in automotive harmonization.

authority.zh: 联合国欧洲经济委员会 WP.29

title.zh: ETSI 知识产权政策
title.en: ETSI Intellectual Property Rights Policy

summary.zh: 该政策是标准必要专利（SEP）与 FRAND 许可争议中最常被引用的国际标准组织规则之一，对通信与数字产业的跨境专利许可具有直接影响。
summary.en: This policy is one of the most frequently cited international rules in SEP and FRAND disputes and has direct relevance to cross-border licensing in digital industries.

title.zh: IEEE-SA 标准委员会章程中的专利政策
title.en: IEEE-SA Standards Board Bylaws and Patent Policy
