summary.zh: 该规则文本集中体现 IEEE 标准制定中的专利披露、许可承诺与相关程序要求，是分析标准必要专利与技术标准治理的重要官方来源。
summary.en: This rule set contains the core IEEE patent disclosure and licensing commitments applicable in standards development and is an important source for SEP governance analysis.

authority.zh: 电气电子工程师学会标准协会

title.zh: 国际单位制手册（第9版）
title.en: The International System of Units (SI Brochure), 9th Edition

summary.zh: 该手册是国际计量体系的权威基础文本，系统说明 SI 单位、定义、使用规则与表达方式，对技术标准、贸易检验与合规测量具有基础性作用。
summary.en: The SI Brochure is the authoritative foundation of the international measurement system, covering SI units, definitions and rules of use central to technical regulation.

authority.en: Bureau International des Poids et Mesures

title.zh: OIML B 6《技术工作指令》
title.en: OIML B 6 Directives for OIML Technical Work

summary.zh: 该文件规定国际法制计量组织技术工作的组织方式、项目推进与文本制定规则，是理解国际法制计量技术文件生成机制的关键程序文本。
summary.en: This text sets out the organization, project handling and drafting rules for OIML technical work and is a key procedural reference for legal metrology governance.

title.zh: 《国家管辖范围以外区域海洋生物多样性协定》（BBNJ协定）
title.en: Agreement under the United Nations Convention on the Law of the Sea on the Conservation and Sustainable Use of Marine Biological Diversity of Areas beyond National Jurisdiction

summary.zh: BBNJ协定是《联合国海洋法公约》框架下关于公海生物多样性保护与可持续利用的最新实施协定，覆盖海洋遗传资源、海洋保护区、环境影响评估和能力建设等核心议题。
summary.en: The BBNJ Agreement is the newest implementing agreement under UNCLOS and addresses marine genetic resources, area-based management tools, environmental impact assessments and capacity-building beyond national jurisdiction.

title.zh: 《联合国鱼类种群协定》（1995）
title.en: 1995 United Nations Fish Stocks Agreement

summary.zh: 该协定细化了《联合国海洋法公约》关于跨界鱼类种群和高度洄游鱼类种群养护与管理的规则，是公海渔业治理和区域渔业组织制度的重要基础文本。
summary.en: This Agreement elaborates UNCLOS rules on the conservation and management of straddling and highly migratory fish stocks and is a foundational text for high seas fisheries governance.

authority.zh: 联合国海洋事务和海洋法司
authority.en: UN Division for Ocean Affairs and the Law of the Sea

title.zh: 国际海事组织《极地水域船舶国际规则》（Polar Code）
title.en: International Code for Ships Operating in Polar Waters (Polar Code)

summary.zh: 《极地规则》在 SOLAS 与 MARPOL 框架下对极地航行中的船舶设计、设备、操作、培训、搜救与环境保护提出专门要求，是极地航运治理的关键技术法源。
summary.en: The Polar Code sets out mandatory shipping safety and environmental requirements for vessels operating in Arctic and Antarctic waters under the SOLAS and MARPOL frameworks.

title.zh: 国际海底管理局《采矿规则》（Mining Code）框架
title.en: International Seabed Authority Mining Code Framework

summary.zh: ISA《采矿规则》构成“区域”海底矿产勘探、开发与环境保护的核心监管框架，是深海采矿治理和国际海底制度演进中的关键官方入口。
summary.en: The ISA Mining Code is the core regulatory framework for prospecting, exploration, exploitation and environmental protection in the Area and is central to deep seabed mining governance.

title.zh: 《南极条约》
title.en: The Antarctic Treaty

summary.zh: 《南极条约》确立了南极用于和平目的、科学研究自由和主权争议冻结等基本原则，是现代极地治理尤其是南极制度的根本文本。
summary.en: The Antarctic Treaty establishes the foundational principles of peaceful use, freedom of scientific investigation and the freezing of territorial sovereignty disputes in Antarctica.

title.zh: 《南极条约环境保护议定书》（马德里议定书）
title.en: Protocol on Environmental Protection to the Antarctic Treaty

summary.zh: 该议定书将南极界定为“致力于和平与科学的自然保护区”，并对环境影响评估、废物处理、海洋污染和矿产资源活动限制等作出系统规范。
summary.en: The Protocol designates Antarctica as a natural reserve devoted to peace and science and sets out a detailed environmental protection framework for activities in Antarctica.

title.zh: 《南极海洋生物资源养护公约》
title.en: Convention on the Conservation of Antarctic Marine Living Resources

summary.zh: 该公约是南大洋渔业与生态系统养护治理的核心法律文件，在生态系统方法、南极海洋保护区与渔业管制方面具有长期制度影响。
summary.en: The CAMLR Convention is the central legal instrument for the conservation of Antarctic marine living resources and underpins ecosystem-based governance in the Southern Ocean.

authority.zh: 南极海洋生物资源养护委员会
authority.en: Commission for the Conservation of Antarctic Marine Living Resources

title.zh: 《南极海豹养护公约》
title.en: Convention for the Conservation of Antarctic Seals

summary.zh: 该公约是南极条约体系下较早形成的专门养护条约之一，围绕海豹资源利用、保护区和特别许可制度建立了早期的极地物种保护规则。
summary.en: This Convention is one of the earlier conservation treaties under the Antarctic Treaty System and establishes early species-specific rules for the protection of Antarctic seals.

title.zh: 《北极航空和海上搜救合作协定》（2011）
title.en: Agreement on Cooperation on Aeronautical and Maritime Search and Rescue in the Arctic (2011)

summary.zh: 这是在北极理事会框架下谈成的首个具有法律约束力文件，围绕搜救区域划分、协作机制和信息共享，构成北极实务治理的重要支柱。
summary.en: This was the first legally binding agreement negotiated under the auspices of the Arctic Council and provides a framework for Arctic aeronautical and maritime search and rescue cooperation.

title.zh: 《北极海洋油污防备与响应合作协定》（2013）
title.en: Agreement on Cooperation on Marine Oil Pollution Preparedness and Response in the Arctic (2013)

summary.zh: 该协定聚焦北极海域油污事件的预防、通报、协同响应与互助机制，是极地海上环境应急合作的重要法律文件。
summary.en: This Agreement focuses on prevention, notification, coordination and mutual assistance in responding to marine oil pollution incidents in the Arctic.

title.zh: 《加强国际北极科学合作协定》（2017）
title.en: Agreement on Enhancing International Arctic Scientific Cooperation (2017)

summary.zh: 该协定旨在降低北极跨境科研合作中的制度障碍，便利人员、设备、样本和数据流动，是北极科学治理与知识合作的重要制度安排。
summary.en: This Agreement seeks to reduce barriers to Arctic scientific cooperation by facilitating access, movement of persons and equipment, and research collaboration across borders.

title.zh: 《防止中央北冰洋公海无管制渔业协定》
title.en: Agreement to Prevent Unregulated High Seas Fisheries in the Central Arctic Ocean

summary.zh: 该协定以预防性方式在商业捕捞实际开始前先行建立规则，禁止中央北冰洋公海发生无管制捕捞，并配套联合科研与监测机制。
summary.en: This Agreement takes a precautionary approach by preventing unregulated commercial fishing in the high seas portion of the central Arctic Ocean before such fishing develops.

authority.zh: 中央北冰洋渔业协定缔约方
authority.en: Parties to the Central Arctic Ocean Fisheries Agreement

title.zh: 《外层空间条约》
title.en: Treaty on Principles Governing the Activities of States in the Exploration and Use of Outer Space, including the Moon and Other Celestial Bodies

summary.zh: 《外层空间条约》是国际空间法的基础性文本，确立了和平利用外空、不得据为己有、国家责任、国际责任与合作等核心原则，是空间治理体系的总纲。
summary.en: The Outer Space Treaty is the foundational text of international space law, establishing core principles on peaceful use, non-appropriation, State responsibility, liability and international cooperation.

authority.zh: 联合国外层空间事务厅
authority.en: United Nations Office for Outer Space Affairs

title.zh: 《营救宇航员、送回宇航员和归还发射到外层空间的物体协定》（1968）
title.en: Agreement on the Rescue of Astronauts, the Return of Astronauts and the Return of Objects Launched into Outer Space (1968)

summary.zh: 该协定细化了《外层空间条约》关于宇航员协助与外空物体归还的义务，是空间救援、人道合作与空间物体返还制度的重要组成部分。
summary.en: The Rescue Agreement elaborates obligations under the Outer Space Treaty concerning assistance to astronauts in distress and the return of astronauts and space objects.

authority.zh: 联合国外层空间事务厅
authority.en: United Nations Office for Outer Space Affairs

title.zh: 《空间物体所造成损害的国际责任公约》（1972）
title.en: Convention on International Liability for Damage Caused by Space Objects (1972)

summary.zh: 该公约细化了空间活动造成损害时的责任分配与索赔程序，对地面损害、航空器损害和外空碰撞中的责任规则具有核心意义。
summary.en: The Liability Convention elaborates the rules on liability and claims procedures for damage caused by space objects on Earth, to aircraft and in outer space.

authority.zh: 联合国外层空间事务厅
authority.en: United Nations Office for Outer Space Affairs

title.zh: 《登记发射到外层空间物体公约》（1975）
title.en: Convention on Registration of Objects Launched into Outer Space (1975)

summary.zh: 该公约要求国家向联合国秘书长登记其发射到外空的物体，是空间透明度、责任识别与轨道秩序管理的重要法律基础。
summary.en: The Registration Convention requires States to furnish registration information on space objects to the United Nations and supports transparency and identification in outer space activities.

authority.zh: 联合国外层空间事务厅
authority.en: United Nations Office for Outer Space Affairs

title.zh: 《关于各国在月球和其他天体上活动的协定》（1979）
title.en: Agreement Governing the Activities of States on the Moon and Other Celestial Bodies (1979)

summary.zh: 《月球协定》进一步处理月球和其他天体上的活动规则、自然资源利用和共同继承财产理念，是外空资源治理争论中常被引用的重要文本。
summary.en: The Moon Agreement addresses activities on the Moon and other celestial bodies, including resource-related issues and the concept of the common heritage of mankind.

authority.zh: 联合国外层空间事务厅
authority.en: United Nations Office for Outer Space Affairs

title.zh: 《从外层空间遥感地球原则》（1986）
title.en: Principles Relating to Remote Sensing of the Earth from Outer Space (1986)

summary.zh: 该原则是联合国外空软法的重要组成部分，围绕遥感活动的利益分享、环境保护、信息提供与被感测国权益等问题建立了基础规范。
summary.en: These principles form a key part of United Nations soft law on outer space and set out foundational rules on benefit-sharing, environmental protection, information and the interests of sensed States.

authority.zh: 联合国外层空间事务厅
authority.en: United Nations Office for Outer Space Affairs

title.zh: 《外层空间使用核动力源有关原则》（1992）
title.en: Principles Relevant to the Use of Nuclear Power Sources in Outer Space (1992)

summary.zh: 该原则聚焦空间核动力源的安全使用、风险评估与责任安排，是空间核能应用治理与航天安全讨论中的重要联合国文本。
summary.en: These principles address the safe use of nuclear power sources in outer space, including safety assessment and responsibility, and remain a key UN reference for space nuclear governance.

authority.zh: 联合国外层空间事务厅
authority.en: United Nations Office for Outer Space Affairs

title.zh: 联合国外空委《空间碎片减缓准则》
title.en: COPUOS Space Debris Mitigation Guidelines

summary.zh: 该准则是国际空间碎片治理最常被引用的联合国软法文件之一，对发射、在轨操作和任务终结阶段的碎片控制具有基础性影响。
summary.en: These Guidelines are among the most frequently cited UN soft-law instruments on space debris and shape debris mitigation practices across launch, in-orbit operations and end-of-life stages.

authority.zh: 联合国和平利用外层空间委员会
authority.en: Committee on the Peaceful Uses of Outer Space

title.zh: 联合国外空委《外空活动长期可持续性准则》（2019）
title.en: Guidelines for the Long-term Sustainability of Outer Space Activities (2019)

summary.zh: 该准则围绕政策监管、空间运行安全、能力建设与科研合作提出一整套长期可持续性框架，是近年来空间治理最重要的联合国规范成果之一。
summary.en: The LTS Guidelines provide a comprehensive framework on policy, regulatory measures, operational safety, capacity-building and cooperation for the long-term sustainability of outer space activities.

authority.zh: 联合国和平利用外层空间委员会
authority.en: Committee on the Peaceful Uses of Outer Space

title.zh: 联合国外空物体登记册
title.en: United Nations Register of Objects Launched into Outer Space

summary.zh: 这是联合国落实空间物体登记制度的官方入口，集中展示登记资源、提交信息与实施支持，对空间透明度和责任追踪具有直接实务价值。
summary.en: This is the United Nations official portal for space object registration, providing resources, submissions and implementation support relevant to transparency and accountability in space activities.

authority.zh: 联合国外层空间事务厅
authority.en: United Nations Office for Outer Space Affairs

title.zh: ITU 空间网络监管中心（Space Networks Regulatory Hub）
title.en: ITU Space Networks Regulatory Hub

summary.zh: 该平台汇集卫星网络申报、轨道频谱协调和空间业务监管信息，是理解 ITU 频谱与轨道资源治理实务运行方式的关键官方入口。
summary.en: This hub aggregates regulatory information on satellite network filings, orbit-spectrum coordination and space services, making it a key official gateway to the practical operation of ITU space regulation.

title.zh: UNESCO《数字平台治理指南》
title.en: UNESCO Guidelines for the Governance of Digital Platforms

summary.zh: 该指南以言论自由、获取信息和多利益攸关方治理为核心，系统讨论平台责任、透明度、内容审核、风险评估和独立监督，是全球平台治理的重要规范性参考。
summary.en: These Guidelines provide a global reference on platform governance centred on freedom of expression, access to information, transparency, accountability, content moderation and independent oversight.

title.zh: UNESCO《人工智能伦理建议书》（2021）
title.en: UNESCO Recommendation on the Ethics of Artificial Intelligence (2021)

summary.zh: 这是全球首个普遍性人工智能伦理标准文件之一，强调人权、尊严、透明、公平和人类监督，并提供可供成员国转化为政策行动的实施框架。
summary.en: This Recommendation is a landmark global AI ethics standard, emphasizing human rights, dignity, transparency, fairness and human oversight with concrete policy action areas for States.

title.zh: OECD《人工智能原则》（2019，2024更新）
title.en: OECD AI Principles (2019, updated 2024)

summary.zh: OECD AI Principles 是全球最常被引用的政府间 AI 治理标准之一，强调可信赖、以人为本和民主价值导向，并在 2024 年完成更新。
summary.en: The OECD AI Principles are one of the most influential intergovernmental AI governance standards, promoting trustworthy, human-centred AI and updated in 2024.

authority.en: Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development

title.zh: 欧洲委员会《人工智能、人权、民主与法治框架公约》（2024）
title.en: Council of Europe Framework Convention on Artificial Intelligence and Human Rights, Democracy and the Rule of Law (2024)

summary.zh: 这是首个具有法律约束力的国际 AI 条约文本，采用风险导向方法，要求缔约方确保 AI 系统全生命周期与人权、民主和法治相一致。
summary.en: This is the first legally binding international treaty on AI, adopting a risk-based approach to ensure that AI systems remain consistent with human rights, democracy and the rule of law.

title.zh: G7《广岛AI进程：面向开发先进AI系统组织的国际指导原则》（2023）
title.en: Hiroshima Process International Guiding Principles for Organizations Developing Advanced AI Systems (2023)

summary.zh: 该原则是 G7 广岛 AI 进程的重要成果，面向开发先进 AI 系统的组织提出安全、可靠、可问责和风险管理导向的治理要求。
summary.en: These Guiding Principles are a core outcome of the G7 Hiroshima AI Process and set out governance expectations for organizations developing advanced AI systems.

title.zh: G7《广岛AI进程：面向开发先进AI系统组织的国际行为守则》（2023）
title.en: Hiroshima Process International Code of Conduct for Organizations Developing Advanced AI Systems (2023)

summary.zh: 该行为守则在广岛 AI 进程指导原则基础上，进一步提出具体行动导向的自愿性要求，是当前全球先进生成式 AI 治理讨论中的高频参考文本。
summary.en: Building on the Hiroshima guiding principles, this Code of Conduct provides voluntary action-oriented guidance for organizations developing advanced AI systems.

title.zh: 欧盟《2022年虚假信息行为守则》
title.en: EU 2022 Code of Practice on Disinformation

summary.zh: 该守则是欧盟平台治理与信息完整性政策的重要组成部分，围绕广告透明、虚假账号、研究者数据接入、事实核查和平台承诺建立较系统的协作框架。
summary.en: The 2022 Code of Practice on Disinformation is a central EU platform-governance instrument covering transparency in advertising, fake accounts, data access for researchers and fact-checking commitments.

title.zh: 欧盟《数字服务法》透明度数据库
title.en: EU DSA Transparency Database

summary.zh: 这是《数字服务法》下平台提交“说明理由声明”的官方数据库入口，可直接观察内容删除、限制、账号处置等平台治理行为的实际运行情况。
summary.en: This is the official database under the Digital Services Act where platforms submit statements of reasons, enabling scrutiny of content moderation and account restriction decisions.

title.zh: 欧盟《打击网上传播恐怖主义内容条例》（EU 2021/784）
title.en: Regulation (EU) 2021/784 on Addressing the Dissemination of Terrorist Content Online

summary.zh: 该条例为平台和托管服务提供者处理恐怖主义在线内容建立统一规则，在一小时删除令、跨境执行、申诉保障和基本权利平衡方面具有典型意义。
summary.en: This Regulation establishes EU-wide rules for addressing terrorist content online, including one-hour removal orders, cross-border enforcement, safeguards and fundamental-rights balancing.

title.zh: 欧盟《视听媒体服务指令》（2018修订）
title.en: Directive (EU) 2018/1808 on Audiovisual Media Services

summary.zh: 该指令将视频分享平台纳入更完整的监管框架，对未成年人保护、仇恨言论、商业传播和监管协调作出规定，是欧洲平台内容治理的重要基石之一。
summary.en: This Directive extends the audiovisual media framework to video-sharing platforms and addresses issues such as minors’ protection, hate speech, commercial communications and regulatory coordination.

title.zh: 欧盟《促进在线中介服务商业用户公平与透明条例》（EU 2019/1150）
title.en: Regulation (EU) 2019/1150 on Promoting Fairness and Transparency for Business Users of Online Intermediation Services

summary.zh: 该条例聚焦平台与商业用户之间的规则透明、排名说明、账号限制、申诉与纠纷处理，是平台经济中 B2B 关系治理的核心制度之一。
summary.en: This Regulation addresses fairness and transparency in platform-to-business relations, including ranking transparency, account restrictions, redress and dispute handling.

title.zh: APEC《隐私框架》（2015）
title.en: APEC Privacy Framework (2015)

summary.zh: 该框架是亚太地区跨境个人信息流动治理的重要基础文本，强调问责制、通知、选择、完整性与安全保障等原则，并为后续 CBPR 体系提供制度基础。
summary.en: The APEC Privacy Framework is a foundational Asia-Pacific instrument for governing cross-border personal data flows and underpins later CBPR-based accountability mechanisms.

title.zh: APEC《跨境隐私规则体系政策、规则与指南》
title.en: APEC Cross-Border Privacy Rules System: Policies, Rules and Guidelines

summary.zh: 该文件是 APEC CBPR 体系的核心制度文本，集中规定制度目标、问责结构、认证逻辑与参与要求，是理解亚太跨境隐私互认机制的关键入口。
summary.en: This document is the core rulebook of the APEC CBPR System, setting out its objectives, accountability structure, certification logic and participation requirements.

title.zh: APEC《跨境隐私执法安排》（CPEA）
title.en: APEC Cross-border Privacy Enforcement Arrangement (CPEA)

summary.zh: CPEA 面向隐私执法机构建立跨境合作框架，支持信息共享、协调调查和执法协作，是亚太隐私保护从企业合规延伸到监管合作的重要制度接口。
summary.en: The CPEA provides a cooperation framework for privacy enforcement authorities, supporting information-sharing, coordinated investigations and cross-border enforcement cooperation.

title.zh: Global CBPR Forum 官方制度入口
title.en: Global CBPR Forum Official Portal

summary.zh: Global CBPR Forum 是从 APEC CBPR 机制演进出的跨区域合作平台，旨在推动更广泛的隐私规则互操作和可信数据流动，是当前跨境隐私认证治理的重要新架构。
summary.en: The Global CBPR Forum evolved from the APEC CBPR framework into a broader cross-regional initiative for privacy interoperability and trusted data flows.

title.zh: Global CBPR System
title.en: Global Cross-Border Privacy Rules System

summary.zh: Global CBPR System 通过第三方认证与问责机制支持组织跨境传输个人信息，是当前国际上较具代表性的隐私合规互认工具之一。
summary.en: The Global CBPR System supports cross-border personal data transfers through third-party certification and accountability mechanisms, making it a leading privacy interoperability tool.

title.zh: Global PRP System
title.en: Global Privacy Recognition for Processors System

summary.zh: Global PRP System 面向数据处理者建立隐私认证路径，强化供应链和受托处理场景中的跨境信任安排，是 CBPR 体系的关键补充。
summary.en: The Global PRP System provides a privacy certification pathway for processors and strengthens trust arrangements in supply-chain and processing contexts.

title.zh: Global CAPE 跨境隐私执法安排
title.en: Global Cooperation Arrangement for Privacy Enforcement (Global CAPE)

summary.zh: Global CAPE 旨在连接参与经济体的隐私执法机构，支持调查协作、执法协调和案例信息共享，是跨境数据流“可信”维度中的监管合作基础设施。
summary.en: Global CAPE connects participating privacy enforcement authorities to support investigations, enforcement coordination and information-sharing across borders.

title.zh: OECD《隐私保护与个人数据跨境流动指南》（2013修订）
title.en: OECD Guidelines Governing the Protection of Privacy and Transborder Flows of Personal Data (as revised in 2013)

summary.zh: OECD 隐私指南是跨境数据流治理的经典国际基准文本之一，长期影响各国隐私立法、问责机制与跨境传输规则设计。
summary.en: The OECD Privacy Guidelines are a classic international benchmark for privacy and transborder data flow governance and have influenced national privacy laws and transfer mechanisms.

authority.en: Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development

title.zh: OECD《跨境隐私执法合作建议》（2007）
title.en: OECD Recommendation on Cross-border Co-operation in the Enforcement of Laws Protecting Privacy (2007)

summary.zh: 该建议聚焦各国隐私执法机构之间的跨境合作，是隐私保护从规范原则走向监管执行的重要 OECD 文本。
summary.en: This OECD Recommendation focuses on cross-border cooperation among privacy enforcement authorities and is a key text linking privacy norms with practical enforcement.

authority.en: Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development

title.zh: OECD“可信任的数据自由流动”（DFFT）专题入口
title.en: OECD Data Free Flow with Trust (DFFT)

summary.zh: DFFT 是当前全球数字贸易与跨境数据流治理中的核心概念之一，OECD 这一入口汇总了关于数据流动、信任、治理互操作与政策协调的官方资料。
summary.en: DFFT is a core concept in current global digital trade and cross-border data governance, and this OECD hub consolidates official work on trusted data flows and interoperable policy approaches.

authority.en: Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development

zh: 可信任的数据自由流动

title.zh: OECD《政府访问私营部门持有个人数据宣言》（2022）
title.en: OECD Declaration on Government Access to Personal Data Held by Private Sector Entities (2022)

summary.zh: 该宣言围绕政府依法访问企业持有的个人数据建立共同保障原则，在跨境数据流“信任”维度和国际互操作讨论中具有突出意义。
summary.en: This Declaration sets out shared safeguards for government access to personal data held by private-sector entities and is highly relevant to trust and interoperability in cross-border data flows.

authority.en: Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development

title.zh: G7《数字贸易原则》（2021）
title.en: G7 Digital Trade Principles (2021)

summary.zh: G7《数字贸易原则》围绕开放数字市场、跨境数据流、数据保护、源代码、网络安全和无纸化贸易等提出共同方向，是理解主要发达经济体数字贸易政策趋同的重要文件。
summary.en: The G7 Digital Trade Principles articulate shared positions on open digital markets, cross-border data flows, privacy, source code, cybersecurity and paperless trade.

title.zh: WTO《电子商务工作计划》（1998）
title.en: WTO Work Programme on Electronic Commerce (1998)

summary.zh: 这是 WTO 处理电子商务议题的起点性文件，明确由不同理事会和委员会分别审议电子商务在货物、服务、知识产权和发展等方面的问题。
summary.en: This is the foundational WTO text on electronic commerce, assigning work across WTO bodies on trade in goods, services, intellectual property and development dimensions of e-commerce.

title.zh: WTO《电子商务协定》谈判与文本入口
title.en: WTO Agreement on Electronic Commerce Negotiation and Text Hub

summary.zh: 该入口汇总 WTO 电子商务联合声明倡议（JSI）的官方进展与文本材料，是跟踪数字贸易规则、电子传输、在线消费者保护与无纸化贸易议题的重要页面。
summary.en: This WTO hub consolidates official materials on the Joint Statement Initiative on electronic commerce and is a key source for tracking evolving digital trade rules.

title.zh: FSB 跨境支付专题入口
title.en: FSB Cross-border Payments Hub

summary.zh: 这是金融稳定理事会关于跨境支付改革的官方总入口，汇集 G20 路线图、进展报告、政策建议和实施动态，是把握全球跨境支付治理演进的关键页面。
summary.en: This is the Financial Stability Board’s official hub for cross-border payments, bringing together the G20 roadmap, progress reports, policy recommendations and implementation developments.

title.zh: CPMI 跨境支付计划
title.en: CPMI Cross-border Payments Programme

summary.zh: 该页面是 BIS 下属支付和市场基础设施委员会推进 G20 跨境支付路线图的核心入口，集中展示支付系统互联、法律监管协调和数据标准等重点工作。
summary.en: This page is the core CPMI gateway for implementing the G20 cross-border payments roadmap, covering interoperability, legal and supervisory coordination, and data standards.

authority.zh: 支付和市场基础设施委员会
authority.en: Committee on Payments and Market Infrastructures

title.zh: CPMI《加强跨境支付的 ISO 20022 统一数据要求》（2026更新）
title.en: CPMI Harmonised ISO 20022 Data Requirements for Enhancing Cross-border Payments (Updated 2026)

summary.zh: 该报告是 G20 跨境支付计划下关于报文数据标准的重要技术成果，旨在减少不同机构对 ISO 20022 的碎片化实施，提升跨境支付的自动化、透明度和互操作性。
summary.en: This report is a key technical output under the G20 cross-border payments programme and seeks to reduce fragmented implementation of ISO 20022 to improve automation, transparency and interoperability.

authority.zh: 支付和市场基础设施委员会
authority.en: Committee on Payments and Market Infrastructures

title.zh: FSB《促进跨境支付相关数据框架协调与互操作建议》（2024）
title.en: FSB Recommendations to Promote Alignment and Interoperability Across Data Frameworks Related to Cross-border Payments (2024)

summary.zh: 该文件聚焦跨境支付中的数据流动障碍，讨论隐私、反洗钱、制裁、数据本地化与监管要求之间的协调，是数据治理与支付治理交叉地带的重要国际规则文本。
summary.en: This FSB text addresses frictions arising from data frameworks applicable to cross-border payments, including privacy, AML/CFT, sanctions, localisation and supervisory requirements.

title.zh: FSB《全球稳定币安排监管、监督与监察高级建议》（2023）
title.en: FSB High-level Recommendations for the Regulation, Supervision and Oversight of Global Stablecoin Arrangements (2023)

summary.zh: 该建议是全球稳定币治理的核心国际框架之一，围绕治理、储备资产、赎回权、跨境协调和风险控制提出高层级监管基线。
summary.en: These recommendations form a key international framework for global stablecoin governance, addressing governance, reserve assets, redemption rights, cross-border coordination and risk controls.

title.zh: FSB《加密资产活动和市场监管、监督与监察高级建议》（2023）
title.en: FSB High-level Recommendations for the Regulation, Supervision and Oversight of Crypto-asset Activities and Markets (2023)

summary.zh: 该建议为加密资产活动和市场建立全球监管基线，强调“同类活动、同类风险、同类监管”，并要求加强跨境合作、信息共享和功能分离。
summary.en: These recommendations establish a global baseline for crypto-asset regulation based on the principle of same activity, same risk, same regulation, with emphasis on cross-border cooperation and functional separation.

en: same activity same risk same regulation

title.zh: BIS 等《中央银行数字货币：基础原则与核心特征》（2020）
title.en: Central Bank Digital Currencies: Foundational Principles and Core Features (2020)

summary.zh: 该联合报告是全球 CBDC 讨论中最具代表性的基准文件之一，提出“不能损害货币和金融稳定”“与现金和现有货币体系共存”等核心原则。
summary.en: This joint report is one of the most influential benchmark texts on CBDCs, setting out foundational principles such as doing no harm to monetary and financial stability and coexistence with existing forms of money.

authority.zh: 国际清算银行及七家中央银行工作组
authority.en: Bank for International Settlements and Group of Central Banks

title.zh: BIS 创新中心 CBDC 工作专题
title.en: BIS Innovation Hub Work on Central Bank Digital Currency

summary.zh: 该专题页面汇总 BIS 创新中心关于零售型、批发型和跨境 CBDC 的项目与研究，是跟踪国际央行数字货币实验进展的重要官方入口。
summary.en: This BIS Innovation Hub page consolidates work on retail, wholesale and cross-border CBDCs and is a key official source for tracking international CBDC experimentation.

authority.zh: 国际清算银行创新中心

title.zh: IMF《中央银行数字货币虚拟手册》
title.en: IMF Central Bank Digital Currency (CBDC) Virtual Handbook

summary.zh: 该手册面向中央银行和财政部门，系统汇集 CBDC 在金融稳定、货币政策、隐私保护、跨境支付和法律基础等方面的政策分析与实务框架。
summary.en: This handbook is a policy and practice guide for central banks and finance ministries, covering CBDC issues such as financial stability, monetary policy, privacy, cross-border payments and legal foundations.

title.zh: IMF《用于跨境支付的中央银行数字货币》（2021）
title.en: IMF Central Bank Digital Currencies for Cross-border Payments (2021)

summary.zh: 该政策文件专门讨论 CBDC 在跨境支付中的潜在作用、设计路径和风险约束，是国际组织层面较早系统处理“CBDC 与跨境支付”问题的代表性文本。
summary.en: This policy paper focuses specifically on the use of CBDCs for cross-border payments, examining design pathways, opportunities and constraints at the international level.

title.zh: SWIFT 组织与治理
title.en: SWIFT Organisation and Governance

summary.zh: 该页面介绍 SWIFT 作为全球金融报文基础设施的公司结构、董事会治理、成员基础和中立性安排，是理解 SWIFT 制度定位和治理结构的官方入口。
summary.en: This page explains SWIFT’s cooperative structure, board governance, membership base and neutrality arrangements, providing an official overview of its institutional design.

title.zh: SWIFT 监督机制
title.en: SWIFT Oversight

summary.zh: 该页面说明以比利时国家银行为牵头方、G10 央行参与的 SWIFT 合作监督安排，是理解 SWIFT 如何接受公共权威监督的重要官方入口。
summary.en: This page explains the cooperative oversight framework for SWIFT led by the National Bank of Belgium with participation from G10 central banks.

authority.zh: SWIFT / 比利时国家银行等监督机构
authority.en: SWIFT / National Bank of Belgium and Oversight Authorities

title.zh: SWIFT ISO 20022 计划
title.en: SWIFT ISO 20022 Programme

summary.zh: 该页面是 SWIFT 关于跨境支付 ISO 20022 迁移的官方总入口，涵盖 CBPR+、迁移时间表、实施资源与后续里程碑，是支付报文标准升级的关键实务入口。
summary.en: This is SWIFT’s official gateway for ISO 20022 migration in cross-border payments, covering CBPR+, timelines, implementation resources and further milestones.
